body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23673%2E4449941%2ECQzpA9) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23673%2E4449941%2ECQzpA9) **BREAKING FROM _BBC:_
[_“‘Quiet, piggy': Trump responds to reporter after Epstein question”_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70454?t=3&akid=23673%2E4449941%2ECQzpA9)** [**dpwillis67@gmail.com: will you add your name to stand with the Free Press against Trump’s attacks?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70454?t=4&akid=23673%2E4449941%2ECQzpA9) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70454?t=5&akid=23673%2E4449941%2ECQzpA9)
| [SIGN MY NAME NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70454?t=6&akid=23673%2E4449941%2ECQzpA9)
---
[****This petition will only remain open for another 5 hours on 11/30/25****](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70454?t=7&akid=23673%2E4449941%2ECQzpA9)
Wow, we’re DISGUSTED.

In response to a question about his relationship with Jeffry Epstein, Trump berated a journalist by telling her “quiet, piggy”.

_We’re in utter shock!_

**Trump has spent his entire second term relentlessly attacking those reporting on the TRUTH, not just what he wants people to hear – journalists like Rachel Maddow, Nicole Wallace, Stephen Colbert, Jimmy Kimmel, and so many more.**

We are NOT letting him get away with this, so we’re urgently gathering 100,000 signatures on our viral petition to stand with the Free Press in response to this breaking news.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Before the clock runs out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
It’s the last chance to hit our goal |
#
---
It’s the last day of the month, team, and the last chance to hit our November fundraising goal before midnight tonight. I know, we talk about deadlines a lot. But the truth is that these deadlines matter. Every goal we hit means we’re stronger heading into 2026. Every grassroots donor who chips in sends a message that we’re not backing down from the fights ahead, that we’re serious about electing leaders who will restore our fundamental freedoms and bring down costs. And I want to be clear. I don’t take your support for granted. Any of it. This team is the reason I’ve been able to get so much done for the people of Michigan, and why we’re going to keep pushing for more: a cleaner environment, better schools, safer communities, and a government that works _for_ people. But we only get there together. **[So with just hours left on the clock, I’m hoping you’ll be part of this final push. clean_body: It’s the last chance to hit our goal | It’s the last day of the month, team, and the last chance to hit our November fundraising goal before midnight tonight. I know, we talk about deadlines a lot. But the truth is that these deadlines matter. Every goal we hit means we’re stronger heading into 2026. Every grassroots donor who chips in sends a message that we’re not backing down from the fights ahead, that we’re serious about electing leaders who will restore our fundamental freedoms and bring down costs. And I want to be clear. I don’t take your support for granted. Any of it. This team is the reason I’ve been able to get so much done for the people of Michigan, and why we’re going to keep pushing for more: a cleaner environment, better schools, safer communities, and a government that works for people. But we only get there together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I’ll be honest. I know how much folks are juggling right now. And I know what it means when someone steps up with a few dollars to keep this work moving. So thank you, truly, for being in the fight with me. — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. clean_body: GOP counting on California giving up | = | We won’t beat around the bush. Tonight at midnight is our first End of Month fundraising deadline since Proposition 50 passed, and we are still $4,370.73 away from our goal. We won a stunning victory with Prop 50. And we know so many of you stepped up and donated, volunteered, or voted to make that happen. We are so grateful! But the goal of Prop 50 was to keep Democrats in the fight for the U.S. House. So, if we can’t fund the organizing that’ll ultimately flip seats from red to blue, we could end up snatching defeat out of the jaws of victory. = = Here’s the blunt reality: If Republicans see our fundraising drying up as we are busy celebrating the Prop 50 win, they will know we don’t have the energy or passion to keep going. They will strike back in California, and even the new maps won’t save us from the deluge of dark money and misleading attacks. That’s why we are aiming to keep our organizing programs going from now all the way through Election Day 2026. But we can only do that if we hit this key End of Month goal. = = = = = = Thank you, \- CADEM HQ | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. body:
| | | Election season isn’t over yet, Peter. This Tuesday, WFP champions are facing runoff elections across the country that will make a real difference in voters’ lives. **We’re about to give you a rundown of some of our top races to watch, but first:[Can you split a donation between 8 amazing WFP champions who need your support before Tuesday’s elections?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtEJ42kOSl7Ici2OLAKDIx4Bd6jv6vwnaIyBzq1nuOujQ_8QD0Uuf-qJilfJIkakbRseTIkPyBn9SIJ4hYNWU42SjPb_VflhWhDwmMrAfvbFdqB0V-_y-cve78jF0n1M2sjAugr4vHHode_zT9P-euAga8bI2FYVDLEa4mDRvuWkIXf7ThaM8TyzibcDdo1SSrLSQAoprJDffCoQOoimbKfyaQ1Yja-aQNWmJ3hScqG2uYVRTXvZ84r621VxJsSb5NpFz3xLsR3zxJMZU-HPg31zDX4zICz_YYtN1qiB4aBca72VlFiyzTS7-REj26tlQytLG1zrbLElSd9lhQ1Y63d3ofWK0gvDrlAQkCgtf3Z7Q/4m2/rhExgQ1eRZC8rLo5Muj9cw/h0/h001.tP9fnHeVFLpMgdb5V4pbs-orKnjITLU34MWV6jUauEA)** **[Split a donation to WFP champions](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtEJ42kOSl7Ici2OLAKDIx4Bd6jv6vwnaIyBzq1nuOujQ_8QD0Uuf-qJilfJIkakbRseTIkPyBn9SIJ4hYNWU42Ghd_UjeOMPGIHgu392PrVIf0L9F_83WhB8LDwimirNiEhn6iqADJEQ3V5pO-lM1e17523QKfbwtLTmBI1H82oahfGG_w9rwYWQnSwEO4NgZBHw5xQec1P8_yxsJibsYBh6OYDiPU375lTABxgW5SODoUKYNsEfd5DJlnPvGtV5FJ1gM4p2u9nkQmrsAznCElCUvqb6fcvJOjrFdv6otoQg-eCEPa65oH-4dX5H-OAVcWbcPrjj5y0lj2lKOvWEcuTjtRgWdY8Jz3UlUeEpf2aQ/4m2/rhExgQ1eRZC8rLo5Muj9cw/h1/h001.jPsmIb5rg5KiVoroPNZ7KuenmjPJ9S-lpCvaSwgA9gs)** A quick run-through of what’s at stake on Tuesday:
* On Election Day, **Jersey City voters will be electing a new mayor for the first time in 12 years, and NJWFP is all in for James Solomon,** who’s spent the last 7 years fighting for affordable housing, good public schools, and more as a City Councilmember.
* Two **Jersey City Council seats** are also having runoff elections on December 2 — and we’re working to build power on the council by **electing 20-year labor organizer Joel Brooks to Ward B and tenant organizer and teacher Jake Ephros to Ward D.**
* We’re aiming to **build on the four-member WFP-endorsed bloc in the Atlanta City Council by electing Nate Jester** in the runoff election.
* Also in Atlanta, community organizer **Royce Mann is running to join the Atlanta Public Schools Board of Education.** At just 24 years old, Royce is a recent graduate of the very schools he’s running to defend and improve.
* **Dontaye Carter is running against a 12-year Republican incumbent for Mayor of Sandy Springs, Georgia.** He’s fighting to increase government transparency, provide affordable housing, and build a city where no one is left behind.
* Facing runoffs for the **Albuquerque City Council, WFP champions Stephanie Telles and Teresa Garcia** would join current WFP-backed City Council members, to amplify workers’ voices.

**With just 2 days to go until the December 2 runoff elections, each of these candidates needs your support to help spread their messages to voters and reshape our local governments for the better.** name: Andy (personal)
subject: A month of gratitude.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter,

I want to start this email off with a thank you. November is a month of gratitude, and there's truly not enough gratitude I could express to this grassroots team.

Because of you, we've made an incredible impact in elections this year. From the Wisconsin Supreme Court race to statewide elections across the country, your support has allowed my In This Together PAC team to boost strong candidates to victory. That's no small feat.

We have a lot to look forward to in 2026 as well: House and Senate races that could flip majority control of Congress back to Democrats, gubernatorial races that could make a lasting impact on so many Americans, and local elections and amendments that could change lives for the better. I'm excited for what's to come, and I hope you are, too.

As we close the books on November, we need to raise a little more to stay on track for the year and ensure In This Together PAC can continue to help these for-the-people leaders win next November. Can I count on your help to make that happen?

You can go ahead and make a donation here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/itt-q4-2025?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120307768/585871388/1089852515?refcode=em25_251130_eom3_fndd_gq_act___andypers_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251130_eom3_fndd_gq_act___andypers_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=577db837-4bce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode2=577db837-4bce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTc3ZGI4MzctNGJjZS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VWs3W0kImHMpqx2r2_wVXxWcZYSJgXjJ0kIYF-7R86c=)**

Thank you immensely for everything you do,

Andy

clean_body: Peter, I want to start this email off with a thank you. November is a month of gratitude, and there's truly not enough gratitude I could express to this grassroots team. Because of you, we've made an incredible impact in elections this year. From the Wisconsin Supreme Court race to statewide elections across the country, your support has allowed my In This Together PAC team to boost strong candidates to victory. That's no small feat. We have a lot to look forward to in 2026 as well: House and Senate races that could flip majority control of Congress back to Democrats, gubernatorial races that could make a lasting impact on so many Americans, and local elections and amendments that could change lives for the better. I'm excited for what's to come, and I hope you are, too. As we close the books on November, we need to raise a little more to stay on track for the year and ensure In This Together PAC can continue to help these for-the-people leaders win next November. Can I count on your help to make that happen? You can go ahead and make a donation here: = Thank you immensely for everything you do, Andy | Paid for by In This Together PAC. InThisTogetherPAC.com. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to In This Together PAC are not tax deductible. In This Together PO Box 5822 Louisville, KY 40255 United States

body:
I need your support.
| | | It's Senator Schumer. This is a long email -- but because of how much is at stake, _you need to know it all._

**If you can't read the whole thing, I'll cut to the chase:**

**[The GOP wants to use their majority to implement ALL of Trump's most extreme policy goals. I wish I was exaggerating, but I'm not. So please, will you chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ before tonight's end-of-month deadline to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22278?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251130-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251130-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=21855%2E9716520%2EWBZ1GE)**

_Here are the three most important things you need to know:_

**SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE WORKING HAND-IN-HAND WITH TRUMP TO PASS HIS PLANS INTO LAW.**

Now that they have the majority, they're doing whatever it takes to cater to Trump's desires -- even if it means cutting key programs like Medicaid and Social Security!

_It gets worse:_

**EXPERTS ARE SAYING TAKING THE SENATE BACK WILL BE TOUGH.**

If we want to stop Trump's agenda, we'll NEED to take back the Senate -- but the analysts are saying it'll be an uphill battle. Factor in the Republican megadonors willing to spend hundreds of millions to keep the Senate red, and it's clear we won't have much margin for error.

_As a result:_

**WE'LL NEED ALL HANDS ON DECK TO DEFY THE ODDS AND TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY!**

It'll be a tough fight, but I know it can be done. We can only beat the odds if grassroots Democrats like you step up. **So please:**

**[We _NEED_ to fight back and act with urgency, so before today's end-of-month deadline, will you give $5 _(becomes $15!)_ to win back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22278?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251130-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251130-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=21855%2E9716520%2EWBZ1GE)**

name: Brad Finstad
subject: I need your help before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Friend, We’re up against our final End-of-Month deadline before the Christmas season hits, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. National Democrats have already signaled they’re coming after this seat with everything they’ve got — and if we fall short tonight, we’ll be starting December at a serious disadvantage. I’m working every day to keep southern Minnesota’s voice strong in Congress. That means protecting our farmers, defending our communities, and fighting the extreme policies Washington keeps trying to force on us. But to stay competitive heading into the final stretch of the year, I need to show real grassroots strength before midnight. If you can chip in tonight — even $15 — it will make an immediate impact.
---
| | [Donate Before Midnight! →](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| This district is always a Democrat target. Every quarter, every deadline, every report matters. And tonight is one of the most important we’ve had all year. Thank you for standing with me and helping us finish November strong. — Brad

Friends,

Blue Friday ends at midnight, and I'm asking you -- directly -- to stand with us before the clock hits 11:59.

Because of the _moment_.

And if you're here reading this, it's because you know how high the stakes are.
You know how rare real independence is.
And you know why this work matters.
Tonight, you can help power it.
**[75% off-- $19.99 for the entire year.](https://substack.com/redirect/834868ab-a4f5-4062-b51b-7bca873bd74a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Let's finish this strong.
-- Cliff

name: Jena G.
subject: final thoughts on November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Peter –
This month has been incredible – and we couldn’t have gotten to where we are without your support. Just a few weeks ago, we announced that our campaign in the AG race had received the most donations from Coloradans. One thing is abundantly clear: we have grassroots power behind us.
That’s how I know we have what it takes to win. But we can’t take our foot off the gas now. We need to finish each and every month with as much strength as possible.
So, before tonight’s deadline, can you chip in to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251130-email]
We have monthly finance goals to make sure that we raise what is needed to organize this state and win the race. This is a must-win race, at a time when Trump is trying to grab power.
Thank you for being on our team, Peter. And thank you for all of your support!
Jena G.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’m grateful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9252%2E5257348%2EvJovDn)
Derek,
Just a quick note to tell you how much I appreciate everything you’ve done for me, and to ask if I can count on your support once again.
Derek, please know that when I ask you to chip in, I don't expect you to give every time. Just having you on my team, reading emails like this, means so much.
[DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251130_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=9252%2E5257348%2EvJovDn)

That’s especially true when Trump and his administration attack me. Especially when they invoke my name and threaten to go after me. Especially when the troves of MAGA followers amplify the president's false smears and attacks.
I can’t tell you how much it means to know you have my back.
**[So if you're able to, will you chip in to my campaign before our deadline at midnight tonight? If you can't, no worries. Just being on this team is enough.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251130_PM2_V1_S1&t=5&akid=9252%2E5257348%2EvJovDn)**

name: GOTV PAC
subject: You told us not to ignore this race, and we’re glad you did.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Earlier this month, GOTV PAC only stepped into the TN-7 special election because supporters like you told us to.
When this seat opened, every D.C. insider dismissed it as unwinnable, but our community (You) told us: Don’t ignore this district.
So we listened, and now a new Emerson College Poll shows the race unexpectedly close.
We don’t know what will happen Tuesday, it's still a long shot, but here's what we also know: If we cut Donald Trump’s 22-point 2024 margin in half, it will send shockwaves heading into 2026. It will prove that rural voters in places like TN-7 are moving.
That’s why we’re pouring everything we have into turnout before this Tuesday, but these last days are expensive, and we need help to keep going.
Can you rush $15 to power the final voter outreach before Election Day? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11302025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11302025]
Whatever happens Tuesday, let’s make sure this race is one the country can’t ignore.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11302025]
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I never had the means to self-fund a campaign, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Hi, it’s Deb.
Hi Peter, Deb Haaland here.
The end of 2025 is quickly approaching and everyone — _including National Republicans eying this race_ — is watching to see if we have the grassroots power it’ll take to win.
So I want to personally reach out to you, the individuals who power this race, to share some notes I jotted down about what your grassroots support means to me. **[But before you read it, Peter, will you chip in $10 — or more — to be split between my campaign and Heartland Patriots?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97872?refcode=em20251130-9776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9776%2E614464%2EXLRAjb)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Deb Haaland and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97873?refcode=em20251130-9776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9776%2E614464%2EXLRAjb) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97873?refcode=em20251130-9776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=9776%2E614464%2EXLRAjb) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97873?refcode=em20251130-9776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9776%2E614464%2EXLRAjb) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97873?refcode=em20251130-9776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9776%2E614464%2EXLRAjb) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97873?refcode=em20251130-9776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9776%2E614464%2EXLRAjb) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97873?refcode=em20251130-9776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9776%2E614464%2EXLRAjb) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97872?refcode=em20251130-9776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9776%2E614464%2EXLRAjb)

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I really hate to ask again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I know you’ve heard a lot from my team and me
#
Hi, I know you’ve heard from my team and me a lot lately, so I really hate to ask again — but if you’re able, [**can I put you down for a donation of $5 or any amount in support of our campaign before midnight?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251130-2.HSD8aO&refcode=em20251130-2545&amount=5&t=1&akid=2545%2E21716%2EK_NUKw)
With just a few hours left in November, we’re still $5,500 short of our goal. Our public end-of-year report is just weeks away, and I’m up for re-election next year. **We cannot give MAGA Republicans any reason to claim we’re losing grassroots support.****[So please, chip in before time runs out.](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251130-2.HSD8aO&refcode=em20251130-2545&amount=5&t=2&akid=2545%2E21716%2EK_NUKw)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251130-2.HSD8aO&amount=5&refcode=em20251130-2545&t=21&akid=2545%2E21716%2EK_NUKw)**
Thanks for sticking with me,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251130-2&t=22&refcode2=2545_21716_K_NUKw&akid=2545%2E21716%2EK_NUKw)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=2545%2E21716%2EK_NUKw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=24&akid=2545%2E21716%2EK_NUKw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2545%2E21716%2EK_NUKw)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

Peter,
I’m reaching out personally because we’re just hours away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline and we’re still $3,850 short of our goal. I waited as long as I could to send this, but I couldn’t wait any longer.
If we don’t close this gap tonight, I won’t be able to greenlight our field organizing, Latino outreach, and digital ads. That is the worst case scenario.
[_**Every dollar matters in these final hours. We just made one of the toughest decisions of this entire cycle.
We just made one of the toughest decisions of this entire cycle. After reviewing the latest polling and GOP spending reports, our team made the call [_to drastically expand our candidate support between now and the end of the year._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120308455/585894996/-510661250?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.30_Tough-Decision_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjkxN2MxNC01MWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QEaYhlMgVHxoSUne-0Zm8TZEBMgFzE4izEWHXpZtHs=) The stakes are too high for us to be modest in our support. We need to give EVERYTHING we have to make sure we flip the Senate next year and kick out all of Trump’s MAGA friends. **We know it’s asking a lot. But we need all the help we can get to raise an extra $30,000 today so we can send support to our Democratic candidates — from Maine to Texas to Ohio.** This goal will help them fund digital ads and build organizing programs in their states all the way up until next November. body:
Democracy Docket: New Ruling Cuts Off Key Tool to Protect Minority Voters| | |
---
**Voters desperately need a "_private right to action_ " to protect their rights.** All that phrase means is that we, the people, can bring forward a lawsuit ourselves when we see wrongdoing in our elections. **These 8th Circuit decisions strip us of that** \-- in a world where most legal action around voting rights comes from groups like ours and our partners, not from the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ). And we've got at least these four years of DOJ's Civil Rights division facing internal attacks from a hostile presidential administration that doesn't just believe conspiracy theories, but spreads them. **[There's so much at risk, Team. | | Folks: An update from the federal 8th Circuit on**one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years**. A federal appeals court recently cut off a key avenue for private groups and individuals to bring racial discrimination claims under the Voting Rights Act (VRA). The ruling, which applies in seven states, further weakens the ability of our civil rights law to protect voters, and could lead to the Supreme Court settling the issue. This goes back to an initial ruling from 2023, the impact of which is pretty simple to understand: That voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, and now confirmed on appeal, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws. With former Florida AG Pam Bondi -- a "big lie" spreading MAGA acolyte -- serving as Attorney General, **it's clear that the DOJ is not going to protect voting rights over the next four years.** **[Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120308862/585896564/-1725532854?refcode=113025_4&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkYzY5MTNhLTUxY2UtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rj4xyyU6QlaxCNatsQ4TqrCa8QwLj7_EwJRmQhrmBx0=)**

clean_body: Democracy Docket: New Ruling Cuts Off Key Tool to Protect Minority Voters| | | Voters desperately need a "private right to action " to protect their rights. All that phrase means is that we, the people, can bring forward a lawsuit ourselves when we see wrongdoing in our elections. These 8th Circuit decisions strip us of that \-- in a world where most legal action around voting rights comes from groups like ours and our partners, not from the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ). And we've got at least these four years of DOJ's Civil Rights division facing internal attacks from a hostile presidential administration that doesn't just believe conspiracy theories, but spreads them. = | = | | Folks: An update from the federal 8th Circuit onone of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years. A federal appeals court recently cut off a key avenue for private groups and individuals to bring racial discrimination claims under the Voting Rights Act (VRA). The ruling, which applies in seven states, further weakens the ability of our civil rights law to protect voters, and could lead to the Supreme Court settling the issue. This goes back to an initial ruling from 2023, the impact of which is pretty simple to understand: That voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, and now confirmed on appeal, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws. With former Florida AG Pam Bondi -- a "big lie" spreading MAGA acolyte -- serving as Attorney General, it's clear that the DOJ is not going to protect voting rights over the next four years. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | | This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling. We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this new appellate ruling is not overturned by the Supreme Court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand. Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone. = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILYs List
subject: We’ve done it before, and we’ll do it again.
body:
Here's my prescription, Peter: Turn your heartbreak into action. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120309002/585897108/-1510725204?refcode=WUEFEK80_20251130_ERMCloser_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057381&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTE0NmY0Ny01MWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZJCp-86jCMZuAy3P4AbYYrgK07VVhV7d4DuNQyS26XI=) Dear Peter,

When we started EMILYs List 40 years ago, we had a dream: that if we helped women gain political power, they would change the world. And they have.

But let me be honest with you — this dream didn’t start with optimism. It started with anger. We were _pissed off_. We were sick of the old boys’ club ignoring women candidates and shutting us out of power. So in 1985, we built something different: a network of people who believed in the power of early money, bold strategy, and big dreams.

Now we’re facing a very different kind of fight — a nightmare, really. Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are hell-bent on tearing down our democracy, brick by brick. Every headline is more devastating than the last — and every day brings a fresh round of rage, fear, and heartbreak.

[**So here's my prescription, Peter:_Turn that heartbreak into action._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120309003/585897136/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEK80_20251130_ERMCloser_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057381&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTE0NmY0Ny01MWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZJCp-86jCMZuAy3P4AbYYrgK07VVhV7d4DuNQyS26XI=) | [DONATE TO HELP WOMEN WIN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120309004/585897137/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEK80_20251130_ERMCloser_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057381&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTE0NmY0Ny01MWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZJCp-86jCMZuAy3P4AbYYrgK07VVhV7d4DuNQyS26XI=)
---
Every time Trump makes you scream at the TV, throw $10 in your cookie jar. Every time you want to cry, or can’t believe what you’re reading, add another $10. And at the end of the month? Send the contents of that jar to EMILYs List, and we'll put it straight to work making change.

Here's how:

We’re going to **send a shockwave through MAGA world** by helping Democratic pro-choice women win in 2026 — from local legislative races, to state court seats, to taking back the U.S. House.

We’ll deliver so many victories that Republicans will have no choice but to face the truth: that they’ve lost the support of voters, that Donald Trump is a failed leader, and that unless they take action to stop him, they too will suffer grave political consequences. We want wins so big this cycle that they'll isolate Trump, block his dangerous agenda, and begin to rebuild our democracy. And with your cookie-jar support, I am absolutely sure we can do it.

This plan is already underway, Peter. We're already recruiting incredible candidates. We're training staff. We're reaching out to voters. And yes, we're raising the early money that will help women WIN in the weeks, months, and years ahead.

But we can't do any of it without you.

This is the strategy. This is the moment. And this is your call to act — not just once, but _every time_ it feels like too much. Because if we act together, we _will_ win.

[**So, Peter, please chip in toward our November End-of-Month goal to help build the most important political turnaround of our lifetimes — we need to raise $20,000 before midnight, and we can’t do it without your help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120309005/585897138/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEK80_20251130_ERMCloser_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057381&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTE0NmY0Ny01MWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZJCp-86jCMZuAy3P4AbYYrgK07VVhV7d4DuNQyS26XI=)

clean_body: Here's my prescription, Peter: Turn your heartbreak into action. | = Dear Peter, When we started EMILYs List 40 years ago, we had a dream: that if we helped women gain political power, they would change the world. And they have. But let me be honest with you — this dream didn’t start with optimism. It started with anger. We were pissed off. We were sick of the old boys’ club ignoring women candidates and shutting us out of power. So in 1985, we built something different: a network of people who believed in the power of early money, bold strategy, and big dreams. Now we’re facing a very different kind of fight — a nightmare, really. Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are hell-bent on tearing down our democracy, brick by brick. Every headline is more devastating than the last — and every day brings a fresh round of rage, fear, and heartbreak. = | = Every time Trump makes you scream at the TV, throw $10 in your cookie jar. Every time you want to cry, or can’t believe what you’re reading, add another $10. And at the end of the month? Send the contents of that jar to EMILYs List, and we'll put it straight to work making change. Here's how: We’re going to send a shockwave through MAGA world by helping Democratic pro-choice women win in 2026 — from local legislative races, to state court seats, to taking back the U.S. House. We’ll deliver so many victories that Republicans will have no choice but to face the truth: that they’ve lost the support of voters, that Donald Trump is a failed leader, and that unless they take action to stop him, they too will suffer grave political consequences. We want wins so big this cycle that they'll isolate Trump, block his dangerous agenda, and begin to rebuild our democracy. And with your cookie-jar support, I am absolutely sure we can do it. This plan is already underway, Peter. We're already recruiting incredible candidates. We're training staff. We're reaching out to voters. And yes, we're raising the early money that will help women WIN in the weeks, months, and years ahead. But we can't do any of it without you. This is the strategy. This is the moment. And this is your call to act — not just once, but every time it feels like too much. Because if we act together, we will win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With determination and gratitude, Ellen R. Malcolm Founder and Chair Emerita, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

This is the last time I’ll ask for your donation in November.
**We’re just $2,436 short of our goal.**
With your help we can close the gap and hit our goal before our deadline at midnight.
Every grassroots donation makes a difference. It shows this campaign is powered by people, not corporate special interests. Each gift helps us show we’ve got the momentum to beat my opponent, John Sununu.

— Chris

subject: Reaching out one final time

body:
Don’t let our hard-earned progress go to waste

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120309102/585898883/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTIzY2ZjYS01MWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LjYnUyZ9amvdGJa45Rk2o_D2zMlreV9E7XCpFcZPwIY=)

We’re reaching out one final time before our critical end-of-month deadline at midnight tonight! We know you're busy so we’ll make this super quick.

**Due to the holiday weekend, our fundraising has slowed down and if we don’t turn things around we could miss our goal.**

I need you with me before midnight.

| | | | |

| | Derek,

**I’ll get right to it.**
We’re staring down a major fundraising deadline tonight, and every number we report will be scrutinized by the media, by the Democrats, and by anyone wondering whether conservatives in New Hampshire are serious about holding the line.
I intend to prove that we are.
But I can’t do it alone.
By midnight, I need to show we’ve got the resources to:
* Protect our conservative majority
* Back our candidates with real ground game and advertising
* Push back when the left tries to raise taxes, grow government, and undermine parents

[To do that, we’ve set an aggressive goal of $4000 before midnight. As of this email, we’re still $654 short.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/1/0100019ad77fd77e-4af52418-fe2e-4b2f-9ea9-8f142caf8a4f-000000/8ESoj6daI2Gs93BB7YX-t3F2M5c=453)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 11/30/2025
body:
A Dangerous Message From Rep. Jason Crow
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sfj3bde48dc)
---
**November 30, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Hey friends — Team RMV here.
🦃 As we close out Thanksgiving week, we just want to say how grateful we are for each of you. RMV isn’t just a news outlet — it’s a community determined to save Colorado. And every time you read, share, or support our work, you help make that mission possible.

Now onto the news. This week, a story broke that should have every Coloradan paying attention — whether you’re Republican, Democrat, independent, military, civilian, or somewhere in between. It centered entirely around one man: **Congressman Jason Crow.**
What began as a single video quietly posted online erupted into a national firestorm, a wave of public backlash, a presidential response, and now a federal investigation. And through it all, one question keeps echoing across Colorado:
What exactly is Jason Crow doing — and why now?
_**Here’s what unfolded.**_ It started with a one-and-a-half-minute video [featuring six Democratic lawmakers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s1s77e20ba1) with military and intelligence backgrounds telling active-duty troops to “refuse unlawful orders”. The message sounded noble, even patriotic, at first glance. But the lawmakers — including Colorado’s Crow — refused to define what an “unlawful order” even means.
That vagueness is the point. Because when an elected official, especially a former Army Ranger, tells the military to consider [disobeying orders without legal clarity,](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/scpefdbc191) he isn’t defending the Constitution. He’s undermining it.
Countries aren’t destabilized overnight. They unravel when insiders — people with prestige, experience, credibility — start seeding doubt inside the institutions meant to remain steady. Trust erodes. Lines blur. Division grows. And Jason Crow knows exactly how sensitive the military chain of command is.
The situation escalated immediately. [President Trump responded forcefully](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3v062765fd), calling the lawmakers’ message “seditious” and “punishable by death,” and demanding answers. Media outlets pressed Crow’s office for clarification, but he offered none — sidestepping questions about whether this could fracture the ranks or create real-world chaos among service members.
Then came the next shockwave:
The Pentagon confirmed it was reviewing Sen. Mark Kelly, one of the lawmakers in the video, for [potential violations of military law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3na64d397b) — and the FBI contacted all six members of Congress, including Crow, to schedule interviews regarding the incident.
In their joint statement, Crow and the others tried to frame the inquiry as “intimidation,” but the facts speak for themselves. This wasn’t a fringe outburst or a harmless political message. It was serious enough to trigger attention from the Defense Department, federal investigators, and the national security community.
_**So where does that leave Colorado?**_ Crow doesn’t represent a far-left coast. **He represents Aurora, Centennial, Littleton —[the communities that decide where this state swings](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sfr5315124a).** He’s not an amateur. He’s not confused. He’s not new to power. He’s a highly trained former Ranger who understands the chain of command intimately. And he chose to publicly send a message that can only destabilize it.
Colorado is already dealing with mistrust in elections, public safety crises, and institutional strain. The last thing this state needs is for one of its own congressmen to throw the military — our last apolitical institution — into the center of partisan turbulence.
If Crow had real constitutional concerns, he had countless channels to address them privately and responsibly. Instead, he took it public. He took it political. And now he’s taking the state — and the country — into territory no responsible leader should ever set foot in.
Crow can still explain himself. He can clarify the orders he was referring to, define who determines legality, or articulate why a public video was necessary. [So far, he hasn’t.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s0vdd299d2b)
And until he does, Colorado has every right to ask: What exactly is Jason Crow playing at? And who benefits from the doubt he’s injecting into the ranks?
**!!️ Read Heidi Ganahl's full commentary _"Jason Crow Is Playing With Fire — And Colorado Should Be Asking Why_ " [here.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s1i4d4f81c8) **
— Team RMV
---
| | |
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[PERA Payments on the Chopping Block as Polis Seeks Short-Term Budget Relief](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sal1d5d76c8)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/savab6516bf)**[THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sbne9f2625a) Colorado Gov. Jared Polis has proposed cutting the state’s contributions to the public pension by as much as $38 million next year to help cover the cost of employee raises owed under the state’s collective bargaining agreement.
**[Phil Weiser’s Failed Experiment in Criminal Justice](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s9j0b32a152)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/san7425402b)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s1j99dbf753) _It has become a common theme in many states and cities that the authorities who are responsible for the long-term safety and security of their residents, nevertheless subscribe to the popular fallacy that locking up criminals does little to deter future offenses and is less effective in the long run that social programs or rehabilitation efforts, however those might be defined._

**[Colorado Does Not Need More Candidates. Colorado Needs a Future.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3pca77d800)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/seh8cef1352)** BY SEAN POND, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8vdccc28ba) _Colorado is at a crossroads, and everyone living here can feel it. The cost of living has exploded. Families are working harder than ever yet falling further behind. Housing has slipped out of reach. Power bills climb. Groceries drain budgets. Fuel prices punish long commutes. Child care costs rival mortgages. Communities wonder how long they can stay in the state they love._

|
---
**STATE**
**[Tina Peters Placed in Solitary as Officials Warn Polis Against Federal Intervention](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s7l66fbca7e)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s4h432a3f4d)**[THE GATEWAY PUNDIT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8lada7c28d) In a disturbing update shared on X, the official account for 70-year-old Gold Star mother Tina Peters announced that she has been transferred to solitary confinement in the Colorado prison where she has been held for the past year.

**[Stop Financing the Second Job](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/seu3764f7ac)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s5s25e5d8b7)** BY CHRISTIAN HORSTMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3kb5d4648e) _We’ve been told for years that homeschooling is impossible because “you can’t make it on one income.” But when families pencil out the math, a different picture appears: the second paycheck often pays for the costs created by the second job: child care first, then commuting, meals out, and the “time savers” that keep the overbooked household afloat. On paper, it looks like gain. In reality, it’s a trade._
__
**[Colorado’s Political Culture Is Driving Out Its Best Leaders](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s5r1c31fcb7)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sfg358665ac)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/seh5953659b) _Colorado is experiencing a political decline that follows the core patterns described in political ponerology. The system rewards the wrong traits, punishes integrity, and produces outcomes that push capable people away from public service – fast and hard. You can see this in the culture that governs candidate recruitment, party operations, legislative priorities, and internal accountability._
__
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sav807f4e8e)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Colorado’s clash with federal law: Why Tina Peters’ case poses a Supreme Court question](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sfg559ca016)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s0ib4a9eb06)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sbha426b1e7) _What began as a state prosecution of former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters now sits at the junction of presidential pardon pertaining to federal election law and state authority. Colorado barred key evidence from the jury, sealed portions of the grand jury record, then fought to keep those materials from appellate review._
__
**[Jason Crow Is Playing With Fire — And Colorado Should Be Asking Why](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/seq40dfdeaf)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sal3ea60ece)** BY HEIDI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s2g2709b478) _When a sitting United States Congressman tells the military to prepare to disobey orders, that’s not politics. That’s not oversight. That is the first brick in the road to a color revolution — and Colorado’s own Jason Crow is laying it proudly._
__
**[Tyson Plant Closure Leaves Nebraska Town Bracing for Economic Shock](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sdod14bd77a)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3q753397fe)**[FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s2o50366321) Tyson Foods’ decision to close a beef plant that employs nearly one third of residents of Lexington, Nebraska, could devastate the small city and undermine the profits of ranchers nationwide. Closing a single slaughterhouse might not seem significant, but the Lexington plant employs roughly 3,200 people in the city of 11,000 and has the capacity to slaughter some 5,000 head of cattle a day.
_**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s4ke538c963)**_
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Trying to move the needle in Mesa County’s mental health crisis as leaders call the moment “historic”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s1i5a59b514)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s4r3e0bbd83)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s1p8aefe5f1) Suicide now claims about 50 lives a year in Mesa County, a rate of roughly 31 deaths per 100,000 people. That’s about one and a half times Colorado’s rate and more than double the national average. At the same time, nearly 13 percent of residents who needed mental-health care last year weren’t able to get it.
__
**[Colorado Parents Sue After Daughter Placed in Same Bed as Biological Male Student on School Trip](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sco8b022348)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/scg6a07b3e5)**[FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sesbb7169b6) Several Colorado parents are suing their local school district after an overnight school trip allegedly tried to place a transgender-identifying male student in a hotel room — and ultimately the same bed — with an 11-year-old girl.
__
**[Audit Raises Questions Over DPS Debt Practices As Taxpayers Foot the Bill](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s0te6720927)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s2ue6ccd8e1)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3qf951f2c5) Denver Public Schools is operating with a negative net position — owing more in long-term obligations than it holds in assets — a rare and troubling financial posture for a major Colorado school district, according to an audit.

**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s2i01b19d23)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Colorado needs an all‐of‐the‐above energy strategy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sfs74e74b62)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sch9f788c30)** BY REP. RYAN GONZALEZ, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/saq5645ab6c) _As we all know, energy is vital in policy making. If we have no secure energy sector, uncertainty will ensue. While there are different views on energy policy, we must not rule out any single source of energy (like fossil fuels) for a clean environment that also secures our demand to provide for our consumers._
__
**[Thanksgiving prices fall in Colorado but families still pay more than most Americans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8l7384845a)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s5p67f2431b)** BY SHAINA COLE,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sek70193766) _This Thanksgiving, the cost of celebrating for Colorado families is at its lowest since the peak in 2022. The American Farm Bureau Federation reports that a traditional Thanksgiving dinner for ten now costs $55.18 – a five percent decline from last year._
__

**[Colorado Cannot Afford to Leave Its Pioneering Communities Behind](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sav8bbef4d9)** BY TIFFANY DICKENSON,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s4haabc3c54) _Colorado was built by pioneers. That pioneering spirit still defines the rural communities that grow our food, produce our energy, protect our water, and carry the transportation and natural resource backbone of this state._

**[The real Thanksgiving story still matters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8kf3a9b77e)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/scle6cc25d4) _Every November, we reach for the familiar version of Thanksgiving—the one with corn, a moment of goodwill between cultures and a picture of exhausted settlers saved by generous neighbors. There’s some truth in that telling, but only a sliver of the real thing. The actual history is rougher, more straightforward and far more connected to the country we’ve become._

**[Standing Firm — The Full Armor of God](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s6r3ee45adf)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sbj762bd2d1)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sdifc38db4c) _There’s a moment in every spiritual battle when you realize that the goal isn’t to fight harder—it’s to stand stronger. When Paul wrote, “after you have done everything, to stand,” he wasn’t calling for passive endurance; he was calling for a posture of steadfast faith, hope, and perseverance— anchored, alert, and armored in Christ. Your faith is the rock on which you stand, unwavering and secure._
__
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/scg8c1875e2)**
|

clean_body: A Dangerous Message From Rep. Jason Crow | | | | November 30, 2025 SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST | | Hey friends — Team RMV here. 🦃 As we close out Thanksgiving week, we just want to say how grateful we are for each of you. RMV isn’t just a news outlet — it’s a community determined to save Colorado. And every time you read, share, or support our work, you help make that mission possible. Now onto the news. This week, a story broke that should have every Coloradan paying attention — whether you’re Republican, Democrat, independent, military, civilian, or somewhere in between. It centered entirely around one man: Congressman Jason Crow. What began as a single video quietly posted online erupted into a national firestorm, a wave of public backlash, a presidential response, and now a federal investigation. And through it all, one question keeps echoing across Colorado: What exactly is Jason Crow doing — and why now? Here’s what unfolded. It started with a one-and-a-half-minute video with military and intelligence backgrounds telling active-duty troops to “refuse unlawful orders”. The message sounded noble, even patriotic, at first glance. But the lawmakers — including Colorado’s Crow — refused to define what an “unlawful order” even means. That vagueness is the point. Because when an elected official, especially a former Army Ranger, tells the military to consider he isn’t defending the Constitution. He’s undermining it. Countries aren’t destabilized overnight. They unravel when insiders — people with prestige, experience, credibility — start seeding doubt inside the institutions meant to remain steady. Trust erodes. Lines blur. Division grows. And Jason Crow knows exactly how sensitive the military chain of command is. The situation escalated immediately. , calling the lawmakers’ message “seditious” and “punishable by death,” and demanding answers. Media outlets pressed Crow’s office for clarification, but he offered none — sidestepping questions about whether this could fracture the ranks or create real-world chaos among service members. Then came the next shockwave: The Pentagon confirmed it was reviewing Sen. Mark Kelly, one of the lawmakers in the video, for — and the FBI contacted all six members of Congress, including Crow, to schedule interviews regarding the incident. In their joint statement, Crow and the others tried to frame the inquiry as “intimidation,” but the facts speak for themselves. This wasn’t a fringe outburst or a harmless political message. It was serious enough to trigger attention from the Defense Department, federal investigators, and the national security community. So where does that leave Colorado? Crow doesn’t represent a far-left coast. He represents Aurora, Centennial, Littleton —. He’s not an amateur. He’s not confused. He’s not new to power. He’s a highly trained former Ranger who understands the chain of command intimately. And he chose to publicly send a message that can only destabilize it. Colorado is already dealing with mistrust in elections, public safety crises, and institutional strain. The last thing this state needs is for one of its own congressmen to throw the military — our last apolitical institution — into the center of partisan turbulence. If Crow had real constitutional concerns, he had countless channels to address them privately and responsibly. Instead, he took it public. He took it political. And now he’s taking the state — and the country — into territory no responsible leader should ever set foot in. Crow can still explain himself. He can clarify the orders he was referring to, define who determines legality, or articulate why a public video was necessary. And until he does, Colorado has every right to ask: What exactly is Jason Crow playing at? And who benefits from the doubt he’s injecting into the ranks? !!️ Read Heidi Ganahl's full commentary "Jason Crow Is Playing With Fire — And Colorado Should Be Asking Why " — Team RMV | | | | | TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK Colorado Gov. movements can beat billionaire-funded politics.

name: Laura Friedman (personal)
subject: Personally reaching out for you
body:
Hi friend -- Laura here.
I wanted to reach out one last time before I logged off for the weekend to thank you for being with us, in good times and bad.
We need leaders in Washington with a proven track record of getting things done for, and with, their community. Your support is key to building a strong base of grassroots support to win this campaign.
We're hoping to close our November with momentum. Can I count on you to use this link to give $3 and help us make up ground?: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q4-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120309426/585906833/-1798313451?refcode=em-11.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmVmOTJmMTAtNTZjZS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YUObx8bNKIVqVUqtdgjZC-Cje5BN0BwckxphFkQkJgw=)**
I don’t love asking for money, but ever since the _Citizens United_ decision, elections have become more expensive and candidate fundraising has become more vital. And that's before this election cycle's turbulence, as Trump tried to redraw maps on the fly before California fought back.
That's why when you give to us, I know it's more meaningful than just a number. Each individual donation sends a message that our community is ready for home-grown leadership in Washington, one battle at a time. To me, grassroots, individual support is everything, and it's why I value your help.
I’d appreciate anything you can contribute to help us meet our goal before November comes to a close.

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Don’t let this be where we fall short
body:
| | Hey Peter – Marie here with a quick update: our numbers are moving, but we still have ground to make up before midnight.

If you’re able, will you pitch in $10 to help us close out the month strong?

[https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/november](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120309503/585907624/-1425100085?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251130_2_10&refcode2=1a1a5562-57ce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTFhNTU2Mi01N2NlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EouqyP7TPkg80ZBB8MoFFkBv5-Aybhk9G6xZtal3Hg8=)

I know this weekend is packed with family, travel, and everything else life throws at us. But if we want to keep WA-03 independent and locally driven, we can’t afford to slip behind now.

name: Derek Tran
subject: one last ask before November ends
body:
Hi friend,

Thanks for opening this message. I know it’s the last day of the month -- and coming off the holiday weekend, I hope you had time to rest, recharge, and enjoy some time with your loved ones.

As we close out November, I want to be honest about what this moment means for our campaign.

The final fundraising sprint of the year begins tomorrow -- and that means national Republicans, super PACs, and dark money groups are already gearing up to make December a show of force.

**We need to meet this moment now, not play catch-up later in the first few months of the critical midterm election year.**

The GOP has made flipping this seat a top priority. We won by just 653 votes in 2024 -- and they think if they pump enough dark money into this district, they can buy it back. They’re not counting on strong ideas or grassroots support. They’re counting on their wallets.

I don’t take a cent from Big Pharma or Big Oil -- and I never will. That means I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to power this campaign.

If you’ve been waiting for the right time to give -- this is it.

Here’s a good link to donate before midnight: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dt-q4-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120309684/585908418/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjFiYjUxYTUtNTljZS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GWBtQS_4wqG3jUhOZ_vVPKaLYBSnVqDqpb2gtocChGs=)**

Thank you,

Derek

* * *
Derek Tran for Congress
10441 Stanford Avenue
#395
Garden Grove, CA 92842
United States

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/3I6agODchUmprbbV4lfW0Q2?unsubscribedata=ckq9ZbDnANmzaWdpCdpzUQiGsMAz1kN%2Fvpv032tpdtVQye01XEOAYxasgfkiKfo5nnLkmDhhfENl5IeRkFqSMWpd0sCt4aqpLSXCyJbl4SWwYhiIldqve9IQzBG0lZaQxbfgtdhbFgIOSAusJ03gQc%2FBmTvureaL%2Bu9uSlY%2Bd38jXzeIqBIykyrPaxqh4Y7AJ6xuwXpVSKR3gtbsomMrikTEdsse8hqzi7BAA45WyLdLRlJ7SRHCJ5MPboDTPVpZMzSHvrlg36eOorSHkBFS5z5ajn66oUh%2B77%2BebAP3Is1mW9bhzbZ8FC%2BX4tthyKfukSmPt5Q0qqYuCFwBY3ziyj%2BVubIrXz7Orfxi8oStrcgTVOSjbpoKRhkkZK62z8FK5SiVC766HXndVHrlm5A6zNJ7VbM7YDFkVH8yllJSHhSD1IUMHNb6zfA0QZ629Nwt)

Jimmy If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States ** **

Haley
|

Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. body:
---
Derek, we’re asking one last time: Can you chip in $7 to the DNC before our end-of-month deadline tonight? $7 because we need to expand the infrastructure that allowed us to win big in 2025 to every state in the country. $7 because submitting a strong fundraising report this month will send a message to Trump and his Republican allies: There is serious opposition to their agenda, and we’re coming for Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. $7 because we know that none of us can make these big changes by ourselves, _but all of us together can_. At the DNC, we’ve spent 2025 organizing across the country, we’ve invested millions in state Democratic parties, and we’ve talked to voters in the bluest of blue and the reddest of red districts to make sure they are hearing Democrats’ message. Derek, we are laying the foundation to win big in 2026. [**So, Derek, will you join the thousands of other grassroots supporters looking to make a change and pitch in $7 to the DNC before our midnight deadline?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251130_5389_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5389_22930333_iklgSB&akid=5389%2E22930333%2EiklgSB) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251130_5389_fr&refcode2=5389_22930333_iklgSB&akid=5389%2E22930333%2EiklgSB)**
---
****

# [On the Eve of Adil's First Birthday](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=180382590&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwMzgyNTkwLCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ1NzQ4OTMsImV4cCI6MTc2NzE2Njg5MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.s4C8Qz-HHbl10niJ4WFrk2FTfHVyv_EhUbQ73TWN2Xs)
### Twenty-five years of evidence, one decisive moment: tomorrow the full record enters the light.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Dec 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/on-the-eve-of-adils-first-birthday?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Tonight, as the clock inches toward midnight, our household sits in a strange, luminous quiet. In just a few hours, our son Adil will be one year old.
His name means **" the one who does justice."**
And somehow -- in the way life sometimes folds into perfect, unmistakable poetry -- tomorrow morning is also the moment we will file the most complete, unfiltered, devastatingly truthful account of his father's 25-year struggle for justice.
Many of you followed the filings we submitted last week: the emergency motions, the declarations, the initial habeas petition, the scramble to correct procedural details, the race to get evidence onto the docket fast enough to match the urgency of Zahid's medical condition. Those were the filings that opened the door.
**Tomorrow 's filing is the one that walks through it.**
Because what lands on the federal judge's desk tomorrow morning is not just a correction or an update.
It is the full record -- the whole truth -- the entire arc of misconduct, discrimination, forged evidence, retaliation, entrapment, lies, and constitutional violations that have stalked this family for 25 years.
It is the tsunami.
The one that does not splash politely against the walls of a system built on contradictions.
The one that does not nibble at the edges of injustice.
The one that does not play the game on the government's terms.
This is the filing that **floods their narrative** --
**shatters their pretenses** --
**obliterates their shallow, fragile, transparent lies** --
and replaces them with what they never expected to confront:
**a complete, irrefutable record of truth.**
A record that shows:
* a disabled U.S. Army veteran,
* who entered this country lawfully,
* who served honorably and suffered permanent injuries,
* who raised two American children,
* who lived in Washington State for 25 years,
* who complied with every immigration process faithfully,
* who endured surveillance, bias, fabricated evidence, and unlawful targeting,
* who was seized in a hallway by masked officers at a citizenship interview,
* and who is now going blind because his own government is withholding the medical care that would save his sight.

It is a record that finally makes sense of all the chaos, all the contradictions, all the things that "didn't add up."
A record that lays bare the truth: **this was never about law.**
This was never about process, merit, or facts.
This was about a decision made long ago by people who abused their authority -- and the 25-year war that followed when one man refused to betray his community, his faith, or his integrity.
And now, at long last, a federal court will see all of it.
Not the fragments.
Not the pieces filtered through ICE or USCIS or the BIA.
The full truth -- _as it actually happened_ -- supported by over 50 exhibits and grounded in constitutional doctrine.
Tonight, on the eve of Adil's birthday, that matters in a way I can barely put into words.
Because tomorrow morning, while most people are making coffee or packing lunches or driving to work, this filing will enter the record with the force of everything this family, this community, and this moment have carried:
* faith,
* endurance,
* love,
* and the unwavering conviction that truth -- when finally allowed to speak -- has its own kind of power.

Whatever happens next, we know this much:
Tomorrow we walk into the courthouse with a document that holds the weight of 25 years.
Tomorrow, our son turns one.
And tomorrow, justice may begin to turn with him.
For that, we say: **alhamdulillah.**
And for all of you who have held us, prayed for us, advocated with us, shown up for us, shared our story, or simply cared --
we are grateful beyond words.
**This is the moment.
This is the filing.
This is the truth.
And insha'Allah, this is the beginning of Zahid's path home.**
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=180382590&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwMzgyNTkwLCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ1NzQ4OTMsImV4cCI6MTc2NzE2Njg5MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.s4C8Qz-HHbl10niJ4WFrk2FTfHVyv_EhUbQ73TWN2Xs)

clean_body: Twenty-five years of evidence, one decisive moment: tomorrow the full record enters the light. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Twenty-five years of evidence, one decisive moment: tomorrow the full record enters the light. | | | Dec 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | Tonight, as the clock inches toward midnight, our household sits in a strange, luminous quiet. In just a few hours, our son Adil will be one year old. His name means " the one who does justice." And somehow -- in the way life sometimes folds into perfect, unmistakable poetry -- tomorrow morning is also the moment we will file the most complete, unfiltered, devastatingly truthful account of his father's 25-year struggle for justice. Many of you followed the filings we submitted last week: the emergency motions, the declarations, the initial habeas petition, the scramble to correct procedural details, the race to get evidence onto the docket fast enough to match the urgency of Zahid's medical condition. Those were the filings that opened the door. Tomorrow 's filing is the one that walks through it. Because what lands on the federal judge's desk tomorrow morning is not just a correction or an update. It is the full record -- the whole truth -- the entire arc of misconduct, discrimination, forged evidence, retaliation, entrapment, lies, and constitutional violations that have stalked this family for 25 years. It is the tsunami. The one that does not splash politely against the walls of a system built on contradictions. The one that does not nibble at the edges of injustice. The one that does not play the game on the government's terms. This is the filing that floods their narrative -- shatters their pretenses -- obliterates their shallow, fragile, transparent lies -- and replaces them with what they never expected to confront: a complete, irrefutable record of truth. A record that shows: a disabled U.S. Army veteran, who entered this country lawfully, who served honorably and suffered permanent injuries, who raised two American children, who lived in Washington State for 25 years, who complied with every immigration process faithfully, who endured surveillance, bias, fabricated evidence, and unlawful targeting, who was seized in a hallway by masked officers at a citizenship interview, and who is now going blind because his own government is withholding the medical care that would save his sight. It is a record that finally makes sense of all the chaos, all the contradictions, all the things that "didn't add up." A record that lays bare the truth: this was never about law. This was never about process, merit, or facts. This was about a decision made long ago by people who abused their authority -- and the 25-year war that followed when one man refused to betray his community, his faith, or his integrity. And now, at long last, a federal court will see all of it. Not the fragments. Not the pieces filtered through ICE or USCIS or the BIA. The full truth -- as it actually happened -- supported by over 50 exhibits and grounded in constitutional doctrine. Tonight, on the eve of Adil's birthday, that matters in a way I can barely put into words. Because tomorrow morning, while most people are making coffee or packing lunches or driving to work, this filing will enter the record with the force of everything this family, this community, and this moment have carried: faith, endurance, love, and the unwavering conviction that truth -- when finally allowed to speak -- has its own kind of power. Whatever happens next, we know this much: Tomorrow we walk into the courthouse with a document that holds the weight of 25 years. Tomorrow, our son turns one. And tomorrow, justice may begin to turn with him. For that, we say: alhamdulillah. And for all of you who have held us, prayed for us, advocated with us, shown up for us, shared our story, or simply cared -- we are grateful beyond words. This is the moment. This is the filing. This is the truth. And insha'Allah, this is the beginning of Zahid's path home.** | | ---|---|--- You 're currently a free subscriber to "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry. clean_body: There’s a spot in Daniels Park I visit often – because it reminds me how lucky I am to call this place home. And every time I go, I see the same bison. | | | | | == | Peter, there's a spot in Daniels Park I visit often - because it reminds me how lucky I am to call this place home. And every time I go, I see the same bison. | == We've gotten to know each other over the years. He recognizes me now and always walks right up to say hi. It's a little thing, but it's a reminder of how connected this community is. 😊 Unlike Lauren Boebert - who won't hold a real town hall, wants to slash public projects and keeps siding with billionaires over working people - I'm in this race for you. But I can't take her on without your help. We're up against a big midnight fundraising deadline tonight - and we need to raise $5,000 to stay on track. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Thanks for believing in this campaign.
