An anti-ICE mob **[clashed with police and ICE agents](https://substack.com/redirect/2a427053-3789-4387-8d03-1c2734c5f41b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Canal Street in New York City, Saturday, interfering with law enforcement operations by blocking vehicles and surrounding agents in a nearby garage.
We **[confronted the protesters](https://substack.com/redirect/2a427053-3789-4387-8d03-1c2734c5f41b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on the street and asked them why they were doing this and if ICE has the right to enforce immigration law in NYC.
**[What happened next was just pathetic... Watch right here:](https://substack.com/redirect/2a427053-3789-4387-8d03-1c2734c5f41b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2a427053-3789-4387-8d03-1c2734c5f41b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2a427053-3789-4387-8d03-1c2734c5f41b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Trump defends calling Walz "seriously retarded," doubles down on criticism**
President Donald Trump, 79, defended his Thanksgiving social media rant calling Democratic Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz "seriously retarded," telling reporters Sunday night **["there's something wrong with him"](https://substack.com/redirect/55b7e802-43ee-4e3b-bc9a-27d751fa82f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and criticizing Walz for allowing an influx of Somali migrants into Minnesota and billions of dollars in payments to Somalia, saying "anybody that would do what he did" has something wrong with them.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/316bb03c-e7ef-4d81-a492-24ca9e64f738?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Walz questions Trump 's mental state, calls behavior "not normal":** Gov. Walz fired back by questioning Trump's mental capacity, writing "Release the MRI results" on X in reference to Trump's October medical checkup, and telling NBC's "Meet The Press" that Trump's Thanksgiving night ranting "is not normal behavior. It is not healthy," adding "it's clear the president's fading physically" and there are "reasons for us to be concerned" about his mental capacity.
* **Trump willing to release MRI results amid back-and-forth:** Trump insisted Sunday he'd be fine with his MRI results being made public, saying "if they want to release it, it's OK with me to release it," as the exchange escalated following Trump's original Truth Social post claiming "Somalian gangs are roving the streets looking for 'prey'" in Minnesota while referencing a federal case where at least 78 defendants--many from the Somali diaspora--were charged with stealing funds from a child nutrition program.

* * *
# **Minnesota state workers blame Walz for $1 billion fraud scandal involving Somali community**
Over 480 Minnesota Department of Human Services employees **[publicly excoriated Gov. Tim Walz](https://substack.com/redirect/9f3d1a76-468c-4ff2-928b-2015da3c2247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for allowing the largest known COVID-19 fraud case in the country to unfold, with more than $1 billion in taxpayers' money stolen through the Feeding Our Future scheme and other programs, with 78 defendants prosecuted and at least 59 convicted so far.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9f3d1a76-468c-4ff2-928b-2015da3c2247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Whistleblowers claim systematic retaliation by Walz administration:** DHS employees alleged on their X account that "Tim Walz is 100% responsible for massive fraud in Minnesota," claiming they alerted Walz early on but instead of partnership, "we got the full weight of retaliation" through "monitoring, threats, repression" and attempts to discredit fraud reports, with workers saying they were "shutdown, reassigned and told to keep quiet" because "leadership did not want to appear to discriminate against certain communities."
* **Fraud largely involved Somali diaspora targeting social programs:** The fraud revolved around dozens of people in Minnesota's Somali diaspora (the state is home to about 80,000 Somali Americans) who set up companies billing the state for social services that were never provided, with Feeding Our Future partnering with local businesses under the pretense of feeding needy children while money was actually squandered on foreign real estate, luxury cars, and more, including one homelessness program that ballooned from $2.6 million in 2021 to $104 million.
* **Trump criticism sparks partisan back-and-forth:** President Trump ripped Minnesota as "a hub of fraudulent money laundering activity," with House Majority Whip Tom Emmer saying "Minnesota has become the land of 10,000 frauds under Tim Walz," while Walz fired back at Trump saying "I take responsibility for putting people in jail" and claiming "there's a big difference between fraud and corruption. And corruption is something he knows about," as he launches his campaign for a third gubernatorial term.

* * *
# Fake news finder: White House initiates weekly website for exposing media lies
The White House unveiled a new website section Friday dedicated to **[publicly shaming media organizations](https://substack.com/redirect/bb3ada51-00d1-40f3-8a3d-a8725ea083e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for what it labels "Fake News," featuring major outlets under categories like "Bias," "Lie," and "Left-wing Lunacy."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e69aef7d-d79e-4dac-807f-3344d34e5534?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Target list unveiled:** The page branded "Misleading. Biased. Exposed." spotlights CBS News, The Independent, and The Boston Globe as this week's offenders, while an "Offender Hall of Shame" includes CNN, MS NOW, The Washington Post, and repeated listings for CBS News, with additional "repeat offenders" ranging from The New York Times to The Associated Press.
* **Illegal orders dispute:** The site accuses media of misrepresenting Trump's response to a Democratic video urging service members to "refuse illegal orders," claiming outlets falsely reported he called for lawmakers' "execution" when Trump posted "SEDITIOUS BEHAVIOR, punishable by DEATH!" on Truth Social regarding the six Congress members who appeared in the controversial clip.
* **Media pushback:** The Washington Post responded it remains "proud of its accurate, rigorous journalism," while the Pentagon announced Monday it's investigating Sen. Mark Kelly, a retired Navy captain who appeared in the video, potentially recalling him to active duty for court-martial proceedings under military justice code.

* * *
# Trump to host families of shot National Guard members
President Trump said Sunday he spoke with families of two West Virginia **[National Guard members shot in Washington](https://substack.com/redirect/e61d5c4e-02cd-4cb3-9be7-8518a4846e08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** last week, pledging to honor fallen soldier Sarah Beckstrom and critically wounded Andrew Wolfe at the White House.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5263a987-a6a3-4ddf-8268-aa1014b7954e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Attack details:** Beckstrom, a 20-year-old Army specialist, died from injuries sustained in the Wednesday shooting just blocks from the White House, while Air Force Staff Sgt. Wolfe remains in critical condition as his family, who Trump described as "highly religious people," asks the public to pray for his recovery.
* **Suspected shooter identity:** Rahmanullah Lakanwal, a 29-year-old Afghan national who legally entered the U.S. in September 2021 through the Biden administration's Operation Allies Welcome resettlement program, faces first-degree murder and assault charges, with Attorney General Pam Bondi announcing the Justice Department will seek the death penalty.
* **Presidential commitment:** Trump told reporters aboard Air Force One he discussed White House visits with both families, saying he wants to honor Beckstrom's memory and Wolfe "recover or not," while West Virginia Gov. Patrick Morrisey memorialized Beckstrom as a "favorite daughter" with "a lot of kindness" and courage at a Saturday vigil.

The two soldiers were deployed to D.C. following Trump's executive order targeting crime in the nation's capital earlier this year.
* * *
# Venezuelan President emerges after Trump ultimatum
Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro made his first public appearance in five days Sunday, temporarily quelling rumors he had **[fled the country](https://substack.com/redirect/ed108541-d027-48e4-b37b-c07e87d03761?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** amid reported pressure from President Trump to resign or face consequences.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ed108541-d027-48e4-b37b-c07e87d03761?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Public reemergence:** The 63-year-old leader presented awards at an annual coffee ceremony in eastern Caracas, leading chants about Venezuela's "indestructible" economy, after last being seen Wednesday posting video of himself driving through the capital on his Telegram channel.
* **Reported ultimatum stalemate:** The Miami Herald reported Trump offered Maduro, his wife, and son safe passage out of Venezuela in exchange for immediate resignation, but negotiations hit an impasse when Maduro's team countered by proposing to surrender political control while maintaining command of the armed forces and requesting "global amnesty" for crimes--a demand Trump refused.
* **Escalating pressure:** Trump confirmed he spoke directly with Maduro by phone, calling it neither good nor bad, while declaring Venezuelan airspace effectively closed and overseeing nearly two dozen U.S. military strikes against suspected drug traffickers since early September that have killed over 80 people, prompting Venezuelan officials to accuse the administration of "cold-blooded murder."

The State Department maintains a $50 million bounty for Maduro's capture on narco-terrorism charges stemming from a 2020 indictment alleging he colluded with Colombian FARC dissidents to flood America with cocaine.

clean_body: "Does ICE have the right to enforce immigration law in New York City?!" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "Does ICE have the right to enforce immigration law in New York City?!" | | | Dec 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | An anti-ICE mob on Canal Street in New York City, Saturday, interfering with law enforcement operations by blocking vehicles and surrounding agents in a nearby garage. We on the street and asked them why they were doing this and if ICE has the right to enforce immigration law in NYC. Trump defends calling Walz "seriously retarded," doubles down on criticism President Donald Trump, 79, defended his Thanksgiving social media rant calling Democratic Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz "seriously retarded," telling reporters Sunday night and criticizing Walz for allowing an influx of Somali migrants into Minnesota and billions of dollars in payments to Somalia, saying "anybody that would do what he did" has something wrong with them. Walz questions Trump 's mental state, calls behavior "not normal": Gov. Walz fired back by questioning Trump's mental capacity, writing "Release the MRI results" on X in reference to Trump's October medical checkup, and telling NBC's "Meet The Press" that Trump's Thanksgiving night ranting "is not normal behavior. It is not healthy," adding "it's clear the president's fading physically" and there are "reasons for us to be concerned" about his mental capacity. Trump willing to release MRI results amid back-and-forth: Trump insisted Sunday he'd be fine with his MRI results being made public, saying "if they want to release it, it's OK with me to release it," as the exchange escalated following Trump's original Truth Social post claiming "Somalian gangs are roving the streets looking for 'prey'" in Minnesota while referencing a federal case where at least 78 defendants--many from the Somali diaspora--were charged with stealing funds from a child nutrition program. Minnesota state workers blame Walz for $1 billion fraud scandal involving Somali community Over 480 Minnesota Department of Human Services employees for allowing the largest known COVID-19 fraud case in the country to unfold, with more than $1 billion in taxpayers' money stolen through the Feeding Our Future scheme and other programs, with 78 defendants prosecuted and at least 59 convicted so far. | | ---|---|--- Whistleblowers claim systematic retaliation by Walz administration: DHS employees alleged on their X account that "Tim Walz is 100% responsible for massive fraud in Minnesota," claiming they alerted Walz early on but instead of partnership, "we got the full weight of retaliation" through "monitoring, threats, repression" and attempts to discredit fraud reports, with workers saying they were "shutdown, reassigned and told to keep quiet" because "leadership did not want to appear to discriminate against certain communities." Fraud largely involved Somali diaspora targeting social programs: The fraud revolved around dozens of people in Minnesota's Somali diaspora (the state is home to about 80,000 Somali Americans) who set up companies billing the state for social services that were never provided, with Feeding Our Future partnering with local businesses under the pretense of feeding needy children while money was actually squandered on foreign real estate, luxury cars, and more, including one homelessness program that ballooned from $2.6 million in 2021 to $104 million. Trump criticism sparks partisan back-and-forth: President Trump ripped Minnesota as "a hub of fraudulent money laundering activity," with House Majority Whip Tom Emmer saying "Minnesota has become the land of 10,000 frauds under Tim Walz," while Walz fired back at Trump saying "I take responsibility for putting people in jail" and claiming "there's a big difference between fraud and corruption. And corruption is something he knows about," as he launches his campaign for a third gubernatorial term. Fake news finder: White House initiates weekly website for exposing media lies The White House unveiled a new website section Friday dedicated to for what it labels "Fake News," featuring major outlets under categories like "Bias," "Lie," and "Left-wing Lunacy." | | ---|---|--- Target list unveiled: The page branded "Misleading. Biased. Exposed." spotlights CBS News, The Independent, and The Boston Globe as this week's offenders, while an "Offender Hall of Shame" includes CNN, MS NOW, The Washington Post, and repeated listings for CBS News, with additional "repeat offenders" ranging from The New York Times to The Associated Press. Illegal orders dispute: The site accuses media of misrepresenting Trump's response to a Democratic video urging service members to "refuse illegal orders," claiming outlets falsely reported he called for lawmakers' "execution" when Trump posted "SEDITIOUS BEHAVIOR, punishable by DEATH!" on Truth Social regarding the six Congress members who appeared in the controversial clip. Media pushback: The Washington Post responded it remains "proud of its accurate, rigorous journalism," while the Pentagon announced Monday it's investigating Sen. Mark Kelly, a retired Navy captain who appeared in the video, potentially recalling him to active duty for court-martial proceedings under military justice code. Trump to host families of shot National Guard members President Trump said Sunday he spoke with families of two West Virginia last week, pledging to honor fallen soldier Sarah Beckstrom and critically wounded Andrew Wolfe at the White House. Attack details: Beckstrom, a 20-year-old Army specialist, died from injuries sustained in the Wednesday shooting just blocks from the White House, while Air Force Staff Sgt. Wolfe remains in critical condition as his family, who Trump described as "highly religious people," asks the public to pray for his recovery. Suspected shooter identity: Rahmanullah Lakanwal, a 29-year-old Afghan national who legally entered the U.S. in September 2021 through the Biden administration's Operation Allies Welcome resettlement program, faces first-degree murder and assault charges, with Attorney General Pam Bondi announcing the Justice Department will seek the death penalty. Presidential commitment: Trump told reporters aboard Air Force One he discussed White House visits with both families, saying he wants to honor Beckstrom's memory and Wolfe "recover or not," while West Virginia Gov. Patrick Morrisey memorialized Beckstrom as a "favorite daughter" with "a lot of kindness" and courage at a Saturday vigil. The two soldiers were deployed to D.C. following Trump's executive order targeting crime in the nation's capital earlier this year. Venezuelan President emerges after Trump ultimatum Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro made his first public appearance in five days Sunday, temporarily quelling rumors he had amid reported pressure from President Trump to resign or face consequences. | | ---|---|--- Public reemergence: The 63-year-old leader presented awards at an annual coffee ceremony in eastern Caracas, leading chants about Venezuela's "indestructible" economy, after last being seen Wednesday posting video of himself driving through the capital on his Telegram channel. Reported ultimatum stalemate: The Miami Herald reported Trump offered Maduro, his wife, and son safe passage out of Venezuela in exchange for immediate resignation, but negotiations hit an impasse when Maduro's team countered by proposing to surrender political control while maintaining command of the armed forces and requesting "global amnesty" for crimes--a demand Trump refused. Escalating pressure: Trump confirmed he spoke directly with Maduro by phone, calling it neither good nor bad, while declaring Venezuelan airspace effectively closed and overseeing nearly two dozen U.S. military strikes against suspected drug traffickers since early September that have killed over 80 people, prompting Venezuelan officials to accuse the administration of "cold-blooded murder." The State Department maintains a $50 million bounty for Maduro's capture on narco-terrorism charges stemming from a 2020 indictment alleging he colluded with Colombian FARC dissidents to flood America with cocaine. # **The Map is Out, and it is Being Heard in Committee T _omorrow_**
---
---
The House Elections Committee will meet tomorrow from 9 a.m. to 2:45 p.m. in the House Chamber to discuss [the map that was released today](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=63e2927a44a91826146c1a9a02886284df26c6b4d0d1cf58d1ff0e0a1a8643a0d20f0a8b63ed29a4ce091066691ce85f016d985f3b6b2b25 "the map that was released today") _. _

**You can sign up to testify starting at midnight tonight**.

Visit the [House Elections Committee page](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=63e2927a44a91826feedaba073c761c5f8932a7ff605de2bf7d60fc5e51ad1d126e0dd8c153c80eb932e2eb7c589015f848a03379feaa63c "House Elections Committee page") and click the **Testify in Committee** button to sign up.

All those who sign up online **must** check in tomorrow morning when you arrive at the Statehouse.

In-person check-ins will start at 8:30 a.m., and the committee will adjourn at 2:45 p.m., regardless of whether people still need to testify.

**Thank you for using your voice. **

subject: Patagonia giveaway starts today!
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=VpYfoEP96ExJk0y2dl4uUttFHQfKQxNnOweEF8WMb9cs+xaf44Prf0SFtyc0++7lilvpYg+YHRhARaNuqujw5ab9VN3NGYVM9ACSt/VLbt2hh6rqtcmJ2kbT75AdCUF1 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=VpYfoEP96ExJk0y2dl4uUttFHQfKQxNnOweEF8WMb9cs+xaf44Prf0SFtyc0++7lilvpYg+YHRhARaNuqujw5ab9VN3NGYVM9ACSt/VLbt2hh6rqtcmJ2kbT75AdCUF1]
Peter,
In honor of Giving Tuesday tomorrow, Patagonia has generously offered up merchandise to giveaway! If you give $100 for Giving Tuesday today, you could be entered to win, and your gift up to $5,000 will be matched by a generous donor. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=VpYfoEP96ExJk0y2dl4uUttFHQfKQxNnOweEF8WMb9cs+xaf44Prf0SFtyc0++7lilvpYg+YHRhARaNuqujw5ab9VN3NGYVM9ACSt/VLbt2hh6rqtcmJ2kbT75AdCUF1]
Here are the details:
🎒 What: Win a free Patagonia hoodie, sling bag, hip pack, and fleece gloves (that can be exchanged for your preferred size and color) with a gift of $100 or more to OLCV for Giving Tuesday! Your will also be matched by a generous donor.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=VpYfoEP96ExJk0y2dl4uUttFHQfKQxNnOweEF8WMb9cs+xaf44Prf0SFtyc0++7lilvpYg+YHRhARaNuqujw5ab9VN3NGYVM9ACSt/VLbt2hh6rqtcmJ2kbT75AdCUF1 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=VpYfoEP96ExJk0y2dl4uUttFHQfKQxNnOweEF8WMb9cs+xaf44Prf0SFtyc0++7lilvpYg+YHRhARaNuqujw5ab9VN3NGYVM9ACSt/VLbt2hh6rqtcmJ2kbT75AdCUF1]
🗓️Deadline: 11:59pm on Tuesday, December 2nd
🌲 Why: To have your gift matched to protect our wildlife and habitat, clean air and water, and our future!
If you are not able to give $100 but would like to contribute, please consider giving any amount here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2] to have your gift matched so that we can reach our goal.
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=VpYfoEP96ExJk0y2dl4uUttFHQfKQxNnOweEF8WMb9cs+xaf44Prf0SFtyc0++7lilvpYg+YHRhARaNuqujw5ab9VN3NGYVM9ACSt/VLbt2hh6rqtcmJ2kbT75AdCUF1]
Thank you for supporting our work to fight for a climate safe and healthy future.
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
P.S.: Daunted by a large donation? No worries! You can start giving a manageable amount of $5 a month for Giving Tuesday, and have a larger impact in the climate fight. Consider joining OLCV’s Sustainer Circle community today! name: Jena Griswold
subject: Truly thankful for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251201-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251201-email]
Peter –
Thanks to your support, we just reached our fundraising goal for November! You may not realize how big an impact reaching these monthly goals has on a race like ours, but it sends the message that we as a team have what it takes to win this race next year.
At a time when holiday parties, travel, end-of-year work deadlines, and all of the chaos come into play, having your support means the world to me.
Thank you again for helping us have such a successful month. I’m looking forward to ending the year with this same strength and carrying it into 2026.
All the best,
Jena Griswold

name: Aftyn Behn
subject: Donald Trump’s panicking about this race --
body:
Peter, this is Aftyn Behn. I’m running in the last House race of 2025 here in TN-07.
Trump is begging MAGA to go vote – he’s PANICKING about securing this seat. Take a look at what the president just posted:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?refcode=120125_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?refcode=120125_1]
Will you split a donation between my campaign and Real Texas PAC right now to flip TN-07 blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?refcode=120125_1]
Donald Trump is scrambling because he knows what it would mean for us to win the last House race of 2025:
That voters are rejecting MAGA extremism across the country.
That we can rewrite the playbook for what’s possible for Democrats in the Deep South.
That we’ll be heading into 2026 one seat closer to retaking the House and putting a check on this administration.
No wonder he’s scared.
The New York Times called our race “the unlikely new front in the fight for control of Congress.” We’ve got the eyes of the nation on us, and the only way we win next Tuesday is if we work together.
Please split a donation between my campaign and Real Texas PAC so we can fight back! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?refcode=120125_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Aftyn Behn and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?express_lane=true&refcode=120125_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?express_lane=true&refcode=120125_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?express_lane=true&refcode=120125_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?express_lane=true&refcode=120125_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?express_lane=true&refcode=120125_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?refcode=120125_1&amount=25]
It’s great to have you in my corner, Peter.
– Aftyn Behn
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?refcode=120125_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-aftyn?refcode=120125_1]

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: Team Phil
subject: A Cyber Monday deal for you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado

name: Official Team Cooper Merch Store
subject: The perfect time to place your order!
body:
🚨 GRAB BEFORE IT’S GONE 🚨
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=78%2E124072%2Eajo2Yl)
[ ](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2090?t=6&akid=78%2E124072%2Eajo2Yl)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=78%2E124072%2Eajo2Yl)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=78%2E124072%2Eajo2Yl)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=78%2E124072%2Eajo2Yl)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=78%2E124072%2Eajo2Yl)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=78%2E124072%2Eajo2Yl)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=7&akid=78%2E124072%2Eajo2Yl)

subject: They’re TREMBLING. Let’s show them they’re right to be afraid.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:

# [Bridgeport Bites The Dust Again](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=180420584&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNDIwNTg0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ2MDg1NTIsImV4cCI6MTc2NzIwMDU1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Nh901QAHcH8JWzdbk9-M8v9VxxDuaHaIEcu82K_JKdY)
### Bridgeport Education is Still Going the Wrong Way - and Chronic Absenteeism Persists
| | [Dr. Michael Goldstein](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct) and [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)
---
| Dec 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct)| | [](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=180420584&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNDIwNTg0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NDYwODU1MiwiZXhwIjoxNzY3MjAwNTUyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTQ1NDg1MyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.WzxuA5liBWRStbCeLol_Vj7tGme9RRZrKbIHhJhl4mo&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=180420584&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNDIwNTg0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ2MDg1NTIsImV4cCI6MTc2NzIwMDU1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Nh901QAHcH8JWzdbk9-M8v9VxxDuaHaIEcu82K_JKdY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

---

Unfortunately, every time we write about Bridgeport, it is never good news.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..xXVSUDuNUahlux8k6X4rFlXDqkRdOm1OaA0YSleSeJ4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=180420584)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=180420584&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNDIwNTg0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ2MDg1NTIsImV4cCI6MTc2NzIwMDU1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Nh901QAHcH8JWzdbk9-M8v9VxxDuaHaIEcu82K_JKdY)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1a44f1bf-5214-4981-9bc1-8515c10cc7dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Kind and Curious](https://substack.com/redirect/b969f28f-2180-4307-b52e-75dccd5da840?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/9d50258e-a7b0-4a69-8f10-405dc581c08c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Well the Good news is chronic absenteeism is down, but just a little bit.
**The real news is Bridgeport Schools and our State Government is failing the citizens of Bridgeport and their futures.**
Bridgeport has among the worst public schools in the state of Connecticut, reading at 160 out of 165 school systems.
**Chronic Absenteeism**
_**The schools are so bad that a significant percentage of the students are chronically absent.**_ In October 2024, the chronic absentee rate was 32%, and in 2025 is now down to 22.6%. _**That means one out of every four students in Bridgeport doesn 't even bother to come to school on a regular basis**_.
**School Enrollment Down - Where Did the kids go?**
School enrollment has also dropped by about 4,000 students between the 2023 - 2024 and the 2024 - 2025 school year. **It is highly unlikely that the school age population dropped in this same period of time.**
**No Board Oversight & Financial Irregularities**
According to [Inside Investigator](https://substack.com/redirect/627417d4-20cf-40da-b330-36db467fd3af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), CSDE, a contractor, completed an audit of the Bridgeport public school system. The audit confirmed there was a lack of board oversight, as well as funding, unusual budget transfers, misclassification expenditures, and inefficiencies._**That certainly sounds like mismanagement, embezzlements, or and other types of corrupt behavior**_.
**Unsafe Schools**
In addition to poor educational quality, Bridgeport schools are unsafe. During the 2024 -2025 school year, there were 20,390 incidents involving physical and verbal confrontations and 14,002 fighting and battery incidents. Approximately 70% of the Bridgeport school budget comes from the state of Connecticut.
**Betrayal of the Students**
We, the taxpayers of Connecticut, are funding a school where students choose not to attend for a host of reasons, including their safety, and poor education quality. Connecticut is betraying the people of Bridgeport.
While there are so many reasons for these epic failures, it is clear that incompetence and poor oversight are leading contributors to this problem and bad government _**is likely the problem itself**_.
Bridgeport schools cannot continue on this destructive path to the future members of our state economy without a massive intervention to solve these problems and provide the citizens of Bridgeport and parents with the opportunity for their children to have a meaningful education and be successful.
**Education is the Real Emergency - Not Housing**
The state legislature, ruled by the party of Democrat Governor Lamont, has been so quick to pass emergency housing bills, but they overlook the real emergency. **How can you not consider school failures an emergency?** Yet, our state legislators are unwilling to do anything to intervene and advocate on behalf of Bridgeport's students.
Perhaps the Democrats controlled state legislature is afraid that an educated Bridgeport population where students are trained and have opportunities to get jobs and live better lives would no longer vote Democrat, thus eroding their political stranglehold on the state.
We have previously written that such a poorly run school system is racism and that the democrat party is failing the children See [Your Child Your Choice - Democrats are the Real Racists by failing our school children](https://substack.com/redirect/523d33e6-6ffc-4d29-b8bc-5918a554883c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) where betrayal of the minorities that live in Bridgeport the opportunities for better life is the real racism.
**What Can We Do?**.
We must call out these failures and we must stand up and make sure that the state that funds Bridgeport schools actually intervenes and takes charge to make this system work for the citizens of Bridgeport.
Talk is cheap. Action is not.
**For Attorney General Tong, It is time to stop patting yourself on the back for lawsuits to President Trump and launch real investigations into these irregularities within our state.**
| A guest post by| [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)Business Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. Jonathan served as the Campaign Manager for Dr. Michael Goldstein - CT-04 [Subscribe to Jonathan](https://substack.com/redirect/cab636b0-c459-4ef0-898e-36b77d5b531b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: David Pan
subject: The Conservative Alternative to Zohran Mamdani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Pan for Congress 2026](https://eot
body:
Instead of expanding government to manage people, we can empower people by investing in them directly.

| | |
---
| |
---
Zohran Mamdani’s success in the New York mayoral election stems from a frustration with the unaffordability of essentials such as food, housing, and healthcare. While he has understood the problem, he is gravely mistaken about the solution. His type of proposals - government-run grocery stores, rent control, and Medicare for all – are a continuation and expansion of the government programs and controls that have caused the problems in the first place. We already have an entire system of government-run food distribution through the SNAP program, but its limits on income and assets create disincentives to work and save. Rent control, along with government regulations that limit the building of housing in new areas, has undermined the affordability of housing by limiting its supply. Obamacare subsidies have increased health insurer profits while limiting competition, leading to higher prices. The true way to achieve affordability is to take advantage of the ingenuity and resourcefulness of the people themselves rather than handing more power to government bureaucrats. We ourselves can create change when we are free to take control of our own lives. Rather than expanding government controls, we can support our small businesses by reducing regulations. Rather than creating unaccountable government monopolies for food, housing, and healthcare, we can free businesses to compete with each other to provide the best products in the most affordable ways. We can promote innovation by creating a market-oriented system that rewards people for coming up with new solutions to problems rather than having them spend their time thinking of ways to game a government system. Expanding government-provided services reduces competition, leading to poorer service. The alternative is not a blind belief in free markets, but a careful structuring of markets to create the incentives that will promote both more jobs and a better supply of goods and services. My plan to phase out our welfare and entitlement system protects the benefits earned by our senior citizens while introducing a new system for our young people. The $4 trillion that we spend every year on the current system can be dissolved into cash and returned to the people, thereby providing payments of $16,000 per year for all citizens 21 and over. Because there are no strings attached, people can make their own decisions about how to invest this money: paying for college, saving for a down payment on a house, or investing for retirement. Instead of the current system that finances consumption by paying benefits only to people who do not work and do not save, we would have one that encourages investments by taking away any restrictions. Welfare recipients would get essentially the same benefits as before, but they would be liberated from the current restrictions on income and assets, thereby incentivizing them to work. But this new system would help working families the most. They currently pay into the system but receive nothing in return. With this plan, such families would start to receive $16,000 per year per adult. The plan preserves current Social Security and Medicare benefits for everyone 37 and older by creating a new system for the young that would save over $1 trillion per year compared to the current system. Instead of flowing into a government bureaucracy, the money that pays for our welfare state could go directly to families and communities, whose spending would energize local economies and create opportunities for small businesses to offer jobs and opportunities for everyone. Such a strategy would create real prosperity for the many rather than government benefits for a select few. This would be the way to create real abundance and affordability. While the details of such a plan can be up for debate, the basic premise is that people themselves will have a better idea of how best they can use their money than the government would. Rather than paying for an army of government employees to think of ways to manage people’s lives, we can allow the people themselves to decide how to invest and spend their money the way they see fit. These individual decisions can then create the bottom-up signals that will move businesses to satisfy people’s needs in the most efficient ways they can think of. Empowering families and communities rather than government lies at the basis of our republican traditions, and the most promising way forward will be to return to this vision. Please help me to reduce government spending and put that money back into your pockets. Your $5 contribution pays for 50 door hangers for my campaign. Or volunteer to help distribute them to homes. [DavidPanforCongress.com](https://eot.davidpanforcongress.com/f/a/DnI8iSVdvjp7IinsxflU8g~~/AAAHURA~/iBXK_Is_9fycKvYKtgPDMniIPKCMxOyZeWAGZtBJJygEbyRMR1Z8lY-Iwkk9ezxKC3r1RSFHLzkSE9nzphHzAh7VJwmx_L64bSMKubotZxKC6dzW_lRuJvVWdhIr5eqgJu_RDia7GnZqK1fE8TVaUxcxoE8mLtcHYsgQ2j3DTUo~)

clean_body: Instead of expanding government to manage people, we can empower people by investing in them directly. | | | | | Zohran Mamdani’s success in the New York mayoral election stems from a frustration with the unaffordability of essentials such as food, housing, and healthcare. While he has understood the problem, he is gravely mistaken about the solution. His type of proposals - government-run grocery stores, rent control, and Medicare for all – are a continuation and expansion of the government programs and controls that have caused the problems in the first place. We already have an entire system of government-run food distribution through the SNAP program, but its limits on income and assets create disincentives to work and save. Rent control, along with government regulations that limit the building of housing in new areas, has undermined the affordability of housing by limiting its supply. Obamacare subsidies have increased health insurer profits while limiting competition, leading to higher prices. The true way to achieve affordability is to take advantage of the ingenuity and resourcefulness of the people themselves rather than handing more power to government bureaucrats. We ourselves can create change when we are free to take control of our own lives. Rather than expanding government controls, we can support our small businesses by reducing regulations. Rather than creating unaccountable government monopolies for food, housing, and healthcare, we can free businesses to compete with each other to provide the best products in the most affordable ways. We can promote innovation by creating a market-oriented system that rewards people for coming up with new solutions to problems rather than having them spend their time thinking of ways to game a government system. Expanding government-provided services reduces competition, leading to poorer service. The alternative is not a blind belief in free markets, but a careful structuring of markets to create the incentives that will promote both more jobs and a better supply of goods and services. My plan to phase out our welfare and entitlement system protects the benefits earned by our senior citizens while introducing a new system for our young people. The $4 trillion that we spend every year on the current system can be dissolved into cash and returned to the people, thereby providing payments of $16,000 per year for all citizens 21 and over. Because there are no strings attached, people can make their own decisions about how to invest this money: paying for college, saving for a down payment on a house, or investing for retirement. Instead of the current system that finances consumption by paying benefits only to people who do not work and do not save, we would have one that encourages investments by taking away any restrictions. Welfare recipients would get essentially the same benefits as before, but they would be liberated from the current restrictions on income and assets, thereby incentivizing them to work. But this new system would help working families the most. They currently pay into the system but receive nothing in return. With this plan, such families would start to receive $16,000 per year per adult. The plan preserves current Social Security and Medicare benefits for everyone 37 and older by creating a new system for the young that would save over $1 trillion per year compared to the current system. Instead of flowing into a government bureaucracy, the money that pays for our welfare state could go directly to families and communities, whose spending would energize local economies and create opportunities for small businesses to offer jobs and opportunities for everyone. Such a strategy would create real prosperity for the many rather than government benefits for a select few. This would be the way to create real abundance and affordability. While the details of such a plan can be up for debate, the basic premise is that people themselves will have a better idea of how best they can use their money than the government would. Rather than paying for an army of government employees to think of ways to manage people’s lives, we can allow the people themselves to decide how to invest and spend their money the way they see fit. These individual decisions can then create the bottom-up signals that will move businesses to satisfy people’s needs in the most efficient ways they can think of. Empowering families and communities rather than government lies at the basis of our republican traditions, and the most promising way forward will be to return to this vision. Please help me to reduce government spending and put that money back into your pockets. Your $5 contribution pays for 50 door hangers for my campaign. Or volunteer to help distribute them to homes. ~ | ~ "www.DavidPanForCongress.com" | ~ "Paid for by David Pan for Congress 2026" | | | | 3843 S. Bristol St., Ste. 604 Santa Ana, CA 92704 USA ~

Inside Foxconn’s massive new facility in Houston, cameras captured NVIDIA’s CEO standing shoulder-to-shoulder with humanoid robots. Real machines — walking, turning, and working on the floor of what will become America’s first large-scale humanoid production line.

This isn’t decades away. Foxconn plans to begin production in 2026 — right here in the U.S. — rolling out two advanced models that could replace millions of workers.

Even President Trump, speaking at a recent rally, said: “We have to be very careful with where this is going.” But Washington is already betting big... and cutting contracts.

The real winners? Not the robot brands... but the 3 little-known companies supplying the hardware, chips, and systems for every AI humanoid built. These plays could move before the first Houston robots even ship.

If you wait for mainstream coverage, you’ll be too late.
[See Which 3 Stocks Power America’s AI Factory](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=f7d9a6f80ded45d586b319d96948e6d7&_e=tX0KVkcHMzzDsiiRXS809wiaFic0qRGH_4Ih7fkO47vfgY0yIdplzzlSWw46pPbxHZ83iH5qHatQnikjHsz_N0z-Qzogq3K3WwRaeZe3l0C1wYjIA0Lkqy2BsFJUdFjgmwXcrkQYyapQ6udHyhZitEU_Ys6pcjPmT0kGG0x6OpNWEURgMp9zXfS42dv47-jnCq1-zruWair4D76ATJLM8R2iooMAV2UVTMZsz0bDeCy5Hqv0z2-akIdPl3qY7sVNC-VAeAqzP9Qo2oQoFthNZ68pRJJTGJxiRLVh9lsGkHR9y-5CNiVJryM87O6AfCEPUH0kQnXcqFVm2GGx_2jWPXFCucP2Zb2n8fTYX6-sLUhZWfJrGXKikobJdQqkSShRDzXmntaQKB_dRUiERh_RGW4_JnwqRadRXDttuho0u0xBBBGwjtTPGBN-pudo7xTkM7lpz-ay5j8fwsOx1Alv4QTpLQYBYFRB9XVSJFwVkDwrIyZSxdKOkMXTrCnWmO-ZgeveqsXBKy2ISXg2A10g1nVByBlWVDwOZ4DZKUITkGdMgju6KOxBWlKUSZoNWTK8KvQ_SBsAxSMz--nS-aeCrnfSqcVEUs_Pw7ziy63JpSwHuCGlOj9QEhHQ8zRDCpEH)
Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | First Invеstmеnt Updаtеs brоught tо уоu bу Іnception Media, LLC. We would like to emphasize that we do not offer tailored financial advice. This email does not serve as financial guidance, and you bear full responsibility for your investment decisions. Hi there, it's Michael.
I've said this before, but it's worth repeating: The best ideas to solve our state's biggest problems won't come from Washington – they will come directly from Coloradans like you, friend. And I'm running for governor to put _your_ best ideas into action.
That's why, as we close out a whirlwind year of nationwide chaos and look toward an incredibly consequential election for Colorado in 2026, I must know what's on your mind.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Cowboys vs. Corporate Oligarchy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
When I was in Texas recently, ranchers and restaurant owners told me the same thing: the meatpacking giants have a chokehold on America’s beef supply, and it’s driving up costs.
Four massive corporations control over 80 percent [https://farmaction.us/behind-the-brands-the-meatpacking-monopoly-and-the-illusion-of-choice/] of the beef industry in the United States.
* They decide what ranchers get paid.
* They set the prices that families pay at the grocery store.
* And everyone loses, except the corporate middlemen.
This isn’t a free market. It’s a rigged market. And it’s time for Congress to take action, crack down on centralized meatpacking, and support local and regional meatpackers.
Tell Congress: Break up meatpacking monopolies. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/meatpacking-petition?contactdata=MOTaXljxm7EQR6uX7tkjgVNj/lV4dVCCOrkn0ey0NKF+xdqKfE/dJ4sOLh7QL2z2GLhkOrzvSuBGcPedKpcKrfSGuaHYhH2W1x9s63dheJFz1uuRSU6tkMHAz4UN7KoyHKo0hEJIOrYPERY4Li10SIFQX0XkXEnBbLUpYfaBCr7xfuT0kwnhNEAYB1/gVyuQ]
https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1993340705180467228 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1993340705180467228]
Our ranchers deserve to sell their product for what it’s worth, and hardworking families deserve affordable beef sourced right here at home. The only way we make that happen is by breaking the bottleneck these meatpackers have created.
SIGN THE PETITION: Break up meatpacking monopolies. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/meatpacking-petition?contactdata=MOTaXljxm7EQR6uX7tkjgVNj/lV4dVCCOrkn0ey0NKF+xdqKfE/dJ4sOLh7QL2z2GLhkOrzvSuBGcPedKpcKrfSGuaHYhH2W1x9s63dheJFz1uuRSU6tkMHAz4UN7KoyHKo0hEJIOrYPERY4Li10SIFQX0XkXEnBbLUpYfaBCr7xfuT0kwnhNEAYB1/gVyuQ]
TAKE ACTION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/meatpacking-petition?contactdata=MOTaXljxm7EQR6uX7tkjgVNj/lV4dVCCOrkn0ey0NKF+xdqKfE/dJ4sOLh7QL2z2GLhkOrzvSuBGcPedKpcKrfSGuaHYhH2W1x9s63dheJFz1uuRSU6tkMHAz4UN7KoyHKo0hEJIOrYPERY4Li10SIFQX0XkXEnBbLUpYfaBCr7xfuT0kwnhNEAYB1/gVyuQ]
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

body:
We only have until midnight tonight...

We only have until midnight tonight...
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z256ib670pfk5kr977pkh1incqne1iv1nt3g2qsg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cdh61oj4cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Our grassroots support is truly incredible...
---
Thousands of America First patriots just came through for me at the final hour to help us CRUSH our very first monthly goal since I launched my campaign for governor.
---
**_But deadline be damned, we have to keep our foot on the gas and keep this momentum going. The race is already within the _margin_ _of_ _error_ , and Hochul is LOSING more ground with every passing day! _**
---
Polls now show a huge MAJORITY of New Yorkers – including New Yorkers from all political backgrounds – don’t want to see her reelected.
---
However, Hochul, Mamdani, and their Democrat allies aren’t going to simply roll over and accept defeat.
---
They’re flooding New York with MILLIONS OF DOLLARS to stall our surging momentum so they can keep Hochul and her new Far Left puppet-master Zohran Mamdani in power.
---
_To win a blue state like New York, we desperately need every dollar we can muster to counter their multimillion-dollar ad buys and take our own America First message directly to the voters._
---
That’s why I’ve secured an internal **24-HOUR DEADLINE EXTENSION** until _11:59 P.M. TONIGHT_ to help us raise the additional funds required to level the playing field against Hochul and Mamdani.

name: Me, Team VPP (2)
subject: Did you mean to do this?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Should Congress increase Social Security?
| **This is an automated message for you.** You did not respond to our poll about Democrats’ proposal to INCREASE Social Security by $200 a month.

Momentum is building to pass this bill – if we gather enough support, we can push Congress to SAVE and EXPAND Social Security!

_BUT IF we lack sufficient data,_ Trump will think Americans DON’T CARE about Social Security.

**So please, respond by your one-time extended MIDNIGHT deadline:**
[**Should Congress increase Social Security benefits? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=22092%2E878179%2EpAi0-5) | [YES, ABSOLUTELY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22092%2E878179%2EpAi0-5)
---
[NO, THEY SHOULD NOT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22092%2E878179%2EpAi0-5)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22092%2E878179%2EpAi0-5)
Thank you,
_The Voter Protection Project_
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=22092%2E878179%2EpAi0-5)
**FIRST** Trump pledged there **“would be cuts”** to Social Security, endangering benefits Americans’ have worked their whole lives for!

**THEN** Rand Paul claimed Republicans **“didn’t have the money”** for Social Security, threatening to RAISE the retirement age to 70!

**_BUT NOW_** Democrats aren’t going down without a fight, they just introduced **a HUGE monthly increase** to Social Security! This changes everything!
---
[**But we’re lacking opinion data in your state. We need to hear from 346 more Democrats:
Should Congress increase Social Security payments?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=22092%2E878179%2EpAi0-5)
[YES, ABSOLUTELY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=22092%2E878179%2EpAi0-5)
---
[NO, THEY SHOULD NOT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=13&akid=22092%2E878179%2EpAi0-5)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=14&akid=22092%2E878179%2EpAi0-5)
If we don’t hear from you by MIDNIGHT, your response may not be counted.

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22092%2E878179%2EpAi0-5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22092%2E878179%2EpAi0-5).**

subject: Please, read this message.

Patriot,

I'm asking you to hear me out for a few minutes... Can I be honest with you?

When I left the service, I thought I had done the hardest thing I would ever have to do in my entire life. Being a Green Beret was no joke.

Being a father proved otherwise, and being a politician sometimes makes me wish I were back in basic training.

There are a few things that come hand-in-hand with politics that are unbearable; one of them is fundraising.

My parents didn't raise me to ask others for handouts, but fundraising is one of those things that I have to do; otherwise, my campaign would be dead in its tracks.

**If you 're still reading this email, I need your help. I have an upcoming fundraising deadline, and my team is telling me we need to raise $5,000 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**

If you could lend me a hand and make a donation below, I'd be forever grateful.

**DONATE BELOW**

name: Haley S.
subject: I'm humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
null, I wanted to make sure you got my note

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1471%2E49239%2EauQPuj)
null, I wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you got my note.
---
I'm still looking for another 65 grassroots Democrats to personally endorse my campaign to become Michigan's next senator, and**I noticed you haven't had a chance to add your name yet.**
**That's why I'm humbly asking one more time:[Will you personally endorse my campaign to keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's disastrous agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9268?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1471%2E49239%2EauQPuj)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9268?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1471%2E49239%2EauQPuj)
---
Thank you for your support. It means the world to have you by my side in this race.

Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: What I'm hearing from folks like you
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9269?t=4&akid=1471%2E49239%2EauQPuj)
---
null,
On the campaign trail, I've been talking directly with Michiganders across the state – folks like you who are concerned for the future – and **here's what I've been hearing:**
🛟 People are worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

🩺 Folks in Michigan and across the country want improved and affordable access to health care.

💰 Working families need real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

⛓️💥 And many expressed deep concerns about the future of our fundamental freedoms, civil rights, and American democracy itself.
These aren’t just political talking points, null. They’re _real_ concerns from _real_ people. And they’re exactly why I’m running for Michigan's battleground Senate seat – **because I have a track record of getting things done.**
📌 I helped stabilize the auto industry and save over 200,000 Michigan jobs as chief of staff on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
📌 I played a leading role in passing the bill to grow our manufacturing economy by bringing America’s semiconductor industry back to where it belongs: Michigan.
📌 Most recently, I introduced the Stop Trump's Abuse of Power Act – a bill to ban the president from deploying active duty troops on U.S. soil without consent from state or local leaders.
That barely scratches the surface, and I know there's a _lot_ more work to do. So it's a good thing I grew up the Michigan way: surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. And I'm in this race now so I can continue fighting for Michigan's working families in the U.S. Senate.
But with polling showing that I'm the Democrat with the very best shot at beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, the GOP is getting scared – **and they're gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red.**
**So, null, I need****you on my grassroots team to help me****keep up my track record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.****[Will you join me by endorsing my campaign today? My team set an ambitious goal to get 15,000 signatures by midnight, and right now, I’m still 40% short.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9268?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1471%2E49239%2EauQPuj)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9268?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1471%2E49239%2EauQPuj)
---
Thank you so much for your support,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9268?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1471%2E49239%2EauQPuj) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9269?t=8&akid=1471%2E49239%2EauQPuj)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Birmingham, MI 48009

clean_body: Falling further behind isn’t an option. | Peter, I want to be upfront about where we ended last night: We fell short of our November deadline. With the holiday weekend, so many supporters were offline, and we could not close the gap in time. | | | = The stakes for 2026 could not be higher. Control of the House will decide whether there is any check at all on Donald Trump’s agenda. If you care about stopping the chaos we are already seeing in Washington, this toss-up race could determine whether Democrats have the power to do it. Falling further behind isn’t an option. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being part of this team. -Laura * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. "The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!"_ _**Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!"_ _**Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!"_ _**Angel H.**
"Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver."_ _**Sharon P.**
"Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's a nearly endless supply of backup power that weighs less than a housecat! And costs less than one, too. It can recharge for FREE with the power of the sun. And you can use it right inside your home, because it’s fume-free and SAFE. This breakthrough backup power source can save your family in a blackout. With an incredible, 300-watt capacity you can recharge your mini solar generator thousands of times. And you also get a NEW affordable payment plan - take 6 months to pay! PLEASE DON'T WAIT TO LEARN MORE Demand is surging... Don't delay. We can't keep these generators in stock. Once we run out, it could be a while before we can get you one. You'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. CUSTOMERS LOVE THEIR PATRIOT POWER GENERATORS! Joe B. "My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" Bob A. "Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" Carla U. "The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" Bernice L. "Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" Patricia T. "This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" Angel H. "Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." Sharon P. "Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic."

name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Standing Up for Massachusetts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
As the Trump Administration continues to make life harder for Americans, Governor Healey is continuing to stand up for Massachusetts.
When President Trump stopped food assistance to our most vulnerable neighbors, Governor Healey expedited $8 million to food banks to keep people fed. When a court ordered benefits to be paid, Governor Healey had her team move quickly to get SNAP benefits out the door before President Trump could stop them.
When the Trump administration delayed critical federal funds that help low-income families and seniors heat their homes, she demanded its immediate release, while also taking action to prevent heating emergencies and utility shut-offs.
And as RFK Jr. and the CDC continue to dispense false and misleading information about links between vaccines and autism, Governor Healey continues to choose science over conspiracy, rejecting these claims, providing evidence-based information, and making sure vaccines are available and affordable.
In Massachusetts, we know that access to nutritious food, quality health care, and stable housing aren’t privileges to be earned, but fundamental human rights.
While President Trump increases the burden for everyday Americans, Governor Healey puts people over politics.
Onward,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
