name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: A Heartfelt Request Before Giving Tuesday
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Please Support Autism Health for Giving Tuesday!**
---
|
---
| As we enter this season of gratitude, we want to take a moment to thank you for being part of the Autism Health community. Your encouragement, your participation, and your belief in our mission have carried us through an extraordinary year. Today, we’re reaching out with a heartfelt request as we prepare for **Giving Tuesday tomorrow**. Autism Health Inc. is a **100% volunteer-based organization**. Every program we offer, every family we support, every resource we create is made possible because people like you stand with us. When you give, you are not supporting salaries; you are directly investing in **families, education, research, and hope**. Your donation helps fund:
• **Family scholarships** for the Autism Health Summit, ensuring parents can access life-changing education and expert guidance
• **Monthly Autism Support Groups** , offering connection, encouragement, and a safe place for families to share their journey
• **Educational webinar series **for parents and practitioners seeking integrative, research-driven solutions
• **Research & ****Resource development** , giving families the tools they need to improve quality of life and long-term outcomes Every contribution, large or small, makes a meaningful difference. Whether you can give $25, $250, or more, your generosity helps us expand our reach and continue serving families who desperately need support, understanding, and a path forward. Tomorrow is a powerful day to give. If Autism Health has touched your life or if you believe in our mission to uplift families and advance real solutions, we humbly ask that you consider making a tax-deductible donation.
---
| [DONATE HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=2f88d45e4f&e=3a42edfdc4 "DONATE HERE")
---
| From the bottom of our hearts, thank you for standing with us. Together, we are creating a future filled with hope, healing, and possibility. With gratitude,
**Steve & Tracy Slepcevic**
Founders, Autism Health Inc.
---
|
---
|
## Cyber Monday Deal — This Week Only!
---
|
---
| Cyber Monday is here, and we’re thrilled to offer a special, limited-time discount for the Autism Health Summit 2026. For **this week only** , you can take an **additional $25 off** your admission ticket using promo code **CyberMonday** at checkout. The Autism Health Summit will be held **April 24–26, 2026** , at the stunning Legacy Center Resort & Spa in San Diego, California. This three-day event brings together world-renowned experts, groundbreaking research, integrative health strategies, and an empowering community of parents, professionals, and advocates. It’s a weekend filled with education, connection, and hope that you won't want to miss! **This is the lowest price you’ll see all year.**
Tickets are already marked down by $50 for General Admission and VIP, and **prices will increase after January 1st**. If you’ve been planning to attend, now is the time to secure your spot and save.
---
| [BUY TICKET](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=741e907a13&e=3a42edfdc4 "BUY TICKET")
---
| Don’t miss out on this limited Cyber Monday opportunity. Join us at the Autism Health Summit and be part of a movement creating real change, real support, and real solutions for families.
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
---
| Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=2bc75fe434&e=3a42edfdc4 "DONATE NOW")

San Diego, CA**

name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: Register: Bilingual (ENG/SPN) Know Your Rights to Vote Informational Session – Dec 4, at 6 PM ET
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=954c22dca8&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
|
---
| |
# “Know Your Rights to Vote” Informational Session
---
| |

The right to vote is a fundamental pillar of our democracy. Across the country, communities are coming together to protect this right and ensure every voter’s voice is heard. But we cannot do this work alone.
We invite you to join the **Democratic National Committee** and **Latino Victory Fund** for the informational session **“Know Your Rights to Vote”** on [**Thursday, December 4, at 6 p.m. ET**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=cb8f75b44d&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**.**
During this session, you’ll learn about your rights at the polls, the legal protections available, and the actions we’re taking to ensure free, fair, and accessible elections. We have critical runoff elections this December, from Nashville to Miami.
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=11120480ca&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
| |
# Sesión Informativa “Conozca Sus Derechos al Votar”
---
| |
El derecho al voto es un pilar fundamental de nuestra democracia. En todo el país, comunidades enteras se están organizando para defender este derecho y proteger la voz de cada votante. Pero este trabajo no lo podemos hacer solos.
Por eso, le invitamos a unirse al **Comité Nacional Demócrata** y a **Latino Victory Fund** para una sesión informativa bilingüe sobre **“Conozca Sus Derechos al Votar”** el [**jueves 4 de diciembre a las 6 PM ET**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f07759c1aa&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
Durante esta sesión aprenderá sobre sus derechos en las cajas de votación, las protecciones legales disponibles y las acciones que estamos tomando para garantizar elecciones libres, justas y accesibles. Tenemos elecciones de segunda vuelta decisivas este diciembre, desde Nashville hasta Miami.
---
| [REGÍSTRESE AQUÍ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=29ea659a0c&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | |

---

body:

Maybe you overlooked question #2? | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/s/c/yXsnTcWst3DgmDRAEuKL8AJJeU-S4-xKIGY98DZ4vXqTN78LLFzjTuMb55AeTCj4iJ53wt8JsN6IahjRi-7mlVN3r7qxgPVyoNlCRmxgcCc1QWNtmducwKceSD_kGlFF6fA0odUNrydyCqCMfDy4zFOka_sVOucARWQcL5E-OJhPgniScosoG9RilcLn5kDUdxTlB0b4ORonBrQ9QQzfnb42d7Rla9Q8gS2AKa0oRYj1rAEgmFMAqpRrCGtznj0or8i68tNKCIVk7xpWTV1pSquK_bPXjLmpW1HY_wBvVzy2duLsT__5XA_FkbY-xGUHSU6M-q0edHIH7x5akjuC-jCP__9o8mnEvuIm5UfY70jZ8dBjjvmulr5E52kret50HWYlRgTLT_AlefTj2eqZmvKytb_YFi6I6EukJhBS5ExoUA7bvMW9nWVzKoDWy_xMYM1OR7bM1St3_I3V39uOrXfXZV9AFfKHskhfDIshflq4qIFqxW01fQw2YGBYRyN880Ed-Z6jQ23g-YWe0nJv1pdUWDSGo1_grGu0QHn_FiOhzscdzLfBKx44DQrNfBiK8M1GaFxHZkdFz7vHIb_00335mxWDaonw7vkdZg9jLvTfykOP2QPJV87rvm73kS0WCZxoBo2IqDf16LEEj8Ctll7GfYMNB4MQs60CSs5cBG_oBohjLr4dPSt-UnTzC7zXsEn7-akrd8lULHdT77D5q0Y9KUmNYDNtGxYyWOEVF6vk4Ffk1WZwJ1eI8sc6_Ve2sKLNHc62d6FvBYrqs3jkkUYtc7s/q4b4x3J52jz9nZTd6dKuHnXKfzymwOtm/15)
Top MAGA Patriot, I know you usually respond right away - that's why I was surprised not to see your December MAGA Survey yet.

**Maybe you overlooked Question #2?**
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/s/c/fnJ0g9vh2cOUKoVLMig-naykDmhOCvmsFfhSc1wBZyqL4QHveDbkPnN5aO79bJmznSkHa0BLRBgsdstaHP2aLIfch1KNCbMTY-SV8FjtgKBzoUiwpV8ZTbtz2LuTHu0ZKNgRwTNUiI_Wy0pTS0e8VBGvVPlju3zJxcAQ-As1z3oKU5d4NTVZTDRUW2e7_Lv3xc5Zfnqb1zfLbmR-JT-77To17CcPfdScnU2DvmUDTXx61ThYk_e0FmOcvlE-Uvv8VZSzQZNFMB75pvuQcK4G4Ljbn7Bn2Y5tIe_thCwAWD9oBh2A3Ai81JXvq50EfMtbjE7qMAzKIkUFfEr_L3mfW-se1dKbSVG7B1c_QKHS2zwaJ9Zr3yXLxaVNfgx_rQkypSGf5wH5ng6EYGouq6UZZtYHbMCzve1JJVdESOC8Sh2uBTKsVIbbFMBOeLV6Gy-zQw9fmRpDKPmKjYHE-okHKc0IyMhGVvC8z1Gb3vCGjRF1z7igeWa_JxaXIl4evXnBXp-0ij4AwDERNhKEuZ1MMEpnbuVrcCWxZDSI40N01KiIlxPoUZ451r_d5ykDV-cBIi-r8ddQaaghlSQtqvy1AjSJJygPLel4dqgzsuJUrroQIQdWMwgUYRo_8xP1mQjUhmtlqvoeFFBmFraxojr-JMA2bZbHcrnU1CTKn-QXQnd1mkSWpEe-35BZX9g25_B84Iu69YSHBFDRqqn-jCBEXiscIVJn4nhZw0P5v6f-GwKJa7FlQGWK-_VbjfiGHZVZFopUbVmkbYPVp3Gg0L-iC9fG96o/cgzWKI7TFTxoirzMjNjnSXJVBbikzaDL/15)
Question #2 is the ONLY required question because it's critical.

body:

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Facing a real Christmas crunch
body:
It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because **BRAVE Books** is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... **[...I thought you'd want to be one of the first to know what's going on.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkc2umzAQhZ_G7Bz5H7JgkVzCbRapqqiiS8vYQ2IV7Mg29PUrot4H6G7m6MxI5zu_bvpm_OzD47tZoLWb1ynryVgfHiaBme0z-VwWk21ag9WMMIkpw4TuPlq51jrFWQUtrZVQVNRMVc-2lpMlEhxppmk8OgAniKtHoxrpajqKyrf7J8oIpY2QjB_AjsoxB5aSyQGpkSDry5kC-WBjyJA2U_wGPoS4TzEcbFyquX2W8sqInxDrEesz2DXBwQRwsewOxPoxmQ3wGOPvjFgvyVFKJRTmYGos2DhhYxuByaSO7NgQWR8bxPu1LDrHNVlAvDt3n_h-GRBTu7yA8-uCeHe5_VOsWV7GPwLi3TsVZVKfu099vp-Gi75df357r_fLoH-c8Mdw_bqLoUAoiHcfwxV_AalS615__Dz7rHYMj8X4-Z22_H8_W8v-BgAA__9L1ZmB) ** **Friend, BRAVE Books** has introduced _Mouse in the House_ as a Christian alternative to that other secular "Christmas" game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to "spy" on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa's gifts. My friends at**BRAVE Books** knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created _Mouse in the House_ to help parents emphasize the joy of _giving_ more than _getting_ in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,___Mouse in the House_ sold out in THREE HOURS! Friend, I know it's only November, but this year we don't want to turn any families away because of unexpectedly high demand.
---
| | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkc2umzAQhZ_G7Bz5H7JgkVzCbRapqqiiS8vYQ2IV7Mg29PUrot4H6G7m6MxI5zu_bvpm_OzD47tZoLWb1ynryVgfHiaBme0z-VwWk21ag9WMMIkpw4TuPlq51jrFWQUtrZVQVNRMVc-2lpMlEhxppmk8OgAniKtHoxrpajqKyrf7J8oIpY2QjB_AjsoxB5aSyQGpkSDry5kC-WBjyJA2U_wGPoS4TzEcbFyquX2W8sqInxDrEesz2DXBwQRwsewOxPoxmQ3wGOPvjFgvyVFKJRTmYGos2DhhYxuByaSO7NgQWR8bxPu1LDrHNVlAvDt3n_h-GRBTu7yA8-uCeHe5_VOsWV7GPwLi3TsVZVKfu099vp-Gi75df357r_fLoH-c8Mdw_bqLoUAoiHcfwxV_AalS615__Dz7rHYMj8X4-Z22_H8_W8v-BgAA__9L1ZmB)
---

| | You understand that **BRAVE Books** is fighting to restore our culture because we can't just give up and let the radicals erase America's Judeo-Christian values. >>> Your support has already helped get "See You at the Library" kits to thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens who gathered at over 201 libraries in 46 states (including the Library of Congress!) to take back our libraries. Together, we countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. >>> Your last gift helped us finish filming TWO whole seasons of our historic TV show "Iggy and Mr. Kirk." This is the very first television show funded by everyday Americans to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. "Iggy and Mr. Kirk" is our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" that uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great. >>> And now you are the difference between success and failure with our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign. Just look at what parents have already said about our _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle that comes with a beautiful book and adorable stuffed mouse:
---
_" So thankful for a thoughtful new Christmas tradition for our children. The story is sweet, the explanation of Christmas is poignant, and the mouse is so adorable. Thank you, Brave Books!!!" -- Jenae K. _ _" I love the Godly service ideas!" - Susan _ _" I love the Mouse in the House. The giving nature of the story reflects the theme of the Christmas season." - Kat F._
---
**Friend, parents are hungry for Godly content that helps them counter the wicked culture.** **And your support helps BRAVE Books supply it. ** **[Your gift of $35, $50 or even $100 not only helps fund our"_More Mouse in the House_ _!_ " campaign... ](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkc2umzAQhZ_G7Bz5H7JgkVzCbRapqqiiS8vYQ2IV7Mg29PUrot4H6G7m6MxI5zu_bvpm_OzD47tZoLWb1ynryVgfHiaBme0z-VwWk21ag9WMMIkpw4TuPlq51jrFWQUtrZVQVNRMVc-2lpMlEhxppmk8OgAniKtHoxrpajqKyrf7J8oIpY2QjB_AjsoxB5aSyQGpkSDry5kC-WBjyJA2U_wGPoS4TzEcbFyquX2W8sqInxDrEesz2DXBwQRwsewOxPoxmQ3wGOPvjFgvyVFKJRTmYGos2DhhYxuByaSO7NgQWR8bxPu1LDrHNVlAvDt3n_h-GRBTu7yA8-uCeHe5_VOsWV7GPwLi3TsVZVKfu099vp-Gi75df357r_fLoH-c8Mdw_bqLoUAoiHcfwxV_AalS615__Dz7rHYMj8X4-Z22_H8_W8v-BgAA__9L1ZmB)** Your gift helps **BRAVE Books** complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools. Friend, nothing we accomplish is possible without you. And that's why as a thank you for being such a faithful and faith-filled friend, when you contribute $100 or more to our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign... ...we will send one out to you absolutely free. You can keep the _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle for your family, you can gift it to someone you love... ...or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. [**Friend, what 's most important is that you rush back your best gift of $35, $50, or even $100 in the next 24 hours.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkc2umzAQhZ_G7Bz5H7JgkVzCbRapqqiiS8vYQ2IV7Mg29PUrot4H6G7m6MxI5zu_bvpm_OzD47tZoLWb1ynryVgfHiaBme0z-VwWk21ag9WMMIkpw4TuPlq51jrFWQUtrZVQVNRMVc-2lpMlEhxppmk8OgAniKtHoxrpajqKyrf7J8oIpY2QjB_AjsoxB5aSyQGpkSDry5kC-WBjyJA2U_wGPoS4TzEcbFyquX2W8sqInxDrEesz2DXBwQRwsewOxPoxmQ3wGOPvjFgvyVFKJRTmYGos2DhhYxuByaSO7NgQWR8bxPu1LDrHNVlAvDt3n_h-GRBTu7yA8-uCeHe5_VOsWV7GPwLi3TsVZVKfu099vp-Gi75df357r_fLoH-c8Mdw_bqLoUAoiHcfwxV_AalS615__Dz7rHYMj8X4-Z22_H8_W8v-BgAA__9L1ZmB) **BRAVE Books** is working round the clock to get enough _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundles produced and all the orders filled in time. Friend, THANK YOU for helping. **BRAVE Books** would have no chance of beating Hollywood, giant left-leaning publishers, and big government-funded libraries and schools without you. Thank you for taking a minute to help with our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign. You're bringing the true meaning of Christmas to families all across America. Thank you and may God bless you and God bless America,
---
| | Sincerely,
---

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Friend, it's only November and we're already in a Christmas crunch! Families are clamoring for our _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle to counter the Left's secular interpretation of this most blessed season. [**Your donation of $35, $50, or even $100 helps us fill all our Mouse in the House orders in time to help parents teach giving not getting this Christmas.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkc2umzAQhZ_G7Bz5H7JgkVzCbRapqqiiS8vYQ2IV7Mg29PUrot4H6G7m6MxI5zu_bvpm_OzD47tZoLWb1ynryVgfHiaBme0z-VwWk21ag9WMMIkpw4TuPlq51jrFWQUtrZVQVNRMVc-2lpMlEhxppmk8OgAniKtHoxrpajqKyrf7J8oIpY2QjB_AjsoxB5aSyQGpkSDry5kC-WBjyJA2U_wGPoS4TzEcbFyquX2W8sqInxDrEesz2DXBwQRwsewOxPoxmQ3wGOPvjFgvyVFKJRTmYGos2DhhYxuByaSO7NgQWR8bxPu1LDrHNVlAvDt3n_h-GRBTu7yA8-uCeHe5_VOsWV7GPwLi3TsVZVKfu099vp-Gi75df357r_fLoH-c8Mdw_bqLoUAoiHcfwxV_AalS615__Dz7rHYMj8X4-Z22_H8_W8v-BgAA__9L1ZmB) And as a thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own _Mouse in the House_ for your family! # Trump says he has picked his new Fed Chairman.
President Donald Trump revealed Sunday **[he's selected his successor](https://substack.com/redirect/ef888ddc-a560-4c1b-9445-585e49a67aeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell amid surging U.S. affordability woes, teasing an imminent announcement.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ef888ddc-a560-4c1b-9445-585e49a67aeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Frontrunners Emerge Boldly** : Top candidates include advisor Kevin Hassett, ready to "happily serve," alongside Fed Governor Christopher Waller and ex-Governor Kevin Warsh, vetted by Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent since Labor Day.
* **Powell 's Tenure Winds Down**: Powell's term ends in May 2026, after clashing with the president over slow rate cuts to combat inflation-driven household squeezes like mortgages and car loans.
* **Forward Policy Pivot Looms** : Bessent seeks a "forward-looking" regulator to align with Trump's agenda, potentially bridging White House-Fed rifts, with the pick slated before Christmas to reshape monetary strategy.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/23131745-042c-4383-ac8d-89db377ee573?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Nutrition and Healing](https://substack.com/redirect/1442324c-9e79-449b-8d7e-5253b7b9f461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [You won't see ](https://substack.com/redirect/1442324c-9e79-449b-8d7e-5253b7b9f461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/1442324c-9e79-449b-8d7e-5253b7b9f461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ in any history book...](https://substack.com/redirect/1442324c-9e79-449b-8d7e-5253b7b9f461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1442324c-9e79-449b-8d7e-5253b7b9f461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But after becoming the first man to set foot on the moon...

Neil Armstrong reported a **[strange encounter](https://substack.com/redirect/1442324c-9e79-449b-8d7e-5253b7b9f461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he had in space during a post-mission debrief.And he wasn't the only astronaut to experience it.

NASA did their best to keep it secret...But now, unearthed **[NASA audio](https://substack.com/redirect/1442324c-9e79-449b-8d7e-5253b7b9f461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is blowing the lid off of everything.

**[This official Apollo recording](https://substack.com/redirect/1442324c-9e79-449b-8d7e-5253b7b9f461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is only seconds long, but it will chill you to the bone.

P.S. Of all the moon landing conspiracies, **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/1442324c-9e79-449b-8d7e-5253b7b9f461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could be the most incredible. Get the full truth **[HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/1442324c-9e79-449b-8d7e-5253b7b9f461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** now while it's still publicly available.
[Watch the video here](https://substack.com/redirect/1442324c-9e79-449b-8d7e-5253b7b9f461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Bitcoin and Ethereum suffer a brutal downturn
Bitcoin and Ethereum **[tumbled sharply Monday,](https://substack.com/redirect/46279f10-c60d-4349-8b6b-ff98fa89f007?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** dropping to $83,941 and $2,725 respectively, as a $400 million liquidation wave reignited crypto's volatile sell-off amid global risk-off jitters and China's digital currency crackdown warning.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/46279f10-c60d-4349-8b6b-ff98fa89f007?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Massive Liquidations Trigger Panic** : Over $400 million in crypto positions were liquidated on exchanges, fueled by extreme leverage bets of up to 200x and $787 billion in outstanding futures bets against just $135 billion in ETFs.
* **China 's Warning Sparks Retreat**: The People's Bank of China flagged illegal digital currency activities Saturday, hammering Hong Kong-listed crypto firm shares and amplifying Monday's global downturn.
* **Retail Frenzy Drives Volatility** : Expert Ben Emons calls the plunge "predominantly retail driven," contrasting institutional calm, with nervous traders eyeing more liquidations unless Bitcoin rebounds from lows.
* **Macro Shadows Loom Large** : The sell-off mirrors broader market nerves over U.S. rate cut uncertainty and AI stock valuations, boosting Bitcoin's ties to volatile Nasdaq amid November's bumpy ride.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0273221d-80b5-409a-b4fa-cbd439688f0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
* * *
# Swiss police raid major bank over $2B laundering scandal
Swiss prosecutors indicted a former Credit Suisse compliance officer Tuesday for allegedly **[enabling $7.9 million in laundered funds](https://substack.com/redirect/c1be1742-c0ab-4db6-8046-c3438aa2df42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** tied to Mozambique's infamous $2 billion "tuna bond" scandal, charging the bank--now absorbed by competitor UBS--with failing to thwart the scheme despite glaring red flags in 2013.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c1be1742-c0ab-4db6-8046-c3438aa2df42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Indictment Targets Key Insider** : The former compliance officer ignored felony indicators on 2013 fund transfer from Mozambique's finance ministry to a Swiss account, advising against mandatory reporting.
* **Bank 's Delayed Disclosure**: Credit Suisse withheld the suspicious activity report until 2019, only after U.S. Justice Department exposed the scandal's loan fraud six years post-issuance.
* **UBS Faces Criminal Heat** : As Credit Suisse's 2023 merger successor, UBS rejects prosecutorial claims of negligence and vows an aggressive legal defense against liability charges.
* **Echoes Broader Banking Woes** : The case is the latest in a series of persistent compliance lapses that contributed to Credit Suisse's downfall, including the notorious Archegos implosion, the fines of which are still burdening UBS's balance sheet.

* * *
* * *
# Goldman Sachs goes on a $2 Billion dollar buying spree
Wall Street titan Goldman Sachs announced Monday it **[will acquire Innovator Capital Management,](https://substack.com/redirect/5541f607-495d-4f55-89a7-25fe232514c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** a Chicago-based innovator in defined-outcome exchange-traded funds, for about $2 billion to supercharge its asset management empire amid booming demand for risk-buffered investments.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5541f607-495d-4f55-89a7-25fe232514c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Deal Targets ETF Expansion** : Acquisition of Innovator's 159 defined-outcome ETFs, using options for downside protection and targeted gains, directly bolsters Goldman's active ETF portfolio in a high-growth market.
* **Massive Assets Integration** : Innovator brings $28 billion in supervised assets as of late September, seamlessly folding into Goldman's division to enhance client access to innovative public investment tools.
* **Talent Boost Incoming** : Over 60 Innovator employees will join Goldman's asset management team post-closure, injecting specialized expertise to drive product development and competitive edge.
* **Strategic Pivot Accelerates** : Following their $1B T. Rowe Price stake and Industry Ventures buyout, this $2B move underscores Goldman's aggressive 2025 push into alternative investments, eyeing Q2 2026 for completion.

* * *
* * *
# Bessent moves to end federal tax breaks for illegal after DOJ rule change
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced Thursday that the department is moving swiftly to **[strip illegal immigrants of key federal tax credits](https://substack.com/redirect/6c8e68e5-9ed9-4b2b-aed3-344f129da6dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , including the Earned Income Tax Credit and Child Tax Credit refunds, fulfilling President Donald Trump's mandate to reserve benefits solely for U.S. citizens.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6c8e68e5-9ed9-4b2b-aed3-344f129da6dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Targeting Refundable Credits** : Proposed rules will eliminate access to Earned Income Tax Credit, Additional Child Tax Credit, American Opportunity Tax Credit, and Saver's Match Credit for non-qualified aliens starting tax year 2026.
* **Bolstering Financial Safeguards** : FinCEN alert mandates banks report suspicious transactions over $2,000 tied to illicit funds from illegal immigrants, curbing exploitation of U.S. institutions.
* **Legal Foundation Established** : Justice Department's recent opinion reclassifies refundable tax portions as "federal public benefits," barring undocumented individuals per existing law.
* **Broader Immigration Overhaul** : Initiative aligns with Trump's crackdown, including plans to halt migration from "Third World Countries" after a fatal attack by a Biden-era resettled Afghan national.

* * *
* * *
# Solar flare glitch grounds 6,000 Airbus Jets
Thousands of holiday travelers worldwide were stranded Friday when Airbus **[grounded over 6,000 A320](https://substack.com/redirect/94b70b05-d29b-4e6f-9721-4b8ce359dd2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** jets amid a massive software recall triggered by a solar flare-linked glitch that caused a JetBlue plane to abruptly pitch down in October, prompting emergency directives from U.S. and European regulators.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/94b70b05-d29b-4e6f-9721-4b8ce359dd2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Massive Fleet Recall Issued** : Airbus's unprecedented Emergency Airworthiness Directive targets 6,000 A320-series aircraft for urgent software fixes, marking one of the largest safety actions in aviation history.
* **Holiday Chaos Unfolds Globally** : Cancellations hit hard in Asia and Australia, with Japan's ANA scrapping 95 flights for 13,200 passengers and Australia's Jetstar axing 90 flights.
* **U.S. Carriers Swiftly Respond** : American Airlines updated all 209 affected planes by Saturday noon, while United faced minor hiccups on six jets and Delta managed under 50 with limited delays.
* **Rapid Fixes Ease Strain** : Operators like Air India and Scoot completed over 40% of updates without cancellations, aiming for full resumption to restore normal short-haul networks.

* * *

The financial world holds its breath for who will replace Powell | | | Dec 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello Capitalists, Here is everything you should be following today: Trump says he's picked his new Fed Chair Bitcoin suffers another brutal day Swiss police raid major bank over 12 year money laundering case Goldman Sachs goes on a $2B dollar buying spree Bessent moves to end Federal Benefits for illegals after DOJ opinion Today 's markets + assets: 🔴 DOW: 47557.75 (⬇️ 0.33%) 🔴 S&P: 6840.60 (⬇️ 0.13%) 🔴 NASDAQ: 23339.16 (⬇️ 0.12%) ⚠ ️✅CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 16.64 (⬆️ 1.83%) ✅ Gold: $4272.9.20 (⬆️ 0.43%) ✅ Silver: $59.16 (⬆️ 3.49%) 🔴 Bitcoin: $84,720 (⬇️ 1.27%) The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left-Wing Journalism Trump says he has picked his new Fed Chairman. President Donald Trump revealed Sunday to Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell amid surging U.S. affordability woes, teasing an imminent announcement. | | ---|---|--- Frontrunners Emerge Boldly : Top candidates include advisor Kevin Hassett, ready to "happily serve," alongside Fed Governor Christopher Waller and ex-Governor Kevin Warsh, vetted by Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent since Labor Day. Powell 's Tenure Winds Down: Powell's term ends in May 2026, after clashing with the president over slow rate cuts to combat inflation-driven household squeezes like mortgages and car loans. Forward Policy Pivot Looms : Bessent seeks a "forward-looking" regulator to align with Trump's agenda, potentially bridging White House-Fed rifts, with the pick slated before Christmas to reshape monetary strategy. | | ---|---|--- But after becoming the first man to set foot on the moon... Neil Armstrong reported a he had in space during a post-mission debrief.And he wasn't the only astronaut to experience it. NASA did their best to keep it secret...But now, unearthed is blowing the lid off of everything. is only seconds long, but it will chill you to the bone. P.S. Of all the moon landing conspiracies, could be the most incredible. Get the full truth now while it's still publicly available. Bitcoin and Ethereum suffer a brutal downturn Bitcoin and Ethereum dropping to $83,941 and $2,725 respectively, as a $400 million liquidation wave reignited crypto's volatile sell-off amid global risk-off jitters and China's digital currency crackdown warning. | | ---|---|--- Massive Liquidations Trigger Panic : Over $400 million in crypto positions were liquidated on exchanges, fueled by extreme leverage bets of up to 200x and $787 billion in outstanding futures bets against just $135 billion in ETFs. China 's Warning Sparks Retreat: The People's Bank of China flagged illegal digital currency activities Saturday, hammering Hong Kong-listed crypto firm shares and amplifying Monday's global downturn. Retail Frenzy Drives Volatility : Expert Ben Emons calls the plunge "predominantly retail driven," contrasting institutional calm, with nervous traders eyeing more liquidations unless Bitcoin rebounds from lows. Macro Shadows Loom Large : The sell-off mirrors broader market nerves over U.S. rate cut uncertainty and AI stock valuations, boosting Bitcoin's ties to volatile Nasdaq amid November's bumpy ride. Swiss police raid major bank over $2B laundering scandal Swiss prosecutors indicted a former Credit Suisse compliance officer Tuesday for allegedly tied to Mozambique's infamous $2 billion "tuna bond" scandal, charging the bank--now absorbed by competitor UBS--with failing to thwart the scheme despite glaring red flags in 2013. | | ---|---|--- Indictment Targets Key Insider : The former compliance officer ignored felony indicators on 2013 fund transfer from Mozambique's finance ministry to a Swiss account, advising against mandatory reporting. Bank 's Delayed Disclosure: Credit Suisse withheld the suspicious activity report until 2019, only after U.S. Justice Department exposed the scandal's loan fraud six years post-issuance. UBS Faces Criminal Heat : As Credit Suisse's 2023 merger successor, UBS rejects prosecutorial claims of negligence and vows an aggressive legal defense against liability charges. Echoes Broader Banking Woes : The case is the latest in a series of persistent compliance lapses that contributed to Credit Suisse's downfall, including the notorious Archegos implosion, the fines of which are still burdening UBS's balance sheet. Goldman Sachs goes on a $2 Billion dollar buying spree Wall Street titan Goldman Sachs announced Monday it a Chicago-based innovator in defined-outcome exchange-traded funds, for about $2 billion to supercharge its asset management empire amid booming demand for risk-buffered investments. | | ---|---|--- Deal Targets ETF Expansion : Acquisition of Innovator's 159 defined-outcome ETFs, using options for downside protection and targeted gains, directly bolsters Goldman's active ETF portfolio in a high-growth market. Massive Assets Integration : Innovator brings $28 billion in supervised assets as of late September, seamlessly folding into Goldman's division to enhance client access to innovative public investment tools. Talent Boost Incoming : Over 60 Innovator employees will join Goldman's asset management team post-closure, injecting specialized expertise to drive product development and competitive edge. Strategic Pivot Accelerates : Following their $1B T. Rowe Price stake and Industry Ventures buyout, this $2B move underscores Goldman's aggressive 2025 push into alternative investments, eyeing Q2 2026 for completion. Bessent moves to end federal tax breaks for illegal after DOJ rule change Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced Thursday that the department is moving swiftly to , including the Earned Income Tax Credit and Child Tax Credit refunds, fulfilling President Donald Trump's mandate to reserve benefits solely for U.S. citizens. | | ---|---|--- Targeting Refundable Credits : Proposed rules will eliminate access to Earned Income Tax Credit, Additional Child Tax Credit, American Opportunity Tax Credit, and Saver's Match Credit for non-qualified aliens starting tax year 2026. Bolstering Financial Safeguards : FinCEN alert mandates banks report suspicious transactions over $2,000 tied to illicit funds from illegal immigrants, curbing exploitation of U.S. institutions. Legal Foundation Established : Justice Department's recent opinion reclassifies refundable tax portions as "federal public benefits," barring undocumented individuals per existing law. Broader Immigration Overhaul : Initiative aligns with Trump's crackdown, including plans to halt migration from "Third World Countries" after a fatal attack by a Biden-era resettled Afghan national. Solar flare glitch grounds 6,000 Airbus Jets Thousands of holiday travelers worldwide were stranded Friday when Airbus jets amid a massive software recall triggered by a solar flare-linked glitch that caused a JetBlue plane to abruptly pitch down in October, prompting emergency directives from U.S. and European regulators. | | ---|---|--- Massive Fleet Recall Issued : Airbus's unprecedented Emergency Airworthiness Directive targets 6,000 A320-series aircraft for urgent software fixes, marking one of the largest safety actions in aviation history. Holiday Chaos Unfolds Globally : Cancellations hit hard in Asia and Australia, with Japan's ANA scrapping 95 flights for 13,200 passengers and Australia's Jetstar axing 90 flights. U.S. Carriers Swiftly Respond : American Airlines updated all 209 affected planes by Saturday noon, while United faced minor hiccups on six jets and Delta managed under 50 with limited delays. Rapid Fixes Ease Strain : Operators like Air India and Scoot completed over 40% of updates without cancellations, aiming for full resumption to restore normal short-haul networks. New Breakthrough Solar
Generator – Demand
Skyrockets!** _**Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=wsfsmndhzt6yaftkm11alccktulanxblph4e0hibx18sberix6onmqw3xh30zrwze54mlif88h6q3ns2cv98nurnbmh7oe1ywbmoxyaf9gy49d9k8rm8m2dalc572ym1h8rj2o7pn3y5stp9kyg2ndgxl9x8m3g0qdlfoxvrg8vkjz01ta9dai2vi66umh44ndd47th3t3ctdgk2ur3dovdr0wvdm6fghh626fd5prmahtv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t6ltqv&__onlt=h) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=wsfsmndhzt6yaftkm11alccktulanxblph4e0hibx18sberix6onmqw3xh30zrwze54mlif88h6q3ns2cv98nurnbmh7oe1ywbmoxyaf9gy49d9k8rm8m2dalc572ym1h8rj2o7pn3y5stp9kyg2ndgxl9x8m3g0qdlfoxvrg8vkjz01ta9dai2vi66umh44ndd47th3t3ctdgk2ur3dovdr0wvdm6fghh626fd5prmahtv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t6ltqv&__onlt=h) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **NATIONAL SECURITY EXPERTS FEAR IMMINENT THREAT TO OUR POWER GRID** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... _Reminder:_ **Donald Trump's FBI Director, Kash Patel, is a QAnon supporter, conspiracy peddler, and die-hard MAGA loyalist.** Patel is entirely unqualified to lead the FBI, but luckily for him, that’s never been the criteria to serve in Trump’s cabinet. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | RFK Jr just dropped a bomb—and Washington is in panic. This isn't a rumor. Not speculation. These are facts the authorities are desperate to hide. They mocked him for saying the pandemic started in a lab. They sneered when he warned about microplastics in our bodies. They dismissed his claims of FDA corruption. But he was right. Always right. Now his latest warning is darker than anything before. Leaked documents reveal: America’s seniors are quietly being pushed into danger—mysterious illnesses, sudden collapses written off as “normal aging,” and millions funneling into risky prescriptions while the truth remains hidden. If you were born before January 1, 1965 , this is your personal risk. | | | Exclusive Partner Spotlights | (Sponsored) ---|--- Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: My 45-minute drive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1385%2E251025%2EgKOfbj ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1385%2E251025%2EgKOfbj ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251201-1-ak.t4tsem&amount=10&refcode=em20251201-1385&t=1003&akid=1385%2E251025%2EgKOfbj ]I’m emailing today to ask you to contribute
$10 and become a founding donor of our
people-powered campaign for Michigan.

But first, I want to tell you a story about how a 45-minute drive changed
my perspective on public health.

In college, I studied medicine. I went on to publish dozens of papers,
articles, and book chapters on illness. I eventually realized that
studying disease wasn’t enough. I wanted to solve the root cause of these
issues.

So, I pursued a path of public service to disrupt the status quo. As
Detroit’s Health Director, I led efforts to keep lead out of public
schools and provide free glasses to any child in Detroit city schools who
needs them. At the Wayne County Health Department, we installed 100 air
quality monitors so residents can see real-time data about the air they
breathe.

Here’s what shook me,
Peter:

When I’d drive the 45 minutes from my house in Ann Arbor to my office in
downtown Detroit, I’d cross almost a decade of life expectancy.

In Ann Arbor, where I’m raising my daughters, life expectancy is 80 years.
In downtown Detroit, just down the road, it’s nine years less.

That’s nine fewer years to laugh with your grandchildren. To grow old with
your partner. To build the life you deserve.

I’m running for Senate because this kind of injustice is baked into our
political system — and it doesn’t have to be.

We can build a government that invests in public health, takes on
corporate greed, and creates real opportunities for every Michigander, no
matter their zip code.

But we have to fight for it.

Mike Rogers and his billionaire backers will spend whatever it takes to
stop us from winning. That’s why I need your support as we get this
campaign off the ground:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251201-1-ak.t4tsem&amount=10&refcode=em20251201-1385&t=1004&akid=1385%2E251025%2EgKOfbj ]Will you donate $10 to our campaign so we can build a
people-powered movement strong enough to take on the billionaires and fix
this broken system?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251201-1-ak.t4tsem&amount=10&refcode=em20251201-1385&t=1023&akid=1385%2E251025%2EgKOfbj ]Donate $10 ››

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1385%2E251025%2EgKOfbj

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

name: Democratically
subject: Shutdown “surrender” sparks anger
body: Democrats debate their next steps after the deal. (https://democratically.org/) Peter Some Democrats are openly frustrated after the shutdown deal passed without securing health-care protections. The tension reflects the real stakes. Without renewed subsidies, health-care costs could double next year. Families can’t afford political missteps. Democrats are regrouping and pushing forward on legislation to shield working people from premium hikes and insurance gaps. Momentum must shift quickly. This is our one shot to shake up the map before 2026, and our special election here in Tennessee 's 7th is just around the corner. The New York Times has even called this "the unlikely new front in the fight for control of Congress." ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ We're coming down to the wire - and honestly, the GOP's quaking in their boots as they watch this grassroots movement grow day after day. Donald Trump's super PAC has entered the race to support my opponent. Countless other far-right super PACs and the national GOP are spending seven figures against me. The entire nation's watching this race, and the clock is ticking. We're in the final stretch, and this is where I need your help the most. ~~ Eyes on the prize, y'all, - Aftyn Behn | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

name: Happening now:
subject: Another blue state will redistrict to counter MAGA gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado
body:
Trump is betting that we won’t have the guts do this. They started it and we must finish it if we hope to survive until 2028 with our Democracy intact.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PnRjwVlWSByJyZEqtTsj9o0q6LR7MmhBDdjZM3hw_UNibn3LkhFaudqNFWtx-kulx2860BxSjqbnET9eponvxAK3PyfhonZobh179WSEP4rKgJjaXSfSwalJca6mgsx_ahSLndBpuTq7x8bJbxpdK1TQyroiAngnUJ1ZgbaYrWTpFzvSrlYr4WtBro2JzErEfddROgn_XQY5VkI6RrJ91lCjDKkUSKUFx2V_U-Lyov4=&c=mm3Y4U1Hjhgv7VnFMdMR294KOivgmB7U-2AbKalq91CKJRkPjhyZTw==&ch=vDVYq2wdk_HPobxk8Y9IFiRTsJ_8MhwE1EHEFW0ztiC_2SqMwVfpKQ==)

| Peter,
Donald Trump's brash decision to rig the maps in 2026 could backfire on him spectacularly.
Here's where things stand right now:
In November, California, under Gov. Gavin Newsom's leadership successfully passed a redistricting law in November which passed with 65% of the vote.
Then, Virginia Democrats announced a bold plan to redraw their maps and eliminate as many as 4-5 GOP seats.
But it's not nearly enough, with all of the red states Trump is gerrymandering, California and Virginia are but a drop in the bucket.
It is on us to pick up the torch from where they left off. With the GOP preparing a gerrymander in Florida that could take as many as a dozen seats, blue states like Colorado have a duty to redistrict and level the playing field. They started it and we must finish it if we hope to survive until 2028 with our Democracy intact.
Today Fair Fight Colorado launched the ballot initiative that will give Coloradans a chance to vote on redrawing Colorado's maps -- but our effort will be Dead On Arrival unless we can harness the grassroots energy and enthusiasm this situation calls for.
[Trump is betting that we won't have the guts do this. We have our backs to the wall and we desperately need your support to pull this off. We need as many people giving $25, $10, or whatever amount is meaningful to them, to make redistricting in Colorado a reality:](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PnRjwVlWSByJyZEqtTsj9o0q6LR7MmhBDdjZM3hw_UNibn3LkhFaudqNFWtx-kulipQQGjr5Yhhzj56E6lwegtsB8JS2tGQUxFjNkRKNtueCilwVALIaV2gp61t5gv_3iKGnY2FRQX96UCPUEDyS1IS_-06vr7HDQN1Yg-xAq-o75_WFfQ8K0euIBWzu4vacAhg8NjMrodaD5nICqPP2mbc2HEEtNW778xfp7mFx9cu2EjP21EYVXQ==&c=mm3Y4U1Hjhgv7VnFMdMR294KOivgmB7U-2AbKalq91CKJRkPjhyZTw==&ch=vDVYq2wdk_HPobxk8Y9IFiRTsJ_8MhwE1EHEFW0ztiC_2SqMwVfpKQ==)

clean_body: Trump is betting that we won’t have the guts do this. They started it and we must finish it if we hope to survive until 2028 with our Democracy intact. | | | | | == | Peter, Donald Trump's brash decision to rig the maps in 2026 could backfire on him spectacularly. Here's where things stand right now: In November, California, under Gov. Gavin Newsom's leadership successfully passed a redistricting law in November which passed with 65% of the vote. Then, Virginia Democrats announced a bold plan to redraw their maps and eliminate as many as 4-5 GOP seats. But it's not nearly enough, with all of the red states Trump is gerrymandering, California and Virginia are but a drop in the bucket. It is on us to pick up the torch from where they left off. With the GOP preparing a gerrymander in Florida that could take as many as a dozen seats, blue states like Colorado have a duty to redistrict and level the playing field. They started it and we must finish it if we hope to survive until 2028 with our Democracy intact. Today Fair Fight Colorado launched the ballot initiative that will give Coloradans a chance to vote on redrawing Colorado's maps -- but our effort will be Dead On Arrival unless we can harness the grassroots energy and enthusiasm this situation calls for. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == | | | | We simply cannot afford to get squeamish when it comes to pushing back against Trump's effort to rig the maps and steal the 2026 midterms. The stakes are too high. name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: Send a letter to your Senator asking that they stop the SAVE Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
While the 2026 midterms might be the first election it would impact, the SAVE Act is really about all of our elections. Disenfranchising millions of voters isn't about " election security ," it's about elected officials choosing who gets to vote for them in an attempt to preserve their hold on power.
Please, send a letter to your Senator right now demanding that they oppose the SAVE Act before it is too late >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
Donald Trump recently pardoned top MAGA allies who aided his bid to subvert the 2020 election , including Rudy Giuliani, Mark Meadows, and dozens of others. This is another dangerous and embarrassing blow to American democracy from a White House dead set on rigging the 2026 midterms.
Trump has stacked his administration with election deniers who back his claim that the 2020 elections were stolen . These Trump loyalists are overseeing the midterms, and they’re dismantling systems meant to secure voting and striking fear into election officials.
Republicans in Congress are backing Trump’s power grab by pushing the SAVE Act — a devastating voter suppression bill that will make it harder for tens of millions of people to cast their ballots.
Send a message to your U.S. Senators: Stop the SAVE Act! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Trump has tried to make mail-in voting illegal and registering to vote extremely difficult . He so-called election monitors to California and New Jersey who could seize ballot boxes and fix the election for him. Governor Gavin Newsom said, “ Deploying these federal forces appears to be an intimidation tactic meant for one thing: Suppress the vote .”
Fueled by the far-right’s propaganda about so-called “non-citizen voting,” the SAVE Act would require people to prove that they’re citizens in order to vote by providing a birth certificate, passport, or naturalization papers. 21 million eligible voters don’t have these documents readily available.
Opponents of voting rights in the U.S. House already jammed the bill through , so we must stop it in the Senate.
Block Trump’s attempts to steal the 2026 midterms, add your name to oppose the SAVE Act today >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120125_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120125_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=i63jTg9zjaBsFWHOiU%2B7CcZUkFMxx9NT6tDqa7Ais0CJ%2FQmeF%2BPTNN9cxXGYvzKJU6qSTjPBA1FtvMqSlBN3pqecXctUVsfgvQ9yeaDXM1yTZeWKfzVAPx86%2Fn5bLcweeTMm4lZ85cvEfzu7Agj2CtChahwhoMVUInzHXTVmzroMwWboEas3OoYzVSCkIuORKqz5ikwp8UX2pPpckWCmlWGbY%2FBq98xleEfyQ94y9lRnTy8T9Vvg86WrERAFn6GFx3zvfdLfZ2s9QuHk1nxNBpF%2BJbDsoFGtoEujAxizV7q%2Bc%2BU5G7ZSs7kepybTtw4Lwlj0QrVHUNU3URWIj2GWvvy76E1Kv9SIHLW9VdlJzNhXPUMA%2FjOk2E7NmwajBDjwovdusPN%2FzyDbv9edAjr6AOgvfwH3mQRBJhdeV0%2FA6u8%3D .

Peter \- TOMORROW IS ELECTION DAY!
We need a huge fundraising night to fuel our final GOTV push, flip TN-07, and bring us closer to retaking a Democratic House in 2026.
But voting ends tomorrow night, so we're running out of time!
That's why we've set an ambitious $100,000 fundraising goal to power this last - and most critical - stretch.
If you've been waiting for the right time to step up, it's now or never. [So please, will you rush a $25 donation between my campaign and Trisha Calvarese, Lauren Boebert's Democratic opponent?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P7JPfITcuzmTFoBaX_VJz_k2A5o7X_oQDakQYQh_unhnLq5yjGmMde8QD8mfVPDhRz6lAwuzVBmsu5YEHb3z70zobnWYKq_hzGiTypd4rvGE8fcMccrL8_fL36LEgi-29aO9z9O3j0mJQGzLdMf6r0Sxk7NiubX6I7hd-ms6hehgqIGwsDdge07HEZu1M7HMlCJTJi6W1PEAgC2CKqMHgxBMA5uf-l02c83rh3Wk1CqSnQWnAegMb2Q7DEhzOizj&c=b89CQyvgXbgW9-lvs0UuD4Y4OpMk_Ja8LzyY3J9dlihvIPg5nwe5Lw==&ch=jBIStH7pHMALnueHGjYwvVmB843FWyRA1yy152N8u70PKj9ClOS2BA==)

TN-07 is a make-or-break for our fight to end the GOP's House Majority.
-> The New York Times even called our race "the unlikely new front in the fight for control of Congress."
-> And with the latest poll showing me neck-and-neck with Trump-ally Matt Van Epps, we're on the brink of victory!
-> But to secure a decisive win tomorrow, we need to give everything we've got until the very end. We've come too far to ease off now.
That's why hitting our $100,000 fundraising goal is so important.
[In a race this close and this consequential, we need all hands on deck. So can I count on you to chip in $25 between my campaign and Trisha Calvarese, Lauren Boebert's Democratic opponent, to help me flip TN-07 and slash the GOP's House Majority?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P7JPfITcuzmTFoBaX_VJz_k2A5o7X_oQDakQYQh_unhnLq5yjGmMde8QD8mfVPDhRz6lAwuzVBmsu5YEHb3z70zobnWYKq_hzGiTypd4rvGE8fcMccrL8_fL36LEgi-29aO9z9O3j0mJQGzLdMf6r0Sxk7NiubX6I7hd-ms6hehgqIGwsDdge07HEZu1M7HMlCJTJi6W1PEAgC2CKqMHgxBMA5uf-l02c83rh3Wk1CqSnQWnAegMbyhu3BN2oj9L&c=b89CQyvgXbgW9-lvs0UuD4Y4OpMk_Ja8LzyY3J9dlihvIPg5nwe5Lw==&ch=jBIStH7pHMALnueHGjYwvVmB843FWyRA1yy152N8u70PKj9ClOS2BA==)

name: Kate Berry
subject: Tomorrow is Giving TREESday! Triple your impact.
body:
https://www.savetheredwoods.org [https://www.savetheredwoods.org]
https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1 [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
Peter,
Across California, redwood forests are facing extraordinary change. From catastrophic megafires to extreme drought, the challenges are mounting, but so are the opportunities to restore balance.
Tomorrow is Giving Tuesday or as we know it at the League, Giving TREESday. To help us maximize impact through the Redwood Resilience Fund, two generous matches are coming together to TRIPLE your gift!
As someone who values California’s wild places, your first gift today will help launch a new chapter of restoration and resilience for the redwood forests.Make a gift today to set us on track to hit our goal and your gift will be matched 2:1! [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT NOW [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
We have an ambitious goal to raise $100,000 for the Redwood Resilience Fund by midnight tomorrow , so we’ll be ready to hit the ground running with solutions that help wildlife, forests, and communities adapt and thrive.
This is an exciting chance to make 3x the difference for the redwood forests of the future. From restoring fire-damaged sequoia groves to expanding public access to these extraordinary forests, we have big plans grounded in deep expertise. We need your support to turn this vision into a reality.
Give by midnight tomorrow! Your Giving TREESday gift will be triple-matched to make a difference for the redwood forests. [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
When you give to the Redwood Resilience Fund, you’re making sure that these forests—and those who call them home—remain sources of strength, hope, and life for generations to come.
Thanks for making triple the difference for the forest today, Peter.
Photo of Georgia Young [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/STRWL/STRWL/1/89574/images/Kate-Berry%201.png] Sincerely,
Kate Berry
Director of Annual Giving
Save the Redwoods League
Help restore and protect the redwoods
DONATE NOW [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
https://www.savetheredwoods.org [https://www.savetheredwoods.org]
Save the Redwoods League
111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor
San Francisco, CA 94104
United States

Peter \- TOMORROW IS ELECTION DAY!
We need a huge fundraising night to fuel our final GOTV push, flip TN-07, and bring us closer to retaking a Democratic House in 2026.
But voting ends tomorrow night, so we're running out of time!
That's why we've set an ambitious $100,000 fundraising goal to power this last - and most critical - stretch.
If you've been waiting for the right time to step up, it's now or never.[ ](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012kWEUh2-dzOfFlWbvOvweKMHMjGsyuukFJ0UNDXBVncH23j9IC3dsLwBrpakYoQLWq4Pci17YKCcmHZY54QPyxfSAkjsqR8Zf48Vt2dwmy8rG9V5hKPXU9JSn2MJrUFnVmZkKBRCIvbcqnVebRZpQYArR60rZ-IiHJVoN-0pkPpgATCeX55m1xzqLFAAgOR4HZW1A_7pDw01Jq3aThtvXmkuu5vvWPOFijWg8t6hKMhzPhc9AH-HPsmN43droq9F&c=nZKxLccIegm-QL2iVDodTWilziLGzkIeubmsGJ2N5wJu2273aIoi8w==&ch=GpIQTQ99D9-moUroxg4yk4hERspYGdeqANUP1lHTtVuFAXAmLAP3vw==)[So please, will you rush a $25 donation between my campaign and Trisha Calvarese, Lauren Boebert's Democratic opponent?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012kWEUh2-dzOfFlWbvOvweKMHMjGsyuukFJ0UNDXBVncH23j9IC3dsLwBrpakYoQLWq4Pci17YKCcmHZY54QPyxfSAkjsqR8Zf48Vt2dwmy8rG9V5hKPXU9JSn2MJrUFnVmZkKBRCIvbcqnVebRZpQYArR60rZ-IiHJVoN-0pkPpgATCeX55m1xzqLFAAgOR4HZW1A_7pDw01Jq3aThtvXmkuu5vvWPOFijWg8t6hKMhzPhc9AH-HPuAPQO6K4fMZ&c=nZKxLccIegm-QL2iVDodTWilziLGzkIeubmsGJ2N5wJu2273aIoi8w==&ch=GpIQTQ99D9-moUroxg4yk4hERspYGdeqANUP1lHTtVuFAXAmLAP3vw==)

TN-07 is a make-or-break for our fight to end the GOP's House Majority.
-> The New York Times even called our race "the unlikely new front in the fight for control of Congress."
-> And with the latest poll showing me neck-and-neck with Trump-ally Matt Van Epps, we're on the brink of victory!
-> But to secure a decisive win tomorrow, we need to give everything we've got until the very end. We've come too far to ease off now.
That's why hitting our $100,000 fundraising goal is so important.
[In a race this close and this consequential, we need all hands on deck. So can I count on you to chip in $25 between my campaign and Trisha Calvarese, Lauren Boebert's Democratic opponent, to help me flip TN-07 and slash the GOP's House Majority?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012kWEUh2-dzOfFlWbvOvweKMHMjGsyuukFJ0UNDXBVncH23j9IC3dsLwBrpakYoQLWq4Pci17YKCcmHZY54QPyxfSAkjsqR8Zf48Vt2dwmy8rG9V5hKPXU9JSn2MJrUFnVmZkKBRCIvbcqnVebRZpQYArR60rZ-IiHJVoN-0pkPpgATCeX55m1xzqLFAAgOR4HZW1A_7pDw01Jq3aThtvXmkuu5vvWPOFijWg8t6hKMhzPhc9AH-HPsSlFydEOmBX&c=nZKxLccIegm-QL2iVDodTWilziLGzkIeubmsGJ2N5wJu2273aIoi8w==&ch=GpIQTQ99D9-moUroxg4yk4hERspYGdeqANUP1lHTtVuFAXAmLAP3vw==)

name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: Your gift saves lives and shares the gospel
body:
For nearly two decades, PreBorn! has been standing in the gap for mothers and babies across the nation.

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkc2K3DAMx59Guc1gy4mTHnIYNqQUumVP22PQ2NqMIf7AdlL69iVl9gn2Jun_56ev36_LK7nNhfUXeR7N4ZZclr9xz6v7qIUOLps7uFCw5UF5QYHdReJFyNMXYsp8jzkssrGjsVphw6PsdavloBQ2j7EfBA6yHTTe-07zh9KkSdiWNbWGrWzceDIlCim_tZ0S19ZaxUNHopfmrjRCK_ZkqXK5mhgK54OqO9iFEM8ohquJvtnGR62pgLoBzoDz6g6-Pqc7DYDzMwOcKSWmrYCaiwE1vdx-SoHd9zdATb6CmjoNqNcCaiIG1Hv1S4l7NgxqSjmWxKa6sD4lz9btHtTEntz2LBryidwaQE2GNg6W8qcSQ-VwtnnH5e12eXn_cfm8QZNHm_64bXNF99CK9ST-X7B-5TnHiP8CAAD__-OHoZk)
