Hi Advocate for Life, For nearly two decades, **PreBorn!** has been standing in the gap for mothers and babies across the nation. We do two simple but powerful and life-changing things: We help women in crisis **see their babies and hear their heartbeats through free ultrasounds** , and we offer **gospel-centered, compassionate care** at our Network Clinics. Those two things change everything and we can't do them without people like you. When a mother hears her child's heartbeat for the first time, fear gives way to faith.

A tiny miracle begins the story of a mighty future.

Hope breaks through the darkness. Your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and shares the love of Christ with a woman in need. As our thank-you for your gift, you'll receive the [**_Tiny Miracles, Mighty Futures 2026 Calendar_**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkc2K3DAMx59Guc1gy4mTHnIYNqQUumVP22PQ2NqMIf7AdlL69iVl9gn2Jun_56ev36_LK7nNhfUXeR7N4ZZclr9xz6v7qIUOLps7uFCw5UF5QYHdReJFyNMXYsp8jzkssrGjsVphw6PsdavloBQ2j7EfBA6yHTTe-07zh9KkSdiWNbWGrWzceDIlCim_tZ0S19ZaxUNHopfmrjRCK_ZkqXK5mhgK54OqO9iFEM8ohquJvtnGR62pgLoBzoDz6g6-Pqc7DYDzMwOcKSWmrYCaiwE1vdx-SoHd9zdATb6CmjoNqNcCaiIG1Hv1S4l7NgxqSjmWxKa6sD4lz9btHtTEntz2LBryidwaQE2GNg6W8qcSQ-VwtnnH5e12eXn_cfm8QZNHm_64bXNF99CK9ST-X7B-5TnHiP8CAAD__-OHoZk) __ filled with **scripture and a monthly prayer guide** to help you lift up mothers, babies, and the ministry of PreBorn! all year long in prayer.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkc2K3DAMx59Guc1gy4mTHnIYNqQUumVP22PQ2NqMIf7AdlL69iVl9gn2Jun_56ev36_LK7nNhfUXeR7N4ZZclr9xz6v7qIUOLps7uFCw5UF5QYHdReJFyNMXYsp8jzkssrGjsVphw6PsdavloBQ2j7EfBA6yHTTe-07zh9KkSdiWNbWGrWzceDIlCim_tZ0S19ZaxUNHopfmrjRCK_ZkqXK5mhgK54OqO9iFEM8ohquJvtnGR62pgLoBzoDz6g6-Pqc7DYDzMwOcKSWmrYCaiwE1vdx-SoHd9zdATb6CmjoNqNcCaiIG1Hv1S4l7NgxqSjmWxKa6sD4lz9btHtTEntz2LBryidwaQE2GNg6W8qcSQ-VwtnnH5e12eXn_cfm8QZNHm_64bXNF99CK9ST-X7B-5TnHiP8CAAD__-OHoZk)

name: Wes Moore
subject: Temper tantrums.
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1002%2E1086043%2EcXtnoN)
Peter, if there’s one thing I’ve learned from my time serving the people of Maryland as their Governor, it’s this:
**You can’t govern by throwing temper tantrums when you don’t get your way.**
Peter, that’s all I’ve seen come out of Trump’s Washington – policies based on fear and chaos, not love and compassion.
**That’s not how we do things in Maryland.**
I’m proud to be a governor who’s fighting to keep families fed, workers protected, and our schools fully funded – even when Washington tries to pull the rug out from under us.
But this isn’t a fight I can keep up alone. To keep on delivering for Marylanders, I need you with us.
**[Will you chip in $5 or $10 today to help us protect our progress and keep Maryland moving forward?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251201-1.FjrqID&refcode=em-20251201-1&t=2&akid=1002%2E1086043%2EcXtnoN)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251201-1.FjrqID&amount=5&refcode=em-20251201-1&t=21&akid=1002%2E1086043%2EcXtnoN)**
Glad to have you on board, Peter.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251201-1.FjrqID&refcode=em-20251201-1&t=22&akid=1002%2E1086043%2EcXtnoN)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251201-1&t=23&refcode2=1002_1086043_cXtnoN&akid=1002%2E1086043%2EcXtnoN)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=1002%2E1086043%2EcXtnoN)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1002%2E1086043%2EcXtnoN)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m proud to support Chris Pappas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
In this election we cannot afford to take anything for granted.
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251201_1_booker._Lw_KH&refcode=em20251201-1&t=1&akid=3799%2E582294%2EuFGsJv)
Hi, it's Senator Cory Booker.
**I am proud to support Chris Pappas to be the next U.S. Senator from New Hampshire.**
I have seen firsthand that Chris can be the kind of Senator that the people of New Hampshire need and deserve.
In this election, we cannot afford to take anything for granted. The GOP is targeting this seat and flooding his opponents with cash, while Chris relies on support from people like you. That's why I'm going to do everything I can to make sure that Chris wins this thing.
**[I hope you’ll join me in supporting Chris in this crucial race by pitching in $5 or whatever you can. Let’s win in New Hampshire.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251201_1_booker._Lw_KH&refcode=em20251201-1&t=2&akid=3799%2E582294%2EuFGsJv)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251201_1_booker._Lw_KH&amount=5&refcode=em20251201-1&t=21&akid=3799%2E582294%2EuFGsJv)**
With love and gratitude,
Cory Booker
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251201-1&t=22&refcode2=3799_582294_uFGsJv&akid=3799%2E582294%2EuFGsJv)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=3799%2E582294%2EuFGsJv)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=24&akid=3799%2E582294%2EuFGsJv)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3799%2E582294%2EuFGsJv)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

Hi there,
I’m Aftyn Behn – organizer, state rep, and pissed-off social worker who’s running in the last House race of 2025.
**This is our one shot to shake up the map before 2026, and our special election here in Tennessee’s 7th is tomorrow! **_The New York Times_ has even called this “the unlikely new front in the fight for control of Congress.”
**[If that’s all you need to hear, will you split a contribution between my campaign and Congressman Robert Garcia right now to flip this seat blue? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120366461/586052172/-1728571221?refcode=251201&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWMxYjhmNi1lZWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nT4SeX0RPZwl8Nm93hq5mcvTyXmFdSKs7d2h_s6M1mU=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120366462/586052173/-1728571221?refcode=251201&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWMxYjhmNi1lZWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nT4SeX0RPZwl8Nm93hq5mcvTyXmFdSKs7d2h_s6M1mU=)
We’re coming down to the wire – and honestly, the GOP’s quaking in their boots as they watch this grassroots movement grow day after day.
Donald Trump’s super PAC has entered the race to support my opponent.
Countless other far-right super PACs and the national GOP are spending seven figures against me.
The entire nation’s watching this race, and the clock is ticking. We’re in the final stretch, and this is where I need your help the most. **[Can I count on you to be in my corner and help me pull off a stunning upset tomorrow, December 2nd with a split contribution between my campaign and Robert Garcia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120366463/586052174/-1728571221?refcode=251201&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWMxYjhmNi1lZWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nT4SeX0RPZwl8Nm93hq5mcvTyXmFdSKs7d2h_s6M1mU=)**
Eyes on the prize, y'all.
—Aftyn Behn

---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78038&L=36566&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbW9uay1hcnJlc3RlZC1ieS1iaWRlbi1kb2otZmJpLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=1cc210b0cebb98a91a708f015b84bb7c2389f76cae72f0b28380f0e0e994a8c9) | **[Judicial Watch Files Federal Claim for Monk and Counsel Arrested by Biden DOJ/FBI](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78038&L=36566&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbW9uay1hcnJlc3RlZC1ieS1iaWRlbi1kb2otZmJpLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=1cc210b0cebb98a91a708f015b84bb7c2389f76cae72f0b28380f0e0e994a8c9)** In the early morning hours of October 13, 2022, heavily armed federal agents raided the St. Nicholas monastic complex in Marblehead, MA, and arrested Father Brian Andrew Bushell, 50, and General Counsel Tracey M.A. Stockton, 66. The Biden Justice Department accused Bushell of being a “purported” monk and alleged that he and Stockton improperly used Covid relief funds. USPS is under water yet again closing fiscal year 2025, which ended in September, with a net loss of $9 billion despite receiving a $916 million increase in operating revenue over 2024, for a total of $80.5 billion to perform its duties. Postmaster General David Steiner, who inherited a huge mess when he took over in July, says the USPS must explore new revenue opportunities to improve the agency’s business model. “More importantly, we must operate more efficiently and compete more effectively to best perform our public service mission,” he stressed. clean_body: The walls of government secrecy around the “Russiagate” scandal are tumbling down. In September, former FBI Director James Comey was indicted on charges of false statements and obstruction of Congress; a federal judge threw out the case this week but Attorney General Pam Bondi vowed “an immediate appeal.” T | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 1, 2025 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | The walls of government secrecy around the “Russiagate” scandal are tumbling down. In September, former FBI Director James Comey was indicted on charges of false statements and obstruction of Congress; a federal judge threw out the case this week but Attorney General Pam Bondi vowed “an immediate appeal.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for “hidden” records from former FBI Director James Comey’s era that were referenced during a Fox News interview with Deputy Director Dan Bongino (Judicial Watch v U.S. Department of Justice (No.1:25-cv-04047)). ---|--- | | | | | In the early morning hours of October 13, 2022, heavily armed federal agents raided the St. Nicholas monastic complex in Marblehead, MA, and arrested Father Brian Andrew Bushell, 50, and General Counsel Tracey M.A. Stockton, 66. The Biden Justice Department accused Bushell of being a “purported” monk and alleged that he and Stockton improperly used Covid relief funds. ---|--- | | | | | The bleeding continues full throttle at the U.S. Postal Service (USPS), the agency plagued by scandals for secretly spying on Americans that just a few years ago received a staggering $107 billion taxpayer bailout to mitigate its chronic losses. USPS is under water yet again closing fiscal year 2025, which ended in September, with a net loss of $9 billion despite receiving a $916 million increase in operating revenue over 2024, for a total of $80.5 billion to perform its duties. Postmaster General David Steiner, who inherited a huge mess when he took over in July, says the USPS must explore new revenue opportunities to improve the agency’s business model. “More importantly, we must operate more efficiently and compete more effectively to best perform our public service mission,” he stressed. ---|--- | | | Sedona Red Rock News The Sedona Police Department removed a policy on Oct. 7 that appeared to condone the use of firing warning shots by its officers as a means to gain compliance from suspects. It’s a tactic described by Judicial Watch Southwest Projects Coordinator Mark Spencer as “incredibly dangerous and is a city liability waiting to happen,” he wrote in August. “In police work we call this ‘Barney Fife firearms tactics.’ This policy [was] foolish because it is dangerous and costly for all involved.” Fox News House Oversight Committee Chairman James Comer, R-Ky., is urging Bill and Hillary Clinton to appear for the committee’s probe looking into Jeffrey Epstein's sex trafficking case. "Given their history with Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell, any attempt by the Clintons to avoid sitting for a deposition would be grounds to initiate contempt of Congress proceedings," Comer said. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

name: Chip
subject: Goodbye, Washington
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:

| | | **This is a war crime.** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm398ffJuxVHTsftkyjD-0c0niTUAQ9ccYYRaVZtRexKoaM1avta8auukW19kq1LUcN73UnfY1kcUfczphxPkkwWhiGzWV0B-7mVOF88jQ0QHi7BzEcN25XdXCkwG4162UmSlW-3bogxM1vvvlf7jblPD3uaxfwRvO2YoRiWZpSFTGbJtC8Akn0gowczjdcfx6E3nNzsu3Zp3hWb4HxGCyGafYbJfOqVC-cq6zGkXNlE3laSbZ4kfTWguII2A1lFdRQVp5os1mXHpMfpV-3-UqNMB/4m2/cwX2VYiwS_ydxbpPIViLHA/h0/h001.4xBBY_Uthy7jcELvQ3rf2rLJ1f86lhITbZlHOY5w1h8)
[Sign on to demand Congress investigate and IMPEACH Pete Hegseth!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm398ffJuxVHTsftkyjD-0c0niTUAQ9ccYYRaVZtRexKoaM1avta8auukW19kq1LUcN73UnfY1kcUfczphxPkkwWho_IxFcRroHG8XIwBej6tuzuXc6BGIF8WeuqvnY498sUiXBJdnr1v98QaR16PGlEVqzUiqyxQhLDTKQClid7jcMoRV0lGO9S7K53SOr3tC48Y6VyQOunJtYAkf5WFeOFQEdEHt5L3CRduT8HECKgfcUONPHm9nI6YsaA36kKkMsyo91hSEG6truZssN9D8eC9/4m2/cwX2VYiwS_ydxbpPIViLHA/h1/h001.XnGUCjMf8b1ahvaK-1kivtJ-mnziWa7FDwCROWTl8bo)**
* * *
**** Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, the embodiment of incompetence and bloodlust, personally ordered the bombing of over 22 vessels off Central and South America, resulting in the cold-blooded murder of more than 80 people. This is not national defense; it is a crime against humanity. Hegseth’s horrific “double tap” strike, [detailed](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbLiaHJ-U5TfDcFwGLuhaTVzkU294iRBPXCT7iEoj2lZcoSS0zwpJ3SGRWsyrAx5SwuaZ5eYN2OAe-PUDDlVVw9HGP4A0n9u81ZfFaDrqM9o6SIQbefyJewZwRKGQvG6MmYQ3TyHiPSQSkuEkrUx9hmSzLPMHlDSjAAt4bFgqRjE5UPMYHQQ20tl4VcTvCGJo6i0MoSGOG17nvwcRhvNdjV7WYqnMjI3nCEjY7mYPgSeCcnWjQmCCN1uq_LkUVEhnpL8ap2i0cVFO-BwUMliIlkULhNmiJm-9I22wIpFwvNCw7ZhXwSbRAfjiL3tV8gPOrvyk-SVDm1V-i30I3o_-BhS6A5TxihJ9aY6WWu7tEge/4m2/cwX2VYiwS_ydxbpPIViLHA/h2/h001.Q4pEIl7pIbqnc0F7-_m95BND5nGwaJwnijdMandCdMs) by the _Washington Post_ , was a second missile launched to deliberately execute two survivors clinging to wreckage. _This is the definition of a war crime, committed by a Cabinet Secretary who clearly believes he is above the law._ **The integrity of our republic is under direct attack, and the threat comes from within!** **[Sign the petition to DEMAND that Congress investigate and IMPEACH!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm398ffJuxVHTsftkyjD-0c0niTUAQ9ccYYRaVZtRexKoaM1avta8auukW19kq1LUcN73UnfY1kcUfczphxPkkwWhk0H1XwaXt_KBki5_FcV5b4jun8H9CRG6adW9KpHTZgKqtpckTjdxiPAluJWezLCbyqomzwf8XWBCNCTtaQlnfCJmmx0c_Ruia1706mGMO7AYKDl3tFSwBwIQBvDICQFHYXPDB7_z-0wl_UKvLDF-s4ZsFBXufSZ5pfZhjf3YfCnXCo4pWrmCqT_LEWy-xGQf/4m2/cwX2VYiwS_ydxbpPIViLHA/h3/h001.MmnU8bE-Fs1YTBG1724CAa2qV4EFKVRHBn73xEJMihs)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm398ffJuxVHTsftkyjD-0c0niTUAQ9ccYYRaVZtRexKoaM1avta8auukW19kq1LUcN73UnfY1kcUfczphxPkkwWhzBDZfkI2OOZwGdgkyPT-hO4tUH3e7h7Kw6IduUNsMlIJ6nsC5vqIF68FjoVaqvyCmfipAXLTdyxuTesZNhDA9Lk_3HLQ_UR5bPTXkNmjEaBxMsBVW6o_Qab4IrOvVzyDPyItu-Hxhe0sSLEqg9LG6ekBoaIPe9xzKnNytnIl_sCN-C4u3OAgHupM8eLilTdP/4m2/cwX2VYiwS_ydxbpPIViLHA/h4/h001.o7v0B-bg9Bi_ZbX6sUXS14dy-FVsSr0NdBG8FvMdkn8)

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm398ffJuxVHTsftkyjD-0c0niTUAQ9ccYYRaVZtRexKoaM1avta8auukW19kq1LUcN73UnfY1kcUfczphxPkkwWhpC7PUEFbJjISsJmtQEU6kQiiWK7wEkUpvjZjVFUSn0u-xS6Cf9kSvG1UAr3oLlV-KBaszMhHiikYFJmLwZsnjxeB61rJGCBtXYSKo5hlKrkI3ack9WwP_jkc1BUfN8VJHAx5pfgO-ch8v3jliVs6EWzp1SFhMpXbYU1B_A-9qqhClfsyyCfYIqkeA0Jpu4xB/4m2/cwX2VYiwS_ydxbpPIViLHA/h5/h001.cT5Kicg2ADf8Dh9Fmg7yXumsQMvFL2tMTTSgtxXyYsM)
To add insult to injury, this lawless official then publicly boasts about his lethal strikes on social media, treating the murder of human beings like a childish game, complete with cartoon celebratory posts and videos.
**We cannot allow this cavalier culture of cruelty to infect the highest levels of government. Hegseth is a murderer, a menace, and a national disgrace. He must be removed NOW.**
**[Add your name to tell Congress: they must immediately initiate impeachment proceedings against Secretary Hegseth!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm398ffJuxVHTsftkyjD-0c0niTUAQ9ccYYRaVZtRexKoaM1avta8auukW19kq1LUcN73UnfY1kcUfczphxPkkwWhpdS2lByOVe1nZ2PISpG0ECee8oczfeCPebjqGlnt8Ij0BkmkWN1Q3NTSyqiluHSvD_PTKsCIkQh-w_FhdFZ6alBqCLTQW0hlTK7bq9qyOvf4YVTJb7c0DN3GWsNwjmc30MHPbIgaoZllYSXYa6Qa1kAxb8QEh70QTuz7QjqKMO0Cm7wX7id0mCGMQslDg6hC/4m2/cwX2VYiwS_ydxbpPIViLHA/h6/h001.Rlk3yogPoeQxN3j1jC3DralZ__t90dqhxSDQUcIY3bo)**

clean_body: | | | This is a war crime. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, the embodiment of incompetence and bloodlust, personally ordered the bombing of over 22 vessels off Central and South America, resulting in the cold-blooded murder of more than 80 people. This is not national defense; it is a crime against humanity. Hegseth’s horrific “double tap” strike, by the Washington Post , was a second missile launched to deliberately execute two survivors clinging to wreckage. This is the definition of a war crime, committed by a Cabinet Secretary who clearly believes he is above the law. The integrity of our republic is under direct attack, and the threat comes from within! | To add insult to injury, this lawless official then publicly boasts about his lethal strikes on social media, treating the murder of human beings like a childish game, complete with cartoon celebratory posts and videos. We cannot allow this cavalier culture of cruelty to infect the highest levels of government. Hegseth is a murderer, a menace, and a national disgrace. He must be removed NOW. ** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: These priorities are actually not partisan at all.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Republicans are making a foolish mistake by saying they think that making investments in housing and energy are so-called 'Democrat priorities.'
Cutting the EPA as a 'Democrat priority.' Do you know what this country looked like before the EPA?
Rivers in rural areas were _on fire_ because of corporations poisoning the people who lived in those areas. Poor, middle-class communities getting poisoned and dumped on by corporations — like DuPont and 3M — pouring chemicals into these places.
Well, you know what?
**You're damn well right that it's a Democratic priority to keep people from getting poisoned** by identifying dangerous chemicals that are being dumped and causing cancer in people without their knowledge.
**You're damn right that it's a Democratic priority to bring down the cost of housing** , and mortgages, and rent.
**And you're damn right that it's a Democratic priority to raise the minimum wage in this country** to allow people to get a fair shot at the American dream.
If they want to say that's a 'Democratic priority' — they're right. And they are targeting all of us with this.
And it's important for us to remember that these priorities are actually _not partisan at all_.
They think all of this is about hurting Democrats — but what they are doing is choosing to hurt _Americans_.
We cannot allow it. Our movement will have to push back harder than ever.
[Stand with us in the fight by making a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251201.QOfqrY&refcode=em20251201-10306-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10306%2E2526796%2ERXOYJR)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251201.QOfqrY&refcode=em20251201-10306-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10306%2E2526796%2ERXOYJR)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251201?refcode=em20251201-10306-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=10306_2526796_RXOYJR&akid=10306%2E2526796%2ERXOYJR)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251201-10306-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=10306%2E2526796%2ERXOYJR)**

name: VoteVets
subject: Tell Congress: Investigate Pete Hegseth for War Crimes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The Law of War Manual from the Department of Defense is pretty direct here: “...orders to fire upon the shipwrecked would be clearly illegal.” It doesn’t get more cut and dry than that.
#
Peter —
The Washington Post has reported that Pete Hegseth gave an order to kill all of the occupants of the first Venezuelan boat struck in the Caribbean. Doing so required repeated attacks on the boat, even after it was destroyed and survivors were clinging to the wreckage.
If this is true, the Secretary of Defense is guilty of a war crime.
The Law of War Manual from the Department of Defense is pretty direct here: “...orders to fire upon the shipwrecked would be clearly illegal.”
It doesn’t get more cut-and-dry than that.
Up until now, there has been little appetite for bipartisan oversight of the Trump administration in Congress. Democrats have demanded it, and Republicans have been silent. That has to change, and it has to change now.
VoteVets is demanding that Congress investigate those orders.
[**Join VoteVets and tell Congress: Do your jobs, investigate Hegseth’s orders, and get answers.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251201_vv_war_crimes/?source=em251201-1-160&akid=34799%2E3013755%2EFQ8WXm)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251201_vv_war_crimes/?source=em251201-1-160&akid=34799%2E3013755%2EFQ8WXm)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

clean_body: We only have until midnight tonight... | Friend, Our grassroots support is truly incredible... Thousands of America First patriots just came through for me at the final hour to help us CRUSH our very first monthly goal since I launched my campaign for governor. But deadline be damned, we have to keep our foot on the gas and keep this momentum going. The race is already within the margin of error , and Hochul is LOSING more ground with every passing day! Polls now show a huge MAJORITY of New Yorkers – including New Yorkers from all political backgrounds – don’t want to see her reelected. However, Hochul, Mamdani, and their Democrat allies aren’t going to simply roll over and accept defeat. They’re flooding New York with MILLIONS OF DOLLARS to stall our surging momentum so they can keep Hochul and her new Far Left puppet-master Zohran Mamdani in power. To win a blue state like New York, we desperately need every dollar we can muster to counter their multimillion-dollar ad buys and take our own America First message directly to the voters. That’s why I’ve secured an internal 24-HOUR DEADLINE EXTENSION until 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to help us raise the additional funds required to level the playing field against Hochul and Mamdani. Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Put Hegseth in Prison](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tabb8e988-71cb-4d3d-bdaa-c2bdbb660d66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03592dc2-1e43-423e-9201-9f103e24910f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Note: you can also discuss this action on[our new Substack page](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11e6c533-7682-42d9-979c-ef697b9c2545/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ The White House has now [confirmed](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41345e13-0fcd-4174-a5ea-88c7adc50fce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) this report, and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth needs to be put on trial, and put in prison: _“White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt confirmed on Monday that Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth authorized the second, follow-up strike on an alleged drug boat in the Caribbean in September following a bombshell Washington Post report that claimed he ordered the military to “kill everybody.”_ _Leavitt told reporters at the White House press briefing that Hegseth authorized Adm. Frank Bradley to carry out the second strike, which reportedly killed two people who were hanging onto the burning vessel after an initial strike.” ([The Hill](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bbd1212-d1af-4d2d-b49e-cadc23d3e948/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ This appears to be either a war crime or an extrajudicial killing. Either one should get Hegseth put on trial. Deliberately killing survivors who represent no threat should not go unpunished -- particularly when war has not even been declared (in spite of how much the White House likes to talk in those terms). **[Add your name: “Pete Hegseth should be put on trial, and if guilty, sent to prison.”](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdaba5712-f5f4-4638-bff5-38554ffb12e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: I’m a Navy SEAL. Bernie just endorsed my opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. |

---
Fellow Conservative,

Last week, Bernie Sanders—the self-proclaimed democratic socialist—threw his full weight behind my opponent in the United States Senate contest in which we’re candidates.

In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ _**stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests.**_ ”

**Translation:** She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash.

That’s not leadership.

**That’s the socialism I fought against overseas.**

I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea.

_**I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach.**_

As a _**Navy SEAL Officer**_ , I deployed _**nine times**_ across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa.

I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security.

That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth.

Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in _**DECADES.**_

What I don’t have right now is money. _**[If you still believe capitalism is worth fighting for, would you please consider a small investment in my campaign today? $5 or even $10 will do if you can spare it.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2cb4731b45ce4545ad3766fd19914f2a&_e=PPZQPZGa1FAgBMMTT4-CIlEMg1kh1OQF7_6RYisOpmcvjKjBBHyhBgpJb3FgvlkDy9SO1bKAOrEkBzV8V4-lzWVYlRPYXwsECJpcU6hXCyNMxjRo09J2OdWZqZ67yOvy3BorSmk4cJR_K726pVkhNbE3NMm25lU1xqfOVOYd7v6QLopbP9HFdC_PT0j5Io4zLAUe__j_jV56lanptJuc6qDneCOFhuSMAIhECgfUkgK5MpumjYD-pVWlPwT9c9Nj4VeyZ0WUup-C18uNvdV1hStKJ1wZP0kF_SLyMPwbCoyPY_d61u42wuVZKtNrujJtYs0dVez9i-rcTGEmy2lj_vEcH_Ghg-dAuzVNMI-7xqYw90HK7H_BC03Rgf7satpdGQHMbcPiWYKxG9ph1QSwjnWZh4eQsnxgYTQ-1buP3uZnzRQYUXivSC6swp62jOfc2RBS03go4UWjiyUZ-BZR2jHu9VUNc9-lLgUdKGRFHdw5PVlslW8nPXWQ7gfNR7uxfT01oRwgMPjbcD2p1gyzOehp3YCH2xdVBzO5Jr9SjVHhZaDKTS0j8P9oSfBGCuP-hS7scKXKenq8KYl7sictFXNVfemk6Qc2zxnfdGyfhVTztUXs5yi6T5fpq2Me4H69q6BoSTOOit3a3BVaYa70i0XvxfuXvmcFNLcp7bkrp_qfLzoOEC2uEaRcMCXiHLibkjk9gQYBolhHap0p2wD2NIKvIFDWUWmoyGblaaqsUfkspJQbyJFtBwVu6L0zBnpWWwm3ToaihS27eemnNzigLw%3D%3D)**_

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2cb4731b45ce4545ad3766fd19914f2a&_e=PPZQPZGa1FAgBMMTT4-CIlEMg1kh1OQF7_6RYisOpmcvjKjBBHyhBgpJb3FgvlkDy9SO1bKAOrEkBzV8V4-lzWVYlRPYXwsECJpcU6hXCyNMxjRo09J2OdWZqZ67yOvy3BorSmk4cJR_K726pVkhNbE3NMm25lU1xqfOVOYd7v6QLopbP9HFdC_PT0j5Io4zLAUe__j_jV56lanptJuc6qDneCOFhuSMAIhECgfUkgK5MpumjYD-pVWlPwT9c9Nj4VeyZ0WUup-C18uNvdV1hQrJ4K7ovHL8czwHGMKvBEIfRzPO8DbOjGYyTr1PQeQwGaiUKy8avtxNQyAVWSLVOCK9U4jG2hATLCRyQXY6Aw0RxRCX6do5mGFXPSlpwNsskTMsmcqPYpFbMu-mfVaSdADo5xyGY-25iJCn6lrPOg-t29oArcA8TASjVtbUM2DhtTdqmUz4aSJocjsfoM50m4QE0MXUr3R56f8r0NkIE5WfnJdaIp7gXlJajZR49kd5odrd_z83TrzppHuH8qFNoBVUxmvLESh0wzSGD7sEMUVaJ7XRGIaPUCsLpH9YFIcKvRPgOGK7fIiK-RstwdYiTlYxfujrm02BFYfUFNFU86a5MiaOMR6bZ76WNhirZq4LhipkSTaRZbcj9blfNjIG5JHwspaQ5cJ27WStGZuUeR9Gxcqy03HcczcMhgA27vEXti3X_8ke8F1kbnVkIkGTBxwXWN9Ts2TMeASqELpiXkaLg_V9c-DOrJQq114EAkZFeWr5lWhEAQ5cvVGPgcjSBw%3D%3D)
_[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2cb4731b45ce4545ad3766fd19914f2a&_e=PPZQPZGa1FAgBMMTT4-CIlEMg1kh1OQF7_6RYisOpmcvjKjBBHyhBgpJb3FgvlkDy9SO1bKAOrEkBzV8V4-lzWVYlRPYXwsECJpcU6hXCyNMxjRo09J2OdWZqZ67yOvy3BorSmk4cJR_K726pVkhNbE3NMm25lU1xqfOVOYd7v6QLopbP9HFdC_PT0j5Io4zLAUe__j_jV56lanptJuc6qDneCOFhuSMAIhECgfUkgK5MpumjYD-pVWlPwT9c9Nj4VeyZ0WUup-C18uNvdV1hQo3BfAYM-qi_V25CoWCVn14CSukQVjeHDpWq0AzWkQZRGhbESGRRIGd9lrk04bJMNICXaU7lmEBYiZn8GOZ3lu0zkS_O0_aAYw3_xmqEFdlUH9Y34o7AqCYEL33havqMvkoliOU98-K6grOxEjYl_2G0rE3kyR5ePEEakCGo_7t4cCHB3_lMVqARjS8w2B5ooH0CWwZ4Ta0fDdG1QG6L5jDe4Bgepi2QO7FifPiRit_adw-4S4S67GbfrkEHF37KVDZ4LMp_BGqGm-i3gcLxx3KTJ6sL4GC7LEYx3JCvhmSq4Ytccz1JNnqBV3n9fw-hP1WcWlhehluvSn-FAm3IqhcyjweIIuYZDBR9r_pFn34iE6XbahVmv1UJf0eSyhrn1GrqYCYrXcsDwPT7RANlgy7hzWSDSFt_cfrNFEL0_jwcUa8ZrtrtLljxJ8Mrk7gg8DWuftJmO3islX-rtJIdx6-MM7mS-GB4ziiI5xXi9fiWP1Tz3dnibGUaR3mK-3nNg%3D%3D)_
My socialist opponent’s record?

\- As Tim Walz’s right hand, she sued to defund ICE detention, letting illegals with records roam free—while fentanyl from cartel labs (_**fueled by open borders**_) kills 1,200 Minnesotans a year.

\- Now, with Bernie’s blessing, she’s eyeing the Senate to nationalize healthcare and tax away innovation.

President Trump is already restoring deterrence—tariffs on China, sealed borders, and energy independence.

He needs allies like me: a SEAL who’s deterred real enemies in war zones, not dreamed them up in committee rooms.

My opponent’s Bernie-backed vision? It’s the same failed playbook I’ve seen abroad—quietly obedient societies, where the human spirit withers.

clean_body: I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. | Fellow Conservative, Last week, Bernie Sanders—the self-proclaimed democratic socialist—threw his full weight behind my opponent in the United States Senate contest in which we’re candidates. In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests. ” Translation: She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash. That’s not leadership. That’s the socialism I fought against overseas. I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea. I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach. As a Navy SEAL Officer , I deployed nine times across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa. I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth. Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in DECADES. What I don’t have right now is money. My socialist opponent’s record? \- As Tim Walz’s right hand, she sued to defund ICE detention, letting illegals with records roam free—while fentanyl from cartel labs (fueled by open borders) kills 1,200 Minnesotans a year. \- Now, with Bernie’s blessing, she’s eyeing the Senate to nationalize healthcare and tax away innovation. President Trump is already restoring deterrence—tariffs on China, sealed borders, and energy independence. He needs allies like me: a SEAL who’s deterred real enemies in war zones, not dreamed them up in committee rooms. My opponent’s Bernie-backed vision? It’s the same failed playbook I’ve seen abroad—quietly obedient societies, where the human spirit withers. he left’s poll shows a Republican within 2 points of flipping this seat. We need FINANCIAL FIREPOWER to counter Bernie’s political machine, which is equipped with hundreds of millions of dollars and an email fundraising list 10 miles long. Every dollar arms the next generation of American strength—and will help us bury Bernie’s agenda in Minnesota. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: Deterrence works when your adversary believes you’ll act. China believes me. Bernie fears me. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: James Carville
subject: It’s time to get serious.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss the Senate majority goodbye.
Folks, it’s James Carville.
I’ve been around the block a few times and worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. So believe me when I tell you: **This ain’t good.**
John Sununu — yeah, _those Sununus_ — just jumped into the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire. And now the political eggheads have DOWNGRADED Democrats’ chances of winning there.
**[💥Before you read another word, split $10 or whatever you can between Chris Pappas and Heartland Patriots to help Chris fight back right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97837?refcode=em20251201-9779&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9779%2E614464%2E9EoB4z)**
Let me tell you what this means: **If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss our chances of winning back the Senate majority goodbye.**
This isn’t some back-bench, no-name guy we’re up against. **Sununu’s won a Senate seat before.**
He’s got name ID, deep pockets, and Wall Street’s dark money machine ready to drown us in attack ads. This is the far-right’s big play, y’all — they know if they take New Hampshire, Democrats have _no viable path_ to flipping the Senate.
Chris Pappas is the real deal. I mean it. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four damn times, and he knows how to bring folks together. But he cannot — **_cannot_** — do this alone.
So here’s what I need from you:
**[Split a contribution between Chris Pappas and Heartland Patriots today. $10, $25, whatever you can spare. Because if we let the GOP buy this seat for Sununu, we’re gonna be stuck with Republican control for years to come.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97837?refcode=em20251201-9779&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9779%2E614464%2E9EoB4z)**
**[Split a donation now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97837?refcode=em20251201-9779&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9779%2E614464%2E9EoB4z)**
I’m mad as HELL that this race just shifted in the wrong direction — but that means it’s time to get serious. Chris is the only one who can hold this seat, but he needs a hell of a lot more firepower to fend off what’s coming.
Let’s show these Republican bigshots that we’re not scared — and we sure as hell ain’t backing down.
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97837?refcode=em20251201-9779&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9779%2E614464%2E9EoB4z)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip control of the Senate.
— James Carville
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97837?refcode=em20251201-9779&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9779%2E614464%2E9EoB4z)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120369065/586060712/-785282667?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2EzYjliYS1mNGNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UNxr1y17UnD8AuKmx_hFY6AQRTtQrG69O5MDUb05DhU=)

Peter, I’m going to get right to the point, because the moment is too important to dance around it: **We set a goal to raise $5,000 by the end of November to power Becca’s fight forward — and we came up just $764 short.** Before today ends, we’re doing everything we can to make that up — and we’re asking for your help right now. **[If you’re able, will you click here and chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help us close this $764 gap immediately?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120369066/586060713/317229993?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2EzYjliYS1mNGNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UNxr1y17UnD8AuKmx_hFY6AQRTtQrG69O5MDUb05DhU=)** **[HELP US BRING BECCA GOOD NEWS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120369067/586060714/317229993?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2EzYjliYS1mNGNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UNxr1y17UnD8AuKmx_hFY6AQRTtQrG69O5MDUb05DhU=)** This is about momentum. This is about walking into the most critical stretch of the year — **election season** — with strength, confidence, and the resources Becca needs to keep fighting for us. **We wish we didn’t have to write this email. We wish we could say, “We crushed our goal.” But the truth matters. And the truth is: we missed it by $764.** And today, before we have to bring that news to Becca, we’re trying everything we’ve got to fix it so she can stay focused on what matters most: standing up for working families, protecting our rights, and taking the fight directly to Trump and the Republican Party. Becca is exactly who we need in this moment. She doesn’t back down. She doesn’t hedge. She shows up and fights — for our freedoms, our communities, and our future. **But she can’t do it alone. And we can’t let this moment slip by because of a $764 shortfall.** If you can help at all — even a small amount — it truly makes the difference between starting this season on shaky ground or on solid footing. [**Will you click here and chip in right now so we can walk into Becca’s office today with good news as we head into election season?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120369068/586060715/317229993?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2EzYjliYS1mNGNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UNxr1y17UnD8AuKmx_hFY6AQRTtQrG69O5MDUb05DhU=) Every dollar gets us closer. Every donor sends a message: We’ve got your back. We wish we didn’t have to write this email. We wish we could say, “We crushed our goal.” But the truth matters. And the truth is: we missed it by $764. And today, before we have to bring that news to Becca, we’re trying everything we’ve got to fix it so she can stay focused on what matters most: standing up for working families, protecting our rights, and taking the fight directly to Trump and the Republican Party. Becca is exactly who we need in this moment. She doesn’t back down. She doesn’t hedge. She shows up and fights — for our freedoms, our communities, and our future. But she can’t do it alone. And we can’t let this moment slip by because of a $764 shortfall. If you can help at all — even a small amount — it truly makes the difference between starting this season on shaky ground or on solid footing. = Every dollar gets us closer. Every donor sends a message: We’ve got your back. With so much gratitude and urgency, — Team Becca If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

name: =?utf-8?q?Missing_Signature_=E2=9D=97=5Bprotectvoting=2Eorg=5D?=
subject: FWD: Thank Justice Sonia Sotomayor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’re about to lose your signature spot...
| Trump’s Supreme Court majority is on the verge of DESTROYING the Voting Rights Act — they just agreed to hear the case!

**Sonia Sotomayor is one of our ONLY fighters for democracy left on the Court, but you still haven’t signed our letter thanking her for her work.** [**We’re giving you ONE more chance to sign by 8am tomorrow, or you will lose your signature spot. THANK JUSTICE SOTOMAYOR NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97803?t=6&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97803?t=7&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9)
---
Thank you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
_Justice Sotomayor just put the MAGA SCOTUS majority & Donald Trump to SHAME:_
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97803?t=8&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9)
**If a member of the Supreme Court — _who is supposed to be impartial_ — is sounding the alarm, _we should ALL be listening._**

Team, we’re so grateful for Sotomayor’s BRAVE leadership — but Republicans are FURIOUS with Sotomayor, and they’re _plotting revenge._

We need to show Supreme Court Justice Sotomayor that Democrats (especially Democrats in your state) have her back!

[**As one of the FEW protectors of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. WE HAVE ONLY 18 SPOTS LEFT:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97803?t=9&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9)
[**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97803?t=10&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda and blatant disregard of the Constitution.**

Your bravery continues to blow us away, time after time.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97803?t=11&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97803?t=12&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97803?t=13&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=22094%2E878179%2E56ltK9)

name: Chair Nikki Fried, FDP
subject: Republicans are meeting to redraw Florida’s maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
We knew this day was coming, now it’s here. | | | |
---
Friend,
Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis have spent months pressuring Florida Republicans to redraw our congressional district lines, years before the next census, in a desperate attempt to rig the rules and cling to power ahead of the 2026 midterms.
Now, it’s official. On **December 4th** , they’ll hold their first meeting to start the process.
Republicans know they’re on track to lose the House. They’ve seen the polls, they’ve seen the energy, and they know voters are ready to hold them accountable, so they’re rigging the rules and robbing Floridians of representation before they get a say.
This mid-decade power grab is unnecessary, expensive, and anti-democratic. Instead of helping working families afford housing or lowering insurance costs, they’re wasting taxpayer dollars to protect themselves.
Florida Democrats are building our defense fund right now to protect fair districts, defend free and fair elections, and fight for the freedom of every Floridian to choose their leaders.
**[Will you split a contribution between the Nevada Democratic Party and the Florida Democratic Party to help us fight back against Trump and DeSantis’s power grab?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqte1AKsO1A6D16A1pGserP-wvTe1o44NRz4MQSVu6Tx0idJt8die-NwCCKfecoyNKTW8hotoY_9OiUJsHoxVKuTQJRSSkjTRGMK8qqACk6LPClG63wrqK4yX0nU0WNv_J15Rh859fFCh-VKH9LdUNAe952l0Y-hSjowGY2zozwUFAFXPAU7k8BsQ7xfpjbg2WHmPiWF860al2kwebhFCnQNXWl_k2VZ__dPd_qSZaTP-vheeksRVTvRdowbIgGZZEoXNEnpWewgO_vD90857Va5g2QVQxGROr4vOp1Ymt0ntNzkQp3qFiFLQiibGr1Wi7VW2M0yMz-G0vzX4UmIWNLWcCoh8Riafcs3I8hWlpcZCTQmxE3Wb7DMbkIUfLopSUS-ELsLWYtxadZm51RcolFnGcgndZnp9Bh1GKAjILFdMg/4m2/RRecNZaoTveJzzZOXT7BlQ/h0/h001.hSEzlxuBaDFfe4vNYyRnR08EZSpf1Z-OBSLewyQErS8)**

clean_body: We knew this day was coming, now it’s here. | | | | Friend, Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis have spent months pressuring Florida Republicans to redraw our congressional district lines, years before the next census, in a desperate attempt to rig the rules and cling to power ahead of the 2026 midterms. Now, it’s official. On December 4th , they’ll hold their first meeting to start the process. Republicans know they’re on track to lose the House. They’ve seen the polls, they’ve seen the energy, and they know voters are ready to hold them accountable, so they’re rigging the rules and robbing Floridians of representation before they get a say. This mid-decade power grab is unnecessary, expensive, and anti-democratic. Instead of helping working families afford housing or lowering insurance costs, they’re wasting taxpayer dollars to protect themselves. Florida Democrats are building our defense fund right now to protect fair districts, defend free and fair elections, and fight for the freedom of every Floridian to choose their leaders. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | We’ve been underestimated before, but together, we’ll hold the line and protect our democracy. We won’t back down, Nikki Fried Chair, Florida Democratic Party The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. _**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/17d7bcc1-14ac-4e95-86c0-7cf76184aede?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/17d7bcc1-14ac-4e95-86c0-7cf76184aede?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
One of the things that pisses me off the most about Donald Trump, Pete Hegseth, and the rest of them is how absolutely certain they are that they're never going to be held accountable for anything -- not their corruption, not their abuses of power, not even for the lives they ruin. They walk through the world with this swaggering confidence that the law exists for everyone _but_ them. And they've gotten away with so much for so long that, honestly, why wouldn't they think that?
And if you've felt overwhelmed by the sheer volume of shit coming out of this administration -- that's the point. They flood the zone with so many scandals, so many norm-shattering power grabs, that people simply stop keeping track.
So let me ground this moment clearly, because what's happening right now is not normal, not legal, and not even close to defensible:
* The Trump administration launched lethal strikes on Venezuelan nationals in the Caribbean with zero congressional authorization -- no briefing, no debate, no oversight.
* Pete Hegseth personally pushed for those strikes and then reportedly ordered a second strike to kill the survivors who were floating on rafts -- an escalation so lawless and cruel it should stop the country in its tracks.
* They're calling certain Venezuelan gang members "terrorists" to exploit loopholes in war powers laws.
* And Trump is seriously floating the idea of designating the Venezuelan government itself as a terrorist organization -- which isn't foreign policy; it's a manufactured pretext for war.
* And through all of this, they've given the American people zero explanation. No transparency. No justification. Nothing.

This is a shadow war built on lies and impunity, and _we 're_ paying for it.
* * *
_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/17d7bcc1-14ac-4e95-86c0-7cf76184aede?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/17d7bcc1-14ac-4e95-86c0-7cf76184aede?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
None of these abuses are happening in isolation. This is exactly what people have been warning about for years -- that once an authoritarian movement realizes the guardrails are weak, they will smash every single one of them.
Pete Hegseth and Pam Bondi gutted the oversight structure inside their agencies before they even started. They fired inspectors general, dismantled watchdog offices, and replaced career public servants with loyalists whose only job is to say "yes." They've warped the military chain of command so badly that a Fox News pundit with no foreign policy experience is now calling shots that can start wars.
And the Constitution means nothing to them. These lawless, ignorant, wannabe fascist tyrants don't treat the Constitution like a nuisance -- they treat it like an enemy. They spit on it, they undermine it, and they tear through it every time it threatens their grip on power.
They don't care if what they're doing is illegal. They don't care if it's immoral. They don't care if it puts American lives at risk. The only thing they care about is power -- and they are absolutely certain that Trump will "take care of them" if anything goes wrong. Because he has. Over and over again. An unbelievable number of corrupt pardons have already been issued to protect his allies, his co-conspirators, and his cronies.
And the worst part? Our system isn't strong enough to stop it... yet. Twenty years of expanding presidential power after 9/11, Congress giving up its war-making authority, and the normalization of drone warfare created a perfect on-ramp for a president who sees every legal boundary as a personal challenge.
And if you're reading this wondering why it matters to you, here's the reality:
When a president can launch a secret war without oversight, _you_ are less safe.
When corruption replaces competence, _your_ costs go up.
When the government can declare anyone a "terrorist" to justify violence, that power will eventually be used _at home_.
History is not subtle about this progression.
And on top of all of that, there's the sheer betrayal of it -- betrayal of our servicemembers, who didn't enlist to follow illegal orders from a TV pundit; betrayal of the American people, who deserve transparency and honesty; betrayal of the Constitution, which has been reduced to an obstacle instead of the rulebook for governing a democracy.
And as horrific as Donald Trump is -- and he _is_ a historic disaster -- the next guy could be even worse if we don't rein this in right now.
So what do we do? Especially if Democrats aren't in power at this exact moment?
What do we do when the people breaking the law are the ones running the show?
Here's the truth:
**We don 't get to tune out.
We don't get to look away.
We don't get to let exhaustion become the thing that saves them.**
Trump has gotten away with this shit for years -- not because the evidence wasn't there, but because people lost faith that accountability was even possible. And honestly, I don't blame them. When the powerful walk free over and over again, it breaks something in the public. It convinces people that nothing matters, nothing changes, and the system is too rigged to be fixed.
But that cynicism is exactly what they're counting on. Chaos is their weapon. Exhaustion is their shield. Public amnesia is their strategy.
So what do we do now?

We remember.
We keep receipts.
We call it out.
We tell the truth -- even when people are tired of hearing it.
Because there _will_ be a reckoning. Maybe not tomorrow, but it will come.
Guys like Trump always think they're untouchable -- right up until they're not.
And when power shifts -- _and it will_ -- we cannot waste the moment. We need real oversight, real reform, and real accountability. No more loopholes. No more unchecked power.
This is the moment.
We either stay focused or surrender the country to people who treat our laws like suggestions and our Constitution like an obstacle.
If we refuse to forget, if we refuse to look away -- then there's still something left to fight for.

clean_body: Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? War crimes, corruption, and unchecked power. | | | Dec 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | One of the things that pisses me off the most about Donald Trump, Pete Hegseth, and the rest of them is how absolutely certain they are that they're never going to be held accountable for anything -- not their corruption, not their abuses of power, not even for the lives they ruin. They walk through the world with this swaggering confidence that the law exists for everyone but them. And they've gotten away with so much for so long that, honestly, why wouldn't they think that? And if you've felt overwhelmed by the sheer volume of shit coming out of this administration -- that's the point. They flood the zone with so many scandals, so many norm-shattering power grabs, that people simply stop keeping track. So let me ground this moment clearly, because what's happening right now is not normal, not legal, and not even close to defensible: The Trump administration launched lethal strikes on Venezuelan nationals in the Caribbean with zero congressional authorization -- no briefing, no debate, no oversight. Pete Hegseth personally pushed for those strikes and then reportedly ordered a second strike to kill the survivors who were floating on rafts -- an escalation so lawless and cruel it should stop the country in its tracks. They're calling certain Venezuelan gang members "terrorists" to exploit loopholes in war powers laws. And Trump is seriously floating the idea of designating the Venezuelan government itself as a terrorist organization -- which isn't foreign policy; it's a manufactured pretext for war. And through all of this, they've given the American people zero explanation. No transparency. No justification. Nothing. This is a shadow war built on lies and impunity, and we 're paying for it. None of these abuses are happening in isolation. This is exactly what people have been warning about for years -- that once an authoritarian movement realizes the guardrails are weak, they will smash every single one of them. Pete Hegseth and Pam Bondi gutted the oversight structure inside their agencies before they even started. They fired inspectors general, dismantled watchdog offices, and replaced career public servants with loyalists whose only job is to say "yes." They've warped the military chain of command so badly that a Fox News pundit with no foreign policy experience is now calling shots that can start wars. And the Constitution means nothing to them. These lawless, ignorant, wannabe fascist tyrants don't treat the Constitution like a nuisance -- they treat it like an enemy. They spit on it, they undermine it, and they tear through it every time it threatens their grip on power. They don't care if what they're doing is illegal. They don't care if it's immoral. They don't care if it puts American lives at risk. The only thing they care about is power -- and they are absolutely certain that Trump will "take care of them" if anything goes wrong. Because he has. Over and over again. An unbelievable number of corrupt pardons have already been issued to protect his allies, his co-conspirators, and his cronies. And the worst part? Our system isn't strong enough to stop it... yet. Twenty years of expanding presidential power after 9/11, Congress giving up its war-making authority, and the normalization of drone warfare created a perfect on-ramp for a president who sees every legal boundary as a personal challenge. And if you're reading this wondering why it matters to you, here's the reality: When a president can launch a secret war without oversight, you are less safe. When corruption replaces competence, your costs go up. When the government can declare anyone a "terrorist" to justify violence, that power will eventually be used at home. History is not subtle about this progression. And on top of all of that, there's the sheer betrayal of it -- betrayal of our servicemembers, who didn't enlist to follow illegal orders from a TV pundit; betrayal of the American people, who deserve transparency and honesty; betrayal of the Constitution, which has been reduced to an obstacle instead of the rulebook for governing a democracy. And as horrific as Donald Trump is -- and he is a historic disaster -- the next guy could be even worse if we don't rein this in right now. So what do we do? Especially if Democrats aren't in power at this exact moment? What do we do when the people breaking the law are the ones running the show? Here's the truth: We don 't get to tune out. We don't get to look away. We don't get to let exhaustion become the thing that saves them. Trump has gotten away with this shit for years -- not because the evidence wasn't there, but because people lost faith that accountability was even possible. And honestly, I don't blame them. When the powerful walk free over and over again, it breaks something in the public. It convinces people that nothing matters, nothing changes, and the system is too rigged to be fixed. But that cynicism is exactly what they're counting on. Chaos is their weapon. Exhaustion is their shield. Public amnesia is their strategy. So what do we do now? We remember. We keep receipts. We call it out. We tell the truth -- even when people are tired of hearing it. Because there will be a reckoning. Maybe not tomorrow, but it will come. Guys like Trump always think they're untouchable -- right up until they're not. And when power shifts -- and it will -- we cannot waste the moment. We need real oversight, real reform, and real accountability. No more loopholes. No more unchecked power. This is the moment. We either stay focused or surrender the country to people who treat our laws like suggestions and our Constitution like an obstacle. If we refuse to forget, if we refuse to look away -- then there's still something left to fight for. _A quick update on Georgia’s critical U.S. Senate race as we start December..._
**First, the bad news:**
Last night was the deadline for our November fundraising drive, and we came up short of our goal.
This comes at a time where Jon’s opponents and MAGA Super PACs have already poured _more than $10 million_ into this race.
That is the bad news. _And it is bad._

**But here’s the good news: Jon has YOU, Peter. And thousands of grassroots supporters alongside you.**
And honestly, winning Georgia and taking back the Senate is going to take ALL of us getting involved. For some, that means volunteering. Others, posting on social media or talking to their friends about what’s at stake with a MAGA takeover of Georgia.
But probably the most important thing you can do at this moment to ensure Jon is ready for the campaign ahead is to make your first contribution to Jon’s campaign today. It doesn’t have to be a lot — even a few dollars makes a big difference and lets us know you’re on our side.

clean_body: We only have until midnight tonight... | Friend, Our grassroots support is truly incredible... Thousands of America First patriots just came through for me at the final hour to help us CRUSH our very first monthly goal since I launched my campaign for governor. But deadline be damned, we have to keep our foot on the gas and keep this momentum going. The race is already within the margin of error , and Hochul is LOSING more ground with every passing day! Polls now show a huge MAJORITY of New Yorkers – including New Yorkers from all political backgrounds – don’t want to see her reelected. However, Hochul, Mamdani, and their Democrat allies aren’t going to simply roll over and accept defeat. They’re flooding New York with MILLIONS OF DOLLARS to stall our surging momentum so they can keep Hochul and her new Far Left puppet-master Zohran Mamdani in power. To win a blue state like New York, we desperately need every dollar we can muster to counter their multimillion-dollar ad buys and take our own America First message directly to the voters. That’s why I’ve secured an internal 24-HOUR DEADLINE EXTENSION until 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to help us raise the additional funds required to level the playing field against Hochul and Mamdani. Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

_Alright Peter, listen up, we 've got a new twist in this game._

**Doug Jones just ran onto the field like he thinks he 's about to take this thing into overtime.**

Fine. Let him line up. I've stared down tougher hits than that in the SEC, and I didn't spend my career backing down from surprise blitzes.

_**But moments like this? This is where a real team shows its backbone.**_

When somebody unexpectedly tries to jump in the game, you don't panic; you tighten your chinstrap, square up, and hit harder. That's exactly what I'm doing, and I need to know who's standing shoulder-to-shoulder in this huddle.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Meet the young leaders powering Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

There’s nothing more inspiring than being on college campuses in Texas.

Everywhere I’ve gone I’ve met students who are registering voters, signing
up volunteers, and organizing to decide the future of our state. They’re
not the leaders of the future. They’re the leaders of right now.

Just last week in San Antonio, I met Venus, the president of the College
Democrats at UT San Antonio; Jetsita, head of the Pre-Law Society at Texas
A&M-San Antonio; and Elio, a brand-new Powered by People volunteer at
UTSA. Each of them is defying the pundits who’ve written off their
generation by doing the work that will actually save this country.

There are thousands of young leaders just like them across the state.
Imagine what we can do when we have the resources to work with all of
them.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251201.bmb2t5&refcode=ema20251201-240496&t=1002&akid=240496%2E444211%2Eh3BTgG ]Beto with Venus

us on-the-ground, meeting people, registering voters, and building the
grassroots power Texas needs?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251201.bmb2t5&refcode=ema20251201-240496&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=240496%2E444211%2Eh3BTgG ]DONATE $3

With students like Venus, Jetsita, Elio, and thousands of others leading
the way—and with you standing with us—I know we can win in Texas and
change what’s possible for this country.

[ ]DONATE $3 With students like Venus, Jetsita, Elio, and thousands of others leading the way—and with you standing with us—I know we can win in Texas and change what’s possible for this country. name: Sen. Nate Blouin
subject: Friend, I'm running for Congress in Utah's new seat
body:
[1]LeftNet

Friend, I'm
State Senator Nate Blouin, and I'm the progressive running for Congress in
Utah's new blue seat endorsed by Bernie Sanders on Day 1.

I'm done being told by billionaires and politicians to "just deal with
it". They've rigged the game and screwed over working people, so I'm going
to take them on directly. [ https://act.leftnet.org/go/22095?source=em20251201-1379&t=1001&akid=1379%2E2118727%2EybsvKy ]If you're with me and Bernie, will you
endorse my campaign for Congress? No contribution necessary. >>

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/22095?source=em20251201-1379&t=1002&akid=1379%2E2118727%2EybsvKy ][IMG]

I'm not new to this fight: I've had to deal with medical debt and student
loans. I've been on SNAP, and I ran for office to make my community a
better place.

As a State Senator, I've been called a punk by the Attorney General, and
I've had my mic cut off on the Senate floor for speaking truth to power. I
know how the far right "governs," and I'll never back down from a hard
fight.

Together, we will make this country work for working people again. We can
pass Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and codify Roe. We will protect
our public lands, end the attacks on Gaza, and lower the costs of housing,
energy, and higher education by taxing billionaires.

And I will stop Trump and his MAGA enablers who represent Utah in
Congress. We need real oversight to investigate his corrupt
administration, stop illegal ICE activity, and restore fairness and
democracy back to government.

Trust me, the same folks who got us into this mess will not be the ones
who get us out of it. So it’s up to us.

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/22095?source=em20251201-1379&t=1003&akid=1379%2E2118727%2EybsvKy ]Mega corporations and special interests are going to flood this race
with millions of dollars to hand-pick their candidate, and I guarantee
you, that ain't me. I'm not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so what
I need is your grassroots endorsement. Can you sign our endorsement
petition and elect a Bernie-endorsed progressive to this new seat in Utah?

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/22095?source=em20251201-1379&t=1004&akid=1379%2E2118727%2EybsvKy ]SIGN HERE

Let's do this thing,
Nate Blouin

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.leftnet.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1379%2E2118727%2EybsvKy

name: Angela
subject: No one is immune to the terror of ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Angela for CA-34]()
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1b95194852f5/i-want-angela-gonzales-torres-to-be-part-of-the-next-winning-cohort-of-justice-democrats-heres-why-8375680?e=1e17b803ba)
---
[|
---](https://angela4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=19b01a24970a7ee09dd36c641&id=0248d3dafa&e=1e17b803ba)
| | | | | |

Friend , when I was a young girl, I lived through my father's deportation.
I endured more court proceedings than any child should and saw firsthand how they treated my father — as many deportees, even deported veterans are treated — as if he was disposable, and nothing.
I’ll never forget the look on my mother’s or sister's faces. It took me years to process and understand what happened when he was taken from my life and there was what felt like just silence.
Those feelings come rushing back when I see the terror that ICE is inflicting across the country, in an even bolder and crueler way than when I was a young girl.
The fear and anger rushes up when I see a young woman named Evelyn, just 18 years old and a U.S. citizen, thrown to the ground by a masked ICE officer while she screams, “I am not resisting!” She was aggressively handcuffed, roughly handled, detained for hours, and later released without charges.
**Dehumanization comes for us all. Whether immigrant or citizen. Our privileges will not protect us. We aren’t free until we’re all free.**
ICE has been detaining and assaulting U.S. citizens in Chicago and across the country: children, workers, even journalists.
Federal agents zip-tied one woman “because she didn’t look like her surname.”
Another man, a U.S. citizen, was shackled and pepper-sprayed.
As _The Cut_ notes, there have been **“more than 170 cases in which immigration-enforcement agents have detained U.S. citizens” **during Trump’s presidency.
This isn’t about safety. This is about rounding up and discriminating against people based on what they look like.
I’ve lived that fear. I’ve seen families broken apart by policies designed to dehumanize. And I refuse to accept a future where any of us, regardless of citizenship status, can be treated as disposable.
_**Our fight for immigrant rights is a fight for everyone’s rights. It’s a fight for a country where no one has to prove their humanity to be free.**_
[**If you’re with me in that fight, please consider making a donation to our grassroots campaign today. Together, we can build a country that values dignity over detention, compassion over cruelty, and justice over fear.**](https://angela4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=19b01a24970a7ee09dd36c641&id=0ef58b622d&e=1e17b803ba)
---
| [DONATE](https://angela4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=19b01a24970a7ee09dd36c641&id=69f59467f8&e=1e17b803ba)
---
| |

With urgency,Angela
---
|
---
| | | | | [DONATE](https://angela4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=19b01a24970a7ee09dd36c641&id=6e79ebd3dd&e=1e17b803ba)

name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: We’re proud to endorse Hartzell Gray
body:
He’s a fighter for working people

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4faa6caef560/tockcw1cwy-204?e=81ab29c4d2)
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=ce250e71fe&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | | | | | Peter,
---
| | We’re proud to officially announce that **we’re endorsing Hartzell Gray for Congress in Missouri’s 4th district.**
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6a9d96132e&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | Hartzell isn’t a career politician — he’s **a community-rooted organizer and politivist** who’s spent years fighting alongside the people too often pushed to the margins. He’s used his voice to advocate for affordable healthcare, housing, and higher wages. He’s amplified the lived experiences of his working-class neighbors. He’s stood shoulder to shoulder with youth organizers demanding real justice. And he’s never hesitated to speak truth to power.
Now, he’s taking that same unapologetic energy to his campaign — not to play politics, but to fight for a just economy, Medicare for All, affordable housing, living wages, and real protections for women and LGBTQIA+ Missourians.
Hartzell is running on a simple but transformative vision: **People over profit. Every time.**
---
| [JOIN THE MOVEMENT](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=02267b30d2&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| | This is the kind of leadership our movement exists to uplift. Bold, grounded in community, and unwilling to compromise on dignity and justice. But we can’t do it without you.
When you support the Movement for Freedom, you’re fueling the organizing muscle that helps candidates like Hartzell reach voters, build power, and win. Every contribution **helps us support campaigns that show up for our communities** and push back against big-money interests trying to drown out the working people.
[**Let’s show Hartzell that this movement is behind him. Chip in today to help us elect fighters who put people first.**](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=2b16ee0e1c&e=81ab29c4d2)
Thank you for standing with us.
---
| |
**In solidarity,****The Movement for Freedom Team**
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=1b6ba2b435&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | _Copyright (C) 2025 Movement 4 Freedom. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Movement 4 Freedom PO Box 33079 Washington, DC 20033 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/profile?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&e=81ab29c4d2&c=b1a76828b9) or [unsubscribe](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&t=b&e=81ab29c4d2&c=b1a76828b9)
---
|
