# [Giving Tuesday with Donta Green, Trade Institute of Pittsburgh](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=180396023&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwMzk2MDIzLCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ2MjQ0MjUsImV4cCI6MTc2NzIxNjQyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.b-2bMuUpM5fqHu9sa3djV6sPsNOk-wMJy9mZFD_LcyI)
### A video for Giving Tuesday
| | [Conor Lamb](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa) and [Donta Green](https://substack.com/@dontagreen)
---
| Dec 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa)| | [](https://substack.com/@dontagreen)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=180396023&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwMzk2MDIzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NDYyNDQyNSwiZXhwIjoxNzY3MjE2NDI1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNTIzMzM1MiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aFMKogJHPJ8EtqaWC99k4wRJ4_uQQjCqLyvJdiJA7-Y&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=180396023&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwMzk2MDIzLCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ2MjQ0MjUsImV4cCI6MTc2NzIxNjQyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.b-2bMuUpM5fqHu9sa3djV6sPsNOk-wMJy9mZFD_LcyI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=180396023&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwMzk2MDIzLCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ2MjQ0MjUsImV4cCI6MTc2NzIxNjQyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.b-2bMuUpM5fqHu9sa3djV6sPsNOk-wMJy9mZFD_LcyI)
---
| | [](https://substack..OhKQym8_al-xptQys5fN8fWCXCczGcHUzGV_aQTHvCg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/conorlambpa/p/giving-tuesday-with-donta-green-trade?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

[Support the Trade Institute of Pittsburgh](https://substack.com/redirect/a129be71-2d25-4787-bc1a-559292ca1398?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Many of you have pledged to support my Substack, but I don't intend to charge. Perhaps you could give that money to the Trade Institute of Pittsburgh (TIP) instead. Since leaving Congress, it's one of the most important things I've been involved in. For years I heard from employers all over my district about how tough it was to finding hardworking people, especially as we prepared a national infrastructure bill.
What makes TIP special is they get people into the workforce who traveled a difficult road in life. People coming from neighborhoods where no one invested in them can't always walk straight into a union apprenticeship. Especially if they've dealt with addiction, or prison, or trauma. Not everyone is both willing and able to deal with barriers like that, but TIP is.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/97120bba-5f66-4b7d-85c4-8fcdb31d32a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Support the Trade Institute of Pittsburgh](https://substack.com/redirect/a129be71-2d25-4787-bc1a-559292ca1398?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
TIP Executive Director Donta Green, who I interviewed above, is a true servant leader. Watch our discussion. He has the charisma and dedication to make TIP far more than ordinary workforce nonprofit. He's on a mission to do the real work this country needs to have done. I'll quote his alumni magazine ([IUP](https://substack.com/redirect/24942e0e-5970-4a82-88ec-8eb010669c14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)):
> Donta Green won't rest. How could he when there is so much to do? He is surrounded by people and things that need his attention. Underfunded schools. People surviving in neighborhoods that are dying. Drugs and crime. He looks around and knows what he has to do. He helps, he guides, he pushes, and he pulls. His days start early. They end late.
> . . . Green by day is the executive director of the Trade Institute of Pittsburgh. Almost every other waking minute, he's the football coach at the high school he attended, Westinghouse Academy. . . . "I have moms calling me, asking if I know anybody that has some food stamps, because they have run out of food. I have kids who don't have a ride home from school, and they're afraid to walk, because it's too dangerous. Some of them wear the same clothes all week."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60326ff2-73bc-46e0-948f-bef494034480?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Donta Green and the Westinghouse Bulldogs in November 2022_ (Brian Henry for [IUP](https://substack.com/redirect/24942e0e-5970-4a82-88ec-8eb010669c14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
If you feel, like I do, that our government has largely stopped trying to level the playing field; that opportunity has become something like a luxury good instead of a core feature of our society; and that if we don't do something, technology will only further erode the value of an honest day's labor, then supporting TIP and Donta is the best way to push back.
This year TIP will graduate around 125 students. There are so many more we could help. If you're able to give anything, even a few dollars, it could buy a tank of gas for someone to get to work, or pay for a driver's license. I know there are a lot of worthy causes out there, and I wouldn't trouble you if TIP wasn't so important for our community at this particular moment in time.
[Please support TIP here. Thank you.](https://substack.com/redirect/a129be71-2d25-4787-bc1a-559292ca1398?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| Get more from Conor Lamb in the Substack app
---|---
Available for iOS and Android
[Get the app](https://substack.com/redirect/69eac005-84e7-4599-ac6e-56450b6b7df8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| | A guest post by[Donta Green](https://substack.com/@dontagreen?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)| [Subscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/e34208ad-35b8-48ed-aa0d-2ccb1f838fef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---
| | [Comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=180396023&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwMzk2MDIzLCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ2MjQ0MjUsImV4cCI6MTc2NzIxNjQyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.b-2bMuUpM5fqHu9sa3djV6sPsNOk-wMJy9mZFD_LcyI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

I know there are a lot of worthy causes out there, and I wouldn't trouble you if TIP wasn't so important for our community at this particular moment in time. | Get more from Conor Lamb in the Substack app ---|--- Available for iOS and Android | | A guest post by| ---|--- Conor Lamb is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell Conor Lamb that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Conor Lamb 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
Friends,
I hope you had a great Thanksgiving.
I know you were probably inundated with emails before the holiday — so I just wanted to make sure you saw the note below about new polling in the Governor's race that shows we have a path to being tied for first place among the Democratic candidates.
Now we have real data — evidence that our message works — which shows we can win this thing.
But not if we don't get our message out.
Can you chip in today to help fuel our campaign with vital resources we need to win? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
With gratitude,
Tony
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Dave Jacobson
Date: Tue, Nov 25, 2025 at 8:31 AM
Subject: 🚨BREAKING NEWS --> POLL SHOWS TONY CAN WIN🚨
Dave Jacobson here, one of Tony's campaign consultants, with some BIG news!
We’re fresh out of the field with a poll conducted by the nationally respected firm Lake Research.
It’s among the first polls publicly released that reflect the latest field of new entrants into the race. While we start out in single digits — the poll shows Tony’s message works — and once voters hear it — he’s tied for first place among the Democratic candidates.
It’s clear that Tony’s plans to raise taxes on mega-millionaires and billionaires — those worth $100 million and more to pay for public services like healthcare and public schools, childcare, fire fighting, higher education and more — resonates with voters.
The poll also shows that Tony’s record of fighting back against Donald Trump and his vision for single-payer, guaranteed healthcare for all, has broad appeal with California’s electorate.

But here’s the cold, hard truth.
If Tony doesn’t have the resources to communicate this message statewide — then voters won’t hear it.
The Lake Research poll shows that Tony can jump to the top of the Democratic field — if and when — voters hear his story.
That’s where you come in.
Can you chip in a donation right now of $25, $50, $100 or more to help Tony build the war chest he needs to compete with his well-funded opposition? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
Now that we have evidence that Tony’s message of progressive change works — it’s on all of us, his supporters, to fuel his campaign with the resources to get this message out.
Thanks for all that you do,
Dave

Peter Willis,

TOMORROW we have a chance to take back a crucial House seat from MAGA in a
Tennessee special election – and Trump and the Republican party are
TERRIFIED.

Trump just went on the attack and his super PAC is covering the airwaves
with its very first post-2024 ads. And Our Revolution is going ALL IN in
these final 24 hours to WIN.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34711?source=email-20251201&t=1061&akid=9923%2E5885482%2EqPoRom ]Headline: Trump launches attacks on Nashville Democrat for 'hating
Christianity and country music'

The Democratic nominee, Aftyn Behn, is a progressive state legislator Our
Revolution helped elect. Her opponent is a rubber stamp for Trump’s
far-right agenda. That’s why we’re organizing a massive push in these
final 24 hours – talking to THOUSANDS of voters via text and by phone.
This could be the difference between victory or another MAGA holdout in
Congress.

donation to keep up our GOTV machine going in Tennessee to help WIN
against Trump’s MAGA machine and take back this TN House seat on Tuesday?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

Here’s what’s at stake: Congress is under MAGA control by a razor-thin,
five-seat margin. Every single seat counts — and after Democrats massive
electoral success earlier this month, this is a race we can WIN. But we
can’t let them out-organize us.

Aftyn is a progressive state representative and former healthcare
community organizer who has been called the "AOC of Tennessee." And her
message is clearly resonating with voters across Tennessee as MAGA money
floods into the race to try to stop her momentum. This is a district Trump
won by 22 points!!!!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34711?source=email-20251201&t=1060&akid=9923%2E5885482%2EqPoRom ]Headline: Poll shows Republican Van Epps holding slight lead over
Democrat Behn in Tennessee's special congressional race

we’re outspent and drowned out by MAGA super PAC cash, none of that
matters.

The truth is that the way to defeat MAGA money is grassroots power. That’s
why Our Revolution's Get-Out-The-Vote operation is critical – every dollar

the polls in this critical race.

name: Bianco for Governor 2026
subject: November From The Campaign Trail
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | |
# END OF THE MONTH - NOVEMBER
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
## December 1, 2025
---
|
---
| |
Hello Team Bianco! Welcome to our new end-of-month newsletter! We are excited to provide you with an inside look at the important work our campaign has accomplished during the month of November. Sheriff Bianco has been traveling throughout our beautiful state, meeting with community members, local leaders, and supporters of his ongoing mission to connect with as many people as possible.
---
|
---
| |
# \- SHERIFF #1 IN THE POLLS -
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | The Sheriff led many polls this month, which comes to no surprise! Check it out!
* [UC Berkeley](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=c718ef8a51&e=7d5d879074)
* [Sacramento Bee](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=f047996a84&e=7d5d879074)
* [Tavern Research](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=5580680d7b&e=7d5d879074)

---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# \- SHERIFF IN THE MEDIA -
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | This month, Sheriff Bianco sat down on Fox News’ “My View with Lara Trump” to discuss his candidacy and the current state of California.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
### So many new and exciting podcasts!
---
| |
The Sheriff frequents podcasts to connect with Californians on all different matters. He joined Omar Elatta on The Passionate Few podcast this month, and it has quickly become one of my personal favorites! Check it out and be sure to share with your friends!
---
| [|
---](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=1baf9566a4&e=7d5d879074)
|
---
|
---
| [WATCH HERE](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=b89751f60d&e=7d5d879074)
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
# \- STATEWIDE EVENTS -
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
Sheriff Bianco is known for maintaining a constant presence at events up and down California, showing up for communities in early mornings and late nights. His schedule demands real stamina and genuine commitment, both of what he abundantly has. His visibility reflects not just endurance, but a dedication to staying connected with the people he serves, and the unbreakable momentum behind him.
---
|
---
| |
# \- AS ALWAYS... MERCH! -
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | We always have our official merchandise available on our [website](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=934890ac23&e=7d5d879074)! Every contribution goes directly to our campaign and helps fuel the Sheriff on his journey up and down the state. Be sure to check out our shirts, hats, yard signs, flags, etc. You can stay updated on new merch releases through our [Instagram](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=4d7c72e7b3&e=7d5d879074)!
---
|
---
| |
# \- FOLLOW THE CONVERSATION -
---
|
---
| | Sheriff Bianco is active on X! Be sure to follow him with the button below to stay updated.
---
| [SHERIFF BIANCO ON X](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=07160ef88a&e=7d5d879074)
---
|
---
| |
# \- MAKING TIME FOR FAMILY -
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | The Sheriff and his wife, Denise, paused their full schedules to enjoy Thanksgiving. They were able to be present and use the opportunity to reflect on this unique and meaningful season of life on the campaign trail. We hope each of you enjoyed your holiday!
---
| |
---
| |
# \- HELPING _YOU_ GET _YOUR_ BOOTS ON THE GROUND -
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
We are truly inspired from every opportunity we have to work alongside our amazing volunteers! Getting involved is simpler than you might think, and every contribution brings us closer to our campaign goals. By filling out [this form](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=b39ad21673&e=7d5d879074), you can help us reach out in your area. Thank you to each and every person who has generously shared their time and energy - we couldn’t do this without you!
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| | Whether you’re volunteering on the ground, displaying yard signs and bumper stickers, or making financial contributions, your support means the world to us. I have never witnessed a movement quite like this and our team knows that there is something truly special here! I’ll see you next month for another update from the campaign trail.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
**For California,****Alyssa P.
**_Volunteer Coordinator
_[ _Team Bianco_](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=310b6ec72c&e=7d5d879074)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=55b9696363&e=7d5d879074)
| | | | | Want to change how you receive these emails?You can [update your preferences](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=96541e25f0&e=7d5d879074&c=b61af15178) or [unsubscribe](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=96541e25f0&t=b&e=7d5d879074&c=b61af15178)
[View in browser](https://mailchi.mp/biancoforgovernor/november-from-the-campaign-trail?e=7d5d879074)
---
|
---

name: Chris Bolling
subject: Virginia’s next chapter starts now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
November’s victory wasn’t the finish line.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120373223/586074288/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzgzMzFjYi0wMWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGcryVQmUQpKdfJLkcnMXZIZb8RMvMDbg54BWQPZjvc=&emci=28ca7280-e7ce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=378331cb-01cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=31008101)
---
Peter, Last month, we delivered the first Democratic trifecta Virginia has seen in more than a decade and expanded our Democratic majority in the General Assembly, flipping double-digit House seats and securing a mandate up and down the ballot. But this moment is bigger than a single election. It marks the beginning of a**new chapter** for our Commonwealth. Here’s what that means:
* **A government that reflects Virginia’s values.** For years, progress was stalled by a divided government. Starting in January, Democrats can advance legislation that finally has a path to the Governor’s desk.
* **A chance to protect and expand fundamental freedoms.** From reproductive rights to voting rights, Virginia can once again lead the South as a model of progress and protection.
* **A moment to invest in the communities left behind.** Education funding. Rural broadband. Clean energy jobs. Workforce development. This is our chance to govern boldly.

But none of this happens automatically. The work to turn our mandate into real change begins now, in every committee hearing, every organizing shift, every conversation we have with Virginians across the Commonwealth.

Your voice, your support, and your organizing brought us to this moment. And it will take all of us to carry it forward.

Virginia’s next chapter starts now. [_**Let’s write it together.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120373224/586074290/-2072720460?&refcode=E16490-20251201-VANextChapter-SL-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzgzMzFjYi0wMWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGcryVQmUQpKdfJLkcnMXZIZb8RMvMDbg54BWQPZjvc=) — Chris Bolling
Executive Director, Democratic Party of Virginia

[content goes here]

Tennessee’s 7th District is officially on the ballot in December , and it’s shaping up to be one of the most critical special elections of the year.
Republicans have clung to this seat for years, but after Trump’s chaos, the shutdown, and his endless attacks on Blue States, voters in Middle Tennessee are DONE with MAGA extremism.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: No crowd. No narration. Just the Cybertruck in motion — completely on its own. | | | | December 01 | | | | | Caught on Camera: The Cybertruck Did What No One Expected | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. This wasn’t a stunt or a launch demo. No crowd. No narration. Just the Cybertruck in motion — completely on its own. What happened during this unscripted moment caught everyone off guard. The cameras kept rolling. The crew stayed silent. And the vehicle did something that changed how we think about what’s next. People keep replaying the clip — not for the drama, but for the realization:It’s ready. | | | Exclusive Partner Spotlights | (Sponsored) ---|--- Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. clean_body: | | | | 🚨🚨🚨 BREAKING POLL: "MARGIN-OF-ERROR RACE" Peter, A brand new poll just broke. We're up – barely. This poll shows this is a margin-of-error race, and we must kick things into overdrive. That means laying out the stakes, right now. I've talked a lot about my story and priorities, but now I must spend a moment explaining my opponent Aftyn Behn's record of complete left-wing lunacy. As you read this mind-blowing list of "greatest hits," ask yourself if this is who President Trump, or any level-headed American, needs wielding power in Congress. | | 1️⃣ After Roe was overturned, pushed for "self-managed abortions" at home , and vowed to "get abortion pills to people" in red states (even without parental consent for minors). 2️⃣ Called Tennessee "deeply racist" and labeled Nashville "racist" and a hub of "white supremacy." Going further, she mocked Southern traditions like sororities as "staples of white supremacy" and flat-out declared: "I hate this city." 3️⃣ Argued that traditional family roles, especially those of full-time moms, are "patriarchal chains" that "trap women in unpaid labor and dependency," and urged feminists to "abolish the nuclear family model." Her "recurring dream from therapy," she announced, is "standing up in a cafeteria full of women and saying 'I don't want children. I want power!' " 4️⃣ Amid the 2020 BLM riots, called for dissolving the Nashville Police Department and celebrated the burning down of police stations as "justified." 5️⃣ In 2019, hysterically screamed "This is fascism!" and wept uncontrollably as security forcibly removed her from Tennessee Governor Bill Lee's office during a sit-in over education funding, calling Republicans "fascists" in the same rant. **Peter, Aftyn Behn is another "Squad" embarrassment-in-the-making and we have just days to stop her cold. The Democrats just dumped over $1 million into this race and they're pulling out all the stops to try and force an upset on December 2nd. I know we've asked a lot of you, and time and again you've delivered. But now we must take it to the next level. This poll shows a margin-of-error race, and we must win. Thank you for your tireless efforts and generosity. Sincerely,Matt Van Epps | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Matt Van Epps for Congress | Matt Van Epps for Congress** P.O. As we close out the year, I’m grateful for this community of supporters who believe in me as a leader and Colorado’s next Treasurer. clean_body: | | | Hey Peter, Today marks the first day of the last month of 2025! Back in February, I launched my campaign for state treasurer, and every day, I have been amazed by the support you all have given me. Throughout my time in the legislature, I’ve made one thing abundantly clear: I answer to the public. I’m motivated by making your lives easier and ensuring the government works WITH you — not against. I entered this race to protect the wallets of hardworking Coloradans and to bring transparency, accountability, and fiscal responsibility to the treasurer’s office. As we close out the year, I’m grateful for this community of supporters who believe in me as a leader and Colorado’s next Treasurer. December is our moment to show the strength of this grassroots movement and build the foundation we need going into 2026. Thank you for being part of this team. I’m proud of the work we’ve done together — and even more excited for the work ahead. Thank you, Brianna Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. **** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

Seth joined the Witherspoon Institute’s Get LIT fundraiser to raise awareness for local literacy programs._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120374336/586077778/2090747700?refcode=251201_tm_recap_img3&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI0NGMxYS0wNmNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q444fCbqFnqlx_VVWs4bacoZXzkeZ_5Sa5yterORLtw=) _🥫 Volunteering at a food pantry. He spent time helping distribute food to neighbors, feeling the squeeze this season.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120374337/586077779/2090747700?refcode=251201_tm_recap_img4&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI0NGMxYS0wNmNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q444fCbqFnqlx_VVWs4bacoZXzkeZ_5Sa5yterORLtw=)

### About Seth Moulton

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Our community is under attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Friend, it's Ilhan Omar.
Something I’m really proud of is that, in addition to being one of the first Muslim women in Congress, I’m also the first Somali-American to serve in Congress.
Over the last few decades, Somali refugees and immigrants have come to America to find safety and economic opportunity, just like generations of people throughout our history who have immigrated from all over the world to contribute to the great melting pot.
But over the last week, Trump and all of MAGA have put a target on the backs of Somali-Americans, and especially those in our community here in Minneapolis.
Trump has threatened to denaturalize legal Somali immigrants, threatened to launch sham green card investigations, declared that he will end Temporary Protected Status for Somalis, and spread dangerous misinformation about “Somali gangs terrorizing the people” and stealing billions of dollars.
**This is not just an attack on Somali-Americans. This an attack on our entire Minneapolis community, and everyone who contributes to this great city.**
Rather than explain why Trump doesn’t have the power to do what he threatens, or how his accusations have been debunked, I’m going to do something different: **_I want you to join me in taking action today.**_
CAIR is an organization that has fought tirelessly over the years to protect the civil rights of Muslim Americans and promote justice for all.
Here in Minnesota, CAIR is working to provide legal support to Somali families facing harassment, discrimination and threats, host Know Your Rights workshops, coordinate safety responses for vulnerable institutions and community spaces, monitor online threats and misinformation campaigns, and much more.
So, if you want to show that you stand with immigrant communities against racist and bigoted attacks from Donald Trump and the far-right, I’m asking you to join me in supporting CAIR today.
**[Please, make a donation to CAIR Minnesota. Join us as we fight back against hatred and continue to protect the rights and civil liberties of immigrants from all over the world who make their home here in the United States.**](https://www.zeffy.com/en-US/donation-form/stand-with-minnesotas-somali-american-and-muslim-community-in-this-critical-moment)
**[DONATE HERE](https://www.zeffy.com/en-US/donation-form/stand-with-minnesotas-somali-american-and-muslim-community-in-this-critical-moment)**
In solidarity with every community that is under attack from this out-of-control administration,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=1&akid=1974%2E791427%2EVg-RSG)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1974%2E791427%2EVg-RSG)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=3&akid=1974%2E791427%2EVg-RSG)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=1974_791427_Vg-RSG&akid=1974%2E791427%2EVg-RSG)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Justice Democrats
subject: re: Cyber Monday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This Cyber Monday, let’s talk about how much money Big Tech is planning to
spend in the 2026 elections through Super PACs dedicated to crypto, AI,
and their own bottom lines.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251201.DSGXfZ&refcode=em20251201-37242&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37242%2E1203867%2EKujipS ]Before we get into it, will you pitch in a grassroots contribution to
help us stop Big Tech from buying more seats in Congress next year?

Big Tech, especially the cryptocurrency or crypto industry, has always
just been Wall Street with a new name. Plagued by corporate greed and
corruption, they’re willing to spend as much money as possible to avoid
being regulated and held accountable by Congress, so they can maximize
profits at our expense.

Last cycle, the crypto lobby alone was one of the largest spenders, making
up HALF of all corporate political donations. This cycle, it’s only
getting worse.

In a recent piece by Issue One, they warn, “Nearly one year before the
2026 midterm elections, Big Tech’s influence machine shows no signs of
slowing or shrinking. The industry’s largest players are growing their war
chests, fine-tuning their political tools, and finding new ways to protect
their industries in Washington.”

In the first nine months of 2025, “seven of the largest tech, artificial
intelligence (AI), and social media companies spent a combined $50 million
on federal lobbying — an average of nearly $400,000 for every day that
Congress has been in session.”

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251201.DSGXfZ&refcode=em20251201-37242&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37242%2E1203867%2EKujipS ]Issue One table: Big Tech’s Major Spending Spree.

And new Super PACS like Meta California PAC and Leading the Future PAC
just launched this cycle on behalf of Big Tech billionaires like Meta CEO
Mark Zuckerberg, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, and AI investor Andreessen
Horowitz.

Big Tech is pooling hundreds of millions of dollars to buy our elections
and ensure candidates backed by Justice Democrats — who will actually hold
these greedy billionaires accountable — don’t get elected.

This Cyber Monday, we can show the Sam Altmans and Mark Zuckerbergs of
Silicon Valley that their billions can’t buy us. Help us defeat Big Tech
with progressive, working-class candidates who will fight back against
them in Congress — not take their checks and greenlight their exploitation
of American workers, consumers, and our environment.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251201.DSGXfZ&refcode=em20251201-37242&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1004&akid=37242%2E1203867%2EKujipS ]Pitch in $5 or whatever you can afford today to take on
Big Tech with our 2026 slate →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251201.DSGXfZ&refcode=em20251201-37242&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1023&akid=37242%2E1203867%2EKujipS ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251201-37242-footer&t=1024&refcode2=37242_1203867_KujipS&akid=37242%2E1203867%2EKujipS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=37242%2E1203867%2EKujipS

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Never expected to get the cold shoulder from YOU
body:
Peter, is everything OK?

| | | | Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder?
I know I’ve reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they’ve texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren’t interested in these messages?
That would be truly shocking to me since you’ve always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump’s mission to save America, so I’m giving you one more chance!
[My ONLY request right now is that you complete the Official Trump Voter Profile before the end of the week.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._NTQ) Really, that’s it! I just need your feedback, nothing more! | [ SUBMIT MY TRUMP VOTER PROFILE ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
---
You still have time, but not much, so I encourage you to complete your profile sooner rather than later! I’m also really starting to worry that we haven’t heard from you!

[Please, Peter, if you have a few minutes submit your Voter Profile before time expires!](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)

THANK YOU,
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
Marsha Blackburn
[ SUBMIT MY TRUMP VOTER PROFILE ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._GZBw18FVOw8bPcg)
---

clean_body: Peter, is everything OK? | | | | Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder? I know I’ve reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they’ve texted and emailed at least twice too! Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren’t interested in these messages? That would be truly shocking to me since you’ve always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump’s mission to save America, so I’m giving you one more chance! Really, that’s it! I just need your feedback, nothing more! | You still have time, but not much, so I encourage you to complete your profile sooner rather than later! I’m also really starting to worry that we haven’t heard from you! THANK YOU, Marsha Blackburn | | | | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |

Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee. Today, I’m officially launching my campaign for re-election — and I want to tell you why this work still matters so deeply to me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120376308/586082372/-1566497354?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_120125_Reelection01_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjgwNDFiMi0wOWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ASJvr1FKG-hnRvCb_zeQ9_t-G33iFkWooAXb6Iiyj4=) Long before I ever imagined serving in Congress, I was a mom working the night shift and spending my mornings in my boys’ classrooms. That’s where I first saw how unevenly our communities were being supported — and how often Black and brown children were being left behind. What started in a classroom turned into service on the School Board. When our schools needed stronger investment, I fought from the County Commission. When families needed better resources, stronger representation, and leaders who actually listened, I continued that fight in the State House and now in Congress. **At every step, my motivation has stayed the same: to build a better life for our community.** I ran for Congress in 2022 because I believed — and still believe — in building a better, fairer future for the community I love. We’ve made real progress together, but **there is still so much more to do.** **[If you’re with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities that we love — will you become a founding donor to my reelection campaign and help me defend my seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120376311/586082374/-1566497354?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_120125_Reelection01_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjgwNDFiMi0wOWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ASJvr1FKG-hnRvCb_zeQ9_t-G33iFkWooAXb6Iiyj4=)** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120376314/586082377/-1566497354?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_120125_Reelection01_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjgwNDFiMi0wOWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ASJvr1FKG-hnRvCb_zeQ9_t-G33iFkWooAXb6Iiyj4=)

Since arriving in Congress, I’ve focused on delivering results — from my work on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee to my service on the Science, Space, and Technology Committee. I’m committed to strengthening our infrastructure, advancing innovation, and ensuring North Carolina remains a place where families can thrive.
**Choosing to run for re-election was simple: We have more work to do.**
Every day, I hear from families who are working harder than ever yet still struggling to keep up — with rising costs, shrinking opportunities, and a Congress that too often puts politics ahead of people.
We need a Congress that will protect our rights, invest in our future, and make life more affordable for families across North Carolina. And I believe the best way to restore balance, defend our democracy, and move this country forward is for Democrats to take back the House of Representatives.
**[Can I count on you to chip in today to become a Founding Donor and help us build the momentum we need to win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120376317/586082380/-1566497354?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_120125_Reelection01_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjgwNDFiMi0wOWNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ASJvr1FKG-hnRvCb_zeQ9_t-G33iFkWooAXb6Iiyj4=)**

clean_body: I’m officially launching my campaign for re-election If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee. Today, I’m officially launching my campaign for re-election — and I want to tell you why this work still matters so deeply to me. = Long before I ever imagined serving in Congress, I was a mom working the night shift and spending my mornings in my boys’ classrooms. That’s where I first saw how unevenly our communities were being supported — and how often Black and brown children were being left behind. What started in a classroom turned into service on the School Board. When our schools needed stronger investment, I fought from the County Commission. When families needed better resources, stronger representation, and leaders who actually listened, I continued that fight in the State House and now in Congress. At every step, my motivation has stayed the same: to build a better life for our community. I ran for Congress in 2022 because I believed — and still believe — in building a better, fairer future for the community I love. We’ve made real progress together, but there is still so much more to do. = | | = Since arriving in Congress, I’ve focused on delivering results — from my work on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee to my service on the Science, Space, and Technology Committee. I’m committed to strengthening our infrastructure, advancing innovation, and ensuring North Carolina remains a place where families can thrive. Choosing to run for re-election was simple: We have more work to do. Every day, I hear from families who are working harder than ever yet still struggling to keep up — with rising costs, shrinking opportunities, and a Congress that too often puts politics ahead of people. We need a Congress that will protect our rights, invest in our future, and make life more affordable for families across North Carolina. And I believe the best way to restore balance, defend our democracy, and move this country forward is for Democrats to take back the House of Representatives. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I can’t thank you enough for your support. Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

Republican Rep. Maria Salazar **[clashed with CNN's Dana Bash](https://substack.com/redirect/bf84b750-4d30-4a18-ae05-2ce26c17678c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over President Donald Trump's proactive approach to combatting the illegal drug trade by engaging Venezuelan ships with U.S. forces.
**[This got heated! Watch is here:](https://substack.com/redirect/bf84b750-4d30-4a18-ae05-2ce26c17678c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bf84b750-4d30-4a18-ae05-2ce26c17678c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bf84b750-4d30-4a18-ae05-2ce26c17678c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **White House releases Trump MRI results showing good health**
White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt **[released details Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/883a31f8-48c7-4fd9-9bb4-baa871c5b4da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from President Trump's October MRI scan conducted during his second routine physical of the year, reading results that showed his cardiovascular system has "excellent health" with "no evidence of arterial narrowing" and all major organs appearing "very healthy" with "no acute or chronic concerns."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/883a31f8-48c7-4fd9-9bb4-baa871c5b4da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Scrutiny follows photos showing bruising and swelling:** Trump's health has fallen under increasing media scrutiny as the oldest man to be inaugurated president, with repeated photos since February showing bruising on his hand and July photos showing swollen legs, though both Leavitt and Trump have repeatedly brushed off concerns, pointing to April and October physical examinations that found him in "excellent health."
* **Trump volunteers to release scan, confirms not brain-focused:** Trump was questioned about the MRI Sunday evening and said he would release the report while emphasizing it was "perfect" and clarifying that it did not focus on scanning his brain, stating "If they want to release it, it's OK with me to release it. It's perfect."
* **Media criticism follows Biden health coverage controversy:** Media concern over Trump's health follows the current White House's repeated criticisms of journalists over their lack of reporting on then-President Joe Biden's mental acuity and physical fitness, with the media not largely focusing on Biden's health until the election cycle when political allies called on him to drop out, ultimately leading to his July 2024 exit from the race.

* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/8da090db-9d1f-4194-85fe-2f795ac6d24f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/8da090db-9d1f-4194-85fe-2f795ac6d24f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8da090db-9d1f-4194-85fe-2f795ac6d24f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/8da090db-9d1f-4194-85fe-2f795ac6d24f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **DHS: New York released nearly 7,000 illegal migrant criminals without notifying ICE**
The Department of Homeland Security **[revealed that New York state has released 6,947 illegal aliens](https://substack.com/redirect/06f70c89-c4ff-4967-953f-ddf9485e023e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with active ICE detainers back onto streets since January 20 when President Trump took office, with another 7,113 currently locked up in jails and prisons, all protected by sanctuary laws that prevent cooperation with immigration agents.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/06f70c89-c4ff-4967-953f-ddf9485e023e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Criminals responsible for thousands of violent offenses:** The released migrants' rap sheets cumulatively include attempted murder, thousands of assaults, and hundreds of burglaries, robberies, drug offenses, weapons offenses and sexual predatory offenses, while those still incarcerated are responsible for 148 homicides, 717 assaults, 134 burglaries, 106 robberies, 235 drug offenses, 152 weapons offenses and 260 sexual predatory offenses.
* **Federal demand letter sent to AG Letitia James:** Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons sent a demand letter Monday to Attorney General Letitia James asking her to hand over the detained migrants for deportation, following a similar September 12 letter that James deflected to Gov. Kathy Hochul's office, claiming detainer requests are handled differently depending on local laws and "we cannot address in our capacity as the Attorney General."
* **Letter highlights dozen released criminals with heinous records:** The agency included examples of released migrants such as Crips gang member Anderson Smith Satuye Martinez (arrested for weapons and drug possession), Jose David Hernandez Hernandez (arrested for rape, strangulation and assault), and career criminal Alexander Moreno Montoya (charged with assaulting a police officer and cocaine possession), pointedly asking James to "confirm whether the State of New York plans to honor detainers on these aliens or whether each of these barbarians will someday walk the streets of New York again."

* * *
# **Melania unveils "America's Christmas" White House decor**
First Lady Melania Trump **[shared this year's White House Christmas decorations](https://substack.com/redirect/60bbc116-2ae7-4392-ab13-efe31094b9fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Monday with the theme "Home Is Where the Heart Is" and described as "AMERICA'S CHRISTMAS," featuring over 25,000 feet of ribbon, 2,000 strands of lights, and 51 trees across themed rooms including the Red Room's "Fostering the Future" and the East Room celebrating America's upcoming 250th anniversary.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a1a635b2-e0b4-4512-827a-5a7335226fdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Social media praises Trump 's "elegant" Christmas display:** Many on X celebrated the decorations as bringing "class and beauty back to the White House," with one user writing "What an impressive upgrade over the last 4 years" and another saying they had been "looking forward to seeing this since 2020," as similar comments praising the elegance rolled in.
* **Stark contrast to Biden 's 2023 "circus" decor:** The Trump White House Christmas drew comparisons to the Biden administration's controversial 2023 display featuring over-the-top dancers from Dorrance Dance performing an interpretation of The Nutcracker Suite, which Breitbart's John Nolte criticized as "gross" and self-celebrating rather than seasonal, noting the display came one day after President Biden announced he was pardoning his son Hunter.

* * *

name: Team Pramila
subject: Take our 2025 Health Care Costs Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Health care costs are skyrocketing for millions across the country.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251201-5670-footer&t=1&akid=5670%2E420207%2EfDeZAk)
Peter,
Now that Republicans have allowed key subsidies in the Affordable Care Act to expire, health care costs are skyrocketing for millions across the country. Many people are even reporting that their premiums have doubled or more in recent months.
**If you’re willing to share, Pramila wants to know how rising health care costs are affecting you and your family.** [**Will you take our quick, four-question survey now and let us know?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2025-healthcare-costs-survey/?source=em20251201-5670&t=2&akid=5670%2E420207%2EfDeZAk)
**[Take The Survey](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2025-healthcare-costs-survey/?source=em20251201-5670&t=3&akid=5670%2E420207%2EfDeZAk)**
Your experiences will help inform Pramila’s work as she continues to advocate for a health care system in which _everyone_ is guaranteed the care they need.
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251201-5670-footer&t=4&refcode2=5670_420207_fDeZAk&akid=5670%2E420207%2EfDeZAk)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

## Commonsense Corner:
---
We are still sick over the two National Guard members who were [shot](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/1ON14LcFJB_cfBAmbEG-lgQ4d8crzmYf2_uQ0bnyCYpbk-Ja_2xRjeV2SrAqoE6s42FIKW-fd2vFyRZ5s_FHmGUvSKPDP3cXiO2JRIa8j2IDO9OJ8abk8W0DIrVNyNJIkLfRkqghQhf8BEMm3b8PFc7MNNdGHHo9xsnHOhxOWDytrTh8Kudw_S5nF52J_iyr9lh82UfgzeaC_SeVFgKXhtGpHronPD17F_iyEjM2gJ2hXRYagKEXIgSh2Ruwp5E9fbOBLeFx_Mm3oqgzel2bhcrup9aP6jZfmYUdvhTJyqYGh6QgJpz0BBq6U8GxPCquI_7jSsZPtYzLe51BW36w8WArWKXYqb4YpEUtPpR1q4y4lO8VKCbDNDXKg2XE5f8R0c_5Zy3lje4cL8kBeqXB5UI-J4LI4xc-2wuz6wZdzWiaRVYL2HxOUZTviWKDNX59EE4nagMd3_vk5z-N3CCcCshAzU1FlLsq1je4ivMR2hfaSXHAlYO5f3vMRk3KgFdQoZPqvqZbFfW8GMe92e7-wohtckMOU0qC7Pa2h4JE4DOBghD9Cw/-jvA9HGGmbglsoWHGKXiaG76wGgjiXcq/15) last week while protecting our nation’s capital. These men and women put their lives on the line for us every single day, and the [gutless thug](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/kp3YBsBU87N5g0MxIfvHOXzk6PhzGc3PciKfjtAkF_kLlxvDa6biIo2IEsu-fTfLCmMg-J3ARTYDPhQmD-7z6avZyuMtheYPgnkh9AMHJAggOr80Gs0rqhDZumhoGWXXzCRT9cn3RF5C86r6v_yxvF83lUkkhBGbsemagIpl0_na8ZoRbzVSBLS-1F3QARVPGLLISaHfLF-3wd1pYntn-k1xlqh3qTOLa_dCy7vAjTzDJYo1GAUfmGm79Oh3QF3Z5yaOPOZ5_fenh-6vfetAMDFlWK9F-7R8vBvUoKLSpcLUl9pcxCT6Hg5BVmhkm2tsBSAA7mxbPXK7RwWILG0yW6mv29O3z4ae8HAvHOpULReX0kJCg_extc6P1NEZYm-QFfGN6uTbfVpeqODddo__E2CDX7zah7tiogcynG8eSSXp9W5H2R95QXsFUzRwzfeMAEII-QvHPanX-ARaAduXOc55Jay5Pi1z5izPRiEcXkFELPr852fzvKgfBYfLHdajRkFs9a-04YXkcBAFZ_6dnYOX8cVjSHU/x8YUpsEJL2X31sZSJj0bE4fQ8EZ2Rhba/15) responsible for this attack (who was let in here under Biden’s watch) should be brought to justice immediately. This incident should outrage every American—but Democrats immediately tried to [blame President Trump](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/p66DtblOA6wEwOpU0ENcSiT6dKiJEMjQkpt3iBo1nEhcPvfe304rUWuDPFYGa8k0q_lQc83qizU7YTB5X8LQUODhb_YXRlE-SUI4gfdtox1l1B-5R0c49vWKeqXGIs_427xKV9QasX-cOgxfGS67BFS6QMcI6H7gYr_y0gBcnazaA0S3TjyVMfE6gq3qJgTuhsRpWuM3xz-ftrS7w59JgsJfsY2rSdFnP0yxv04fIjffcgYDfdCqJd94CWLyKPTw0gadOlqI0fUZWQuZ3R652sk0zftL_wqlN0c1-kX4eyRjfOpGB1qr5usQ3FikimWULs05otaGeqz_LZYTATuf0NA0ow1C8B-HcHHPdtEOSSXCeOz1E10l4tYe8JEjxbNqkra-da55uYMxGD-0MDGH1JwjRf5MmSfidlDHIxgqkOD9aoRPE9WVnP79IB_t6aDG_xe1cS3kECLfK_BJvPZJswUIOdbP2JNzQE59u_4oQ7qUWdIW0pB203v0QVhwPXT8IumOWmjOdORc72RChv2AZwLQgjc_2cELNB4KCCwse18E55W1K3WW_6JQeZK-CJMm9uAUQGpmmBuOAlleMSB2G_vf2W56rfFiPc0Wy1fAo9vVFYV7goMfQ6dk_Ay2Ui0X6BBgOTO_UjP4OygK_HBZKCEq7oTR-xVWPeXYxwZc_enfMYQPeC2vOGLpdmxAJh-V-w/IYJoXMQ5DhaQhYqi7Y4DO3PeVB91qW86/15) for having our Guard members stationed there in the first place. Give us a break. 🙄 Democrats will twist themselves into a pretzel to avoid admitting the truth: Joe Biden (the former zombie-in-chief) still can’t tell the American people exactly how many Afghan nationals he let into our country after his disastrous Afghanistan exit. These men and women put their lives on the line for us every single day, and the responsible for this attack (who was let in here under Biden’s watch) should be brought to justice immediately. This incident should outrage every American—but Democrats immediately tried to for having our Guard members stationed there in the first place. And this heinous act of violence proves that his administration’s so-called “” was feeble at best. So now we’re all left wondering: How many sleeper cells are waiting in the wings right now because of the Left’s incompetence? And who’s bankrolling these people nowadays? It’s George Conway. I’ve spent _years_ calling out Donald Trump, the Republican Party, and their enablers! **And if there’s one man who embodies political cowardice more than anyone else, it’s _Lindsey Graham_.**

Here’s the truth: Lindsey Graham is as spineless as they come.

I watched him go from calling Trump a “kook” who was “unfit for office” to becoming Trump’s most loyal lapdog in the Senate. Which is even offensive to dogs because unlike Lindsey Graham _they actually have spines_. Lindsey twists himself into whatever shape necessary to kiss Trump’s 🫏. It’s pathetic. And it’s dangerous.

South Carolina needs a Senator with a backbone. Someone strong enough to stand up to corruption and special interests to put our communities first. That’s why I’m supporting Dr. Annie Andrews, and I’m asking you to support her campaign today too. | | [ DONATE NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120376872/586084133/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.01_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWRhMjQ0Yy0wYmNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JY5HtJqWUsvuDjV8iSUWZGs2PiCXFnWy4erCfjhqj3I=)

Hi, it's Shawn Harris, the Democrat and military Vet running in the GA-14 special election for the seat just vacated by Marjorie Taylor Greene. The House is currently 213 (D) to 219 (R). The date of the election has not been set but we know it'll be in the next few weeks. If Republicans lose here, and in the other special elections (TN-07, TX-18, & NJ-11) we would decimate their majority in the House long before next November. Plain and simple. Adelita Grijalva & James Walkinshaw (two Dems) just won the two most recent special elections. Dems are on a roll. But if MAGA succeeds at replacing MTG in this district, they would help solidify Trump's bloc in Congress through 2026 and stop Democrats' chances in just a few short weeks. That's why my team is all hands on deck right now. We're staffing up, running ads and making phone calls. But we're behind our fundraising target and won't be able to sustain this if we don't catch back up ASAP. clean_body: | | | Hi, it's Shawn Harris, the Democrat and military Vet running in the GA-14 special election for the seat just vacated by Marjorie Taylor Greene. The House is currently 213 (D) to 219 (R). The date of the election has not been set but we know it'll be in the next few weeks. If Republicans lose here, and in the other special elections (TN-07, TX-18, & NJ-11) we would decimate their majority in the House long before next November. Plain and simple. Adelita Grijalva & James Walkinshaw (two Dems) just won the two most recent special elections. Dems are on a roll. But if MAGA succeeds at replacing MTG in this district, they would help solidify Trump's bloc in Congress through 2026 and stop Democrats' chances in just a few short weeks. That's why my team is all hands on deck right now. We're staffing up, running ads and making phone calls. But we're behind our fundraising target and won't be able to sustain this if we don't catch back up ASAP. | ~~ ~~ ~~ This race is make or break and you have the power to help Democrats break the Republican trifecta. Let's leave it all on the field. -Shawn Harris | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

name: Aftyn Behn
subject: Donald Trump’s panicking about this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Wow.
Hi, this is Aftyn Behn. I’m running in the last House race of 2025 here in TN-07.
**Trump is begging MAGA to go vote – he’s PANICKING about securing this seat.** Take a look at what the president just posted:
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1274?c0=mcb-em-20251201-1.D_jtmF&refcode=em20251201-2546&t=1&akid=2546%2E21716%2EwQVg2r)[**Will you split a donation between my campaign and Sarah McBride right now to flip TN-07 blue?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1274?c0=mcb-em-20251201-1.D_jtmF&refcode=em20251201-2546&t=2&akid=2546%2E21716%2EwQVg2r)
Donald Trump is scrambling because he knows what it would mean for us to win the last House race of 2025:
That voters are rejecting MAGA extremism across the country.
That we can rewrite the playbook for what’s possible for Democrats in the Deep South.
That we’ll be heading into 2026 one seat closer to retaking the House and putting a check on this administration.
**No wonder he’s scared.**
The New York Times called our race “the unlikely new front in the fight for control of Congress.” We’ve got the eyes of the nation on us, and the only way we win tomorrow is if we work together.
[**Please split a donation between my campaign and Sarah McBride so we can fight back!**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1274?c0=mcb-em-20251201-1.D_jtmF&refcode=em20251201-2546&t=3&akid=2546%2E21716%2EwQVg2r)

It’s great to have you in my corner.
– Aftyn Behn
