Peter, Before Giving Tuesday arrives tomorrow, I wanted to pause and thank you for standing firm with Texans for Vaccine Choice. Throughout this year, our team has continued fighting, laying the groundwork for the fight ahead in 2026. With Giving Tuesday tomorrow, **our chance to refuel and prepare is as important as ever.** As we celebrated 10 years of fighting tyranny this year, one thing remains clear: **your support fuels real victories.** This year alone, with the grassroots power of Texans like you, we secured some of the strongest medical freedom wins in TFVC history. No more hurdles to vaccine exemptions—parents can now print affidavits from home. Patients can’t be denied organ transplants based on vaccination status. Vaccine manufacturers are finally liable for their deceptive advertising. And Ivermectin is on the path to being available _without_ a prescription. So many major reforms. Zero medical tyranny bills passed. And thousands of Texans educated, trained, and empowered to stand for their rights. **But Peter, we cannot slow down now.** The fight for medical liberty in Texas is nowhere near over. Big Pharma is still lobbying. State agencies are still testing the limits of their authority. And the next year's elections will separate candidates who are serious about defending our rights, and who is not. _That’s why Giving Tuesday is so critical._ Our year-end fundraising determines how aggressively we can fight in 2026—from expanding our outreach, to strengthening our legal efforts, to preparing for new attempts to erode parental rights and medical freedom. [That’s why I’m asking you to stand with us today.](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTcyNjI4OTYyMTk5OTk1ODMwLFwiclwiOjE3MjYyODk5MTUyMzQyMzk1OH0iLCJzIjoiNzUzOGU3MTY5OTU3ODJlOSJ9) **Will you consider making a generous contribution to TFVC for Giving Tuesday?**

Thank you for being part of this movement. Together, we are proving—year after year—that Texans will not be silenced.

Rebecca Hardy
President, TFVC**

| Peter, we have a quick but important question for you. Thanksgiving is one of the clearest moments of the year where families _**feel**_**** the economy – _at the grocery store, at the gas pump, and around the table._ Now that President Trump is back in the White House, working to rebuild America, conservatives are finally seeing real leadership again. **But families across the country are still recovering from years of skyrocketing prices, broken supply chains, and economic mismanagement –** _**and we want to know what your experience was this Thanksgiving.**_ Before we finalize our 2026 planning, we need to hear directly from the people we're fighting for every day, [**_so take the post-Thanksgiving check-in poll now and let your voice be heard. >>>_**](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fpost-thanksgiving-poll%3Futm_campaign=20251201_Reeves_PostThanksgiving%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/2/0100019adc424014-58c8dc75-6961-4e7d-87f6-5b46c3bb70ab-000000/WSX-oZKhNTKZEFA5Li5U67-9w-I=454)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: We’re within the margin of error:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
This is our final opportunity to help Aftyn and James reach undecided voters before polls open.

|
---
**Voters in Tennessee and New Jersey head to the polls tomorrow for two pivotal elections that will help shape the direction of our climate movement heading into 2026:** 🌍 **Aftyn Behn** is within striking distance of flipping a Deep South congressional seat (TN-7) in a district Trump carried by 22 points. It’s the kind of race the pundits never believed was possible, but new polling from _Emerson College_ /_The Hill_ shows it’s now within the margin of error, meaning Aftyn can win, if those of us who believe in this work show up for her in these final hours. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120377395/586086094/724378150?refcode=ea.1e5c5b2c-0ecf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.1e5c5b2c-0ecf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFlNWM1YjJjLTBlY2YtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UzPxSfX2zmh5WzLrVZ8tMTigBa9GV6DzcxGlZ9Rhu5o=) 🌍 **James Solomon** made it through a competitive 7-candidate field to reach the runoff for Mayor of Jersey City. Now, he’s up against a disgraced former governor bankrolled by millions from MAGA megadonors like the Kushner family — the very forces trying to drag our democracy backward. **[This is our final opportunity to help these candidates reach undecided voters before polls open _tomorrow_. Will you split a $12 donation between Aftyn and James right now — $6 to each campaign — to fuel their final efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120377396/586086095/724378150?amount=12&refcode=ea.1e5c5b2c-0ecf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.1e5c5b2c-0ecf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFlNWM1YjJjLTBlY2YtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UzPxSfX2zmh5WzLrVZ8tMTigBa9GV6DzcxGlZ9Rhu5o=)** | [**SPLIT A DONATION BETWEEN JAMES & AFTYN →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120377397/586086096/724378150?refcode=ea.1e5c5b2c-0ecf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.1e5c5b2c-0ecf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFlNWM1YjJjLTBlY2YtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UzPxSfX2zmh5WzLrVZ8tMTigBa9GV6DzcxGlZ9Rhu5o=)
---
**Last month, we delivered a crushing rejection of Trump's agenda.** We won every single race we invested in in Virginia. We made history in Georgia. We helped to flip Pennsylvania's Luzerne County Council from a 10-1 GOP supermajority in 2023 to a pro-environment majority. Over 60 JanePAC-endorsed climate champions won up and down the ballot.
Those victories sent shockwaves through the Republican Party and the fossil fuel industry, and they proved something important: climate champions can win anywhere when we organize early, invest deeply, and fight like hell _together._
Tomorrow’s outcomes will determine whether November 4 marked the beginning of a movement that reshapes American politics in 2026 — or a moment that fades when Trump and his allies push back.

clean_body: This is our final opportunity to help Aftyn and James reach undecided voters before polls open. | Voters in Tennessee and New Jersey head to the polls tomorrow for two pivotal elections that will help shape the direction of our climate movement heading into 2026: 🌍 Aftyn Behn is within striking distance of flipping a Deep South congressional seat (TN-7) in a district Trump carried by 22 points. It’s the kind of race the pundits never believed was possible, but new polling from Emerson College /The Hill shows it’s now within the margin of error, meaning Aftyn can win, if those of us who believe in this work show up for her in these final hours. = 🌍 James Solomon made it through a competitive 7-candidate field to reach the runoff for Mayor of Jersey City. Now, he’s up against a disgraced former governor bankrolled by millions from MAGA megadonors like the Kushner family — the very forces trying to drag our democracy backward. = | = Last month, we delivered a crushing rejection of Trump's agenda. We won every single race we invested in in Virginia. We made history in Georgia. We helped to flip Pennsylvania's Luzerne County Council from a 10-1 GOP supermajority in 2023 to a pro-environment majority. Over 60 JanePAC-endorsed climate champions won up and down the ballot. Those victories sent shockwaves through the Republican Party and the fossil fuel industry, and they proved something important: climate champions can win anywhere when we organize early, invest deeply, and fight like hell together. Tomorrow’s outcomes will determine whether November 4 marked the beginning of a movement that reshapes American politics in 2026 — or a moment that fades when Trump and his allies push back. James and Aftyn have already shown us they will fight for clean energy and take on corporate polluters even when it’s difficult. They understand that bold climate action cannot wait. But they can’t carry this alone. Special elections are often decided by just a handful of votes, and turnout is always lower outside of November. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Signature requested: Add your name and personally endorse Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Team,
In just a minute, we're going to ask if you will add your name to the thousands of others who have personally endorsed Mark.
Please give us a chance to explain why that endorsement is so important right now.
The truth is, we've never faced something quite like this.
Mark has never had to deal with threats from the White House, the Department of Defense, or the FBI all at the same time. Trump is trying to make an example out of Mark. He is trying to use the power of the presidency to shut him up and force him into silence.
We can't let Trump win.
Mark has always been lucky to have a strong team behind him, and that's gotten him through some tough moments. This is something else entirely.
We need everyone reading this, every person who believes in Mark, everybody who understands just how perilous this moment really is, to add their name here and personally endorse Mark.
It might seem like a small act, but by the time you've read this far another person will have already added their name. By the end of the day, we're hoping that thousands of people will be signed on. Can we count on you?
[**Add your name and personally endorse Mark Kelly. He needs you with him.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-dec25-endorse/?source=em251201-1-160&akid=6275%2E6688874%2ETrqwHf)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-dec25-endorse/?source=em251201-1-160&akid=6275%2E6688874%2ETrqwHf)**
Thank you,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6275%2E6688874%2ETrqwHf).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Costello for U.S. Senate
subject: A stronger path forward for Maine in 2026
body:
As the media focuses on two names, voters know there’s a better choice—learn why David is the strongest challenger to Senator Collins.

| | | | | [|
---](https://costelloforsenate.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d37adbc910a9a40e00b14f5&id=3a63d37f54&e=5d7176e969)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://costelloforsenate.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d37adbc910a9a40e00b14f5&id=899b22859e&e=5d7176e969)
| |

Friends,While the news media is currently focused on a two-person DEM Party nomination race, neither candidate, Graham Platner, nor Governor Mills is a slam dunk, and many voters in Maine are open to a more fitting, reform-focused alternative. Given his central Maine working-class roots, bold policy ideas, and extensive senior-level government experience - we continue to believe that David is the best candidate to unseat Senator Collins in 2026 and help in mitigating the worst actions and impulses of the Trump Administration. David has laid out the most detailed and substantive reform agenda and is the only candidate for the US Senate in Maine who has managed complex, multi-million-dollar government programs and operations both in the U.S and abroad. For more detail on David’s background, experience, and policy positions, visit our Campaign’s website and Facebook pages, and check out David’s recent Democratic Party Blue Wave fundraiser remarks below. Additionally, please share this email with others and consider contributing $15, or any amount that works for you, to help in ramping up our campaign activities in early 2026. Thank you and best always,Team CostelloP.S. For those friends interested in helping to collect primary ballot signatures please let us know by contacting the campaign at [campaign@costelloforsenate.com](mailto:campaign@costelloforsenate.com). Our work to collect signatures from 2,000 registered Democrats will run from January to March.
**Maine DEM’s Blue Wave Gala Remarks – Portland 11/18/25**
Good evening, Maine Democrats. I’m a former senior-level state, local, and federal government official and I’m running for the United States Senate to help in ending the Trump Administration’s unprecedented assault on our democracy, environment, and economy. Repair damage already done and enact reforms that protect against future assaults and ensure that all Americans, not just the wealthy, are provided with the education, job skills, housing, healthcare, and other life enriching opportunities to thrive.
As some of you may recall, I ran for the US Senate in 2024, not because I disliked Sen. King, but because I believed that Washington was broken. That our democracy was lacking. And that our governing infrastructure was as outdated as many of our roads, ports, and bridges. You can imagine what I think now. Saying that Washington is broken today is a monumental understatement.
Our values, speech, free press and elite academic, legal, and scientific institutions are under unceasing assault - with little regard for the long-term impacts on our environment, economy, public health, and citizenry.
Core American rights - women’s rights - civil rights - LGBTQ rights and governing norms are being erased. Critical government programs, services, and protections are being dismantled. The rule of law is being ignored. And our nation’s standing as the pillar of stability in the world is collapsing.
To remedy this situation, we must first win control of at least one of our two houses of congress. To help, we Democrats would do well to nominate a candidate for the US Senate whose background and experience contrasts sharply with that of Senator Collins.
Having grown-up in a working-class family in Old Town, the son of an Army veteran and labor organizer and grandson of French and Irish American shoe, textile, and railroad workers. And, having served for more than 25 years in senior-level government positions, both in the United States and abroad. As a top aide to Maine’s Secretary of State, the Mayor of Baltimore and the Governor of Maryland. As a Deputy Secretary and Acting Secretary of the Maryland Department of the Environment. And as a county program manager and regional team leader for the United States Agency for International Development (USAID-OTI). Managing, not simply legislating or talking about complex multi-million-dollar programs and operations. I believe that I am the candidate with the most fitting background, knowledge, and experience to defeat Senator Collins in 2026.
Moreover, to fix Washington, we need to nominate candidates for federal office who, like me, are committed to substantially reforming our governing practices and institutions and eliminating the excessive and corrupting influence that money, wealth, and disinformation have over our politics and government.
Candidates who, again like me, are willing to support long-overdue legislative and constitutional reforms, among them: a ban on gerrymandering; public financing for federal elections; abolition of the Electoral College; term-limits on federal judges and legislators (including Supreme Court justices); expanded support for civics education and journalistically ethical media; and bold, democratizing, structural overhauls of both houses of Congress.
Enacting these and other reforms will not only aid in salvaging our democracy, but will also enable us to finally, finally tackle such pressing challenges as: unaffordable housing and healthcare; insufficient retirement security; economic inequality; escalating gun violence; under resourced schools; shoddy infrastructure; and climate change. And - only then are we likely to achieve the more perfect union envisioned by our most thoughtful founders and forebears. For more detailed information, please visit: [**costelloforsenate.com.**](https://costelloforsenate.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d37adbc910a9a40e00b14f5&id=1a7f37b9fc&e=5d7176e969)
Thank you.

---
|
---
| [Donate to Support David!](https://costelloforsenate.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d37adbc910a9a40e00b14f5&id=0838488794&e=5d7176e969)
---
| | | | | [David’s Website](https://costelloforsenate.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d37adbc910a9a40e00b14f5&id=063e435e0b&e=5d7176e969)
---
| | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/9af80cbadad2/a-stronger-path-forward-for-maine-in-2026?e=5d7176e969)
Costello for Senate * P.O. Box 1038 * Brunswick, ME 04011-3449 * USA
[update your preferences](https://costelloforsenate.us22.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d37adbc910a9a40e00b14f5&id=5ea975ba88&e=5d7176e969&c=57c9c83a4e) or [unsubscribe](https://costelloforsenate.us22.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d37adbc910a9a40e00b14f5&id=5ea975ba88&t=b&e=5d7176e969&c=57c9c83a4e)

For more detailed information, please visit: Thank you. | | | | | | | | | | | | Costello for Senate P.O. Box 1038 Brunswick, ME 04011-3449 * USA or |

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: December 1st Capitol Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
http://www.BolickforArizona.com?mc_cid=b590de6a09&mc_eid=UNIQID

** 📣 Capitol Update – December 1
------------------------------------------------------------

**
Supporting Arizona Small Businesses
------------------------------------------------------------

Before Thanksgiving, I joined a small business roundtable hosted by the National Federation of Independent Business (NFIB). Owners shared their top challenges:
* Inflation and rising health care costs
* Difficulty hiring and retaining quality entry-level workers
* Burdensome government regulations

Arizona’s small businesses want to provide high-quality healthcare, but many are being priced out due to Obamacare regulations. Business leaders also emphasized how social promotion in our schools and rising minimum wages make workforce development harder.

Ahead of the roundtable, I toured a local cabinet-making business in our district. They are investing in advanced machinery to stay competitive against illegal foreign goods flooding the marketplace.

** Strengthening Education Pathways
------------------------------------------------------------

I visited Camelback High School to see how they are using the Center for High School Success (CHSS) roadmap. CHSS provides training, coaching, data analysis, and peer learning opportunities to help schools improve freshman success. This taxpayer-funded program now supports 199 high schools across 90 districts in Arizona and has already boosted 9th grade on-track graduation rates.

I also toured Arizona Agribusiness Equine Center (AAEC) – Paradise Valley, a top-performing charter school in our district. Since the late 1990s, AAEC has partnered with Paradise Valley Community College, allowing students to earn college credits while completing their high school diploma. Their model is a shining example of innovation in education, and I look forward to collaborating with them on legislation in the upcoming session.

** Family Court Reform
------------------------------------------------------------

I hosted a virtual meeting with Kayleigh Kozak from America First Policy Institute (AFPI) to discuss resources and strategies to improve outcomes in Arizona’s family courts. This is an area where we can make meaningful change for families across our state.

** Honoring Community Service
------------------------------------------------------------

The Tuesday before Thanksgiving, I recognized a group of outstanding young women from the National Charity League’s East Valley chapter with a legislative proclamation. Their commitment to service is inspiring and reflects the best of Arizona’s next generation.

** 📰 Bolick in the News
------------------------------------------------------------
* Arizona Capitol Times (https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/11/22/arizona-republicans-reignite-push-for-florida-style-elections/?mc_cid=b590de6a09&mc_eid=UNIQID)
* AZ Free News (https://azfreenews.com/2025/11/bolick-introduces-ballot-measure-aimed-at-expanding-voter-id-and-citizenship-verification/?mc_cid=b590de6a09&mc_eid=UNIQID)
* Arizona Insiders (https://arizonainsiders.com/2025/11/28/referendum-on-election-integrity-introduced-to-bypass-governor-and-go-to-voters/?mc_cid=b590de6a09&mc_eid=UNIQID)
* The Center Square (https://www.thecentersquare.com/arizona/article_740e52c4-9ca9-43ea-956a-46b163e7df95.html?mc_cid=b590de6a09&mc_eid=UNIQID)

**
📌 Campaign Update
------------------------------------------------------------

👉 Please c (https://go.azsos.gov/z9xl?mc_cid=b590de6a09&mc_eid=UNIQID) lick here (https://go.azsos.gov/z9xl?mc_cid=b590de6a09&mc_eid=UNIQID) to sign my online nomination petition to help me qualify for the August Republican primary ballot.
👉 Please c (https://secure.anedot.com/vote-bolick-statesenateld2/e188937e-3868-4339-9636-7efc29972a80?embed=true&exitIntent=true&mc_cid=b590de6a09&mc_eid=UNIQID) lick here (https://secure.anedot.com/vote-bolick-statesenateld2/e188937e-3868-4339-9636-7efc29972a80?embed=true&exitIntent=true&mc_cid=b590de6a09&mc_eid=UNIQID) to donate to my campaign to keep our momentum going.

**
📅 Upcoming Events
------------------------------------------------------------
* Meet & Greet in LD2 📍 December 13th, 8–10 AM Please RSVP: engage@nextlink-advisors.com (mailto:engage@nextlink-advisors.com?subject=RSVP%20for%20December%2013th&body=I%20would%20like%20to%20RSVP%20for%20this%20meet%20and%20greet.) to receive the address for the location.
* Fundraiser in Downtown Phoenix 📍 January 6th, 4–6 PM Please RSVP: info@bolickforarizona.com (mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com?subject=RSVP%20for%20January%206th%20fundraiser&body=I%20would%20like%20to%20RSVP%20for%20her%20January%202026%20fundraiser.%20) to receive the address for the location.

**
Looking Ahead
------------------------------------------------------------

As we enter the final month of 2025, I want to thank you for staying engaged and informed.

As you know, I have officially filed paperwork to run for a third term. With your continued support, we will hold this Senate seat in November 2026 and keep fighting for Arizona families, small businesses, and educational freedom.

Best,
Shawnna
